authors_text: Xudong Han,Aili Shen,Yitong Li,Lea Frermann,Timothy Baldwin,Trevor Cohn
title: fairlib: A Unified Framework for Assessing and Improving Classification Fairness
title_zh: fairlib：评估和提高分类公平性的统一框架
abstract: This paper presents fairlib, an open-source framework for assessing and improving classification fairness. It provides a systematic framework for quickly reproducing existing baseline models, developing new methods, evaluating models with different metrics, and visualizing their results. Its modularity and extensibility enable the framework to be used for diverse types of inputs, including natural language, images, and audio. In detail, we implement 14 debiasing methods, including pre-processing, at-training-time, and post-processing approaches. The built-in metrics cover the most commonly used fairness criterion and can be further generalized and customized for fairness evaluation.
summary: This paper presents fairlib, an open-source framework for assessing and improving classification fairness. It provides a systematic framework for quickly reproducing existing baseline models, developing new methods, evaluating models with different metrics, and visualizing their results. Its modularity and extensibility enable the framework to be used for diverse types of inputs, including natural language, images, and audio. In detail, we implement 14 debiasing methods, including pre-processing, at-training-time, and post-processing approaches. The built-in metrics cover the most commonly used fairness criterion and can be further generalized and customized for fairness evaluation.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 fairlib，一个用于评估和提高分类公平性的开源框架。它提供了一个系统框架，用于快速重现现有基线模型、开发新方法、使用不同指标评估模型以及可视化其结果。其模块化性和可扩展性使该框架能够用于多种类型的输入，包括自然语言、图像和音频。具体来说，我们实现了 14 种去偏方法，包括预处理、训练时和后处理方法。内置指标涵盖了最常用的公平性标准，并且可以进一步泛化和定制以进行公平性评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出fairlib，一个用于评估和改进分类公平性的统一开源框架。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性方法分散且缺乏统一工具，难以快速复现和比较不同模型与指标。
AI.method: 构建模块化框架支持自然语言、图像、音频等多类型输入，实现14种去偏方法及可扩展的公平性评估指标。
AI.result: 框架可快速复现基线模型、开发新方法，并通过多样化指标评估模型公平性。
AI.conclusion: fairlib为公平性研究提供统一工具，促进算法开发与评估的标准化进程。

authors_text: Saeed Ranjbar Alvar,Mateen Ulhaq,Hyomin Choi,Ivan V. Bajić
title: Joint Image Compression and Denoising via Latent-Space Scalability
title_zh: 通过潜在空间可扩展性进行联合图像压缩和去噪
abstract: When it comes to image compression in digital cameras, denoising is traditionally performed prior to compression. However, there are applications where image noise may be necessary to demonstrate the trustworthiness of the image, such as court evidence and image forensics. This means that noise itself needs to be coded, in addition to the clean image itself. In this paper, we present a learning-based image compression framework where image denoising and compression are performed jointly. The latent space of the image codec is organized in a scalable manner such that the clean image can be decoded from a subset of the latent space (the base layer), while the noisy image is decoded from the full latent space at a higher rate. Using a subset of the latent space for the denoised image allows denoising to be carried out at a lower rate. Besides providing a scalable representation of the noisy input image, performing denoising jointly with compression makes intuitive sense because noise is hard to compress; hence, compressibility is one of the criteria that may help distinguish noise from the signal. The proposed codec is compared against established compression and denoising benchmarks, and the experiments reveal considerable bitrate savings compared to a cascade combination of a state-of-the-art codec and a state-of-the-art denoiser.
summary: When it comes to image compression in digital cameras, denoising is traditionally performed prior to compression. However, there are applications where image noise may be necessary to demonstrate the trustworthiness of the image, such as court evidence and image forensics. This means that noise itself needs to be coded, in addition to the clean image itself. In this paper, we present a learning-based image compression framework where image denoising and compression are performed jointly. The latent space of the image codec is organized in a scalable manner such that the clean image can be decoded from a subset of the latent space (the base layer), while the noisy image is decoded from the full latent space at a higher rate. Using a subset of the latent space for the denoised image allows denoising to be carried out at a lower rate. Besides providing a scalable representation of the noisy input image, performing denoising jointly with compression makes intuitive sense because noise is hard to compress; hence, compressibility is one of the criteria that may help distinguish noise from the signal. The proposed codec is compared against established compression and denoising benchmarks, and the experiments reveal considerable bitrate savings compared to a cascade combination of a state-of-the-art codec and a state-of-the-art denoiser.
abstract_zh: 当谈到数码相机中的图像压缩时，传统上在压缩之前执行去噪。然而，在某些应用中可能需要图像噪声来证明图像的可信度，例如法庭证据和图像取证。这意味着除了干净图像本身之外，还需要对噪声本身进行编码。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的图像压缩框架，其中联合执行图像去噪和压缩。图像编解码器的潜在空间以可扩展的方式组织，使得干净的图像可以从潜在空间的子集（基础层）解码，而噪声图像以更高的速率从完整的潜在空间解码。使用去噪图像的潜在空间的子集允许以较低的速率进行去噪。除了提供噪声输入图像的可扩展表示之外，与压缩联合执行去噪具有直观意义，因为噪声难以压缩；因此，可压缩性是有助于区分噪声和信号的标准之一。将所提出的编解码器与已建立的压缩和降噪基准进行比较，并且实验表明，与最先进的编解码器和最先进的降噪器的级联组合相比，可节省大量比特率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种联合图像压缩与去噪的框架，通过潜在空间可扩展性实现对干净图像和含噪图像的可扩展表示。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在压缩前单独进行去噪，但司法证据等场景需保留噪声以证明图像可信度，且噪声难以压缩。联合处理可利用压缩性区分噪声与信号。
AI.method: 构建可扩展潜在空间，干净图像从潜在空间子集（基础层）解码，含噪图像需完整潜在空间。通过子集降低去噪码率，同时保留噪声信息。
AI.result: 相比独立压缩与去噪方法，所提编解码器在比特率上实现显著节省，验证了联合处理的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 联合压缩与去噪框架通过潜在空间可扩展性设计，有效平衡了噪声保留与压缩效率，为需要可信度验证的场景提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yongzhen Wang,Xuefeng Yan,Fu Lee Wang,Haoran Xie,Wenhan Yang,Mingqiang Wei,Jing Qin
title: UCL-Dehaze: Towards Real-world Image Dehazing via Unsupervised Contrastive Learning
title_zh: UCL-Dehaze：通过无监督对比学习实现现实世界图像去雾
abstract: While the wisdom of training an image dehazing model on synthetic hazy data can alleviate the difficulty of collecting real-world hazy/clean image pairs, it brings the well-known domain shift problem. From a different yet new perspective, this paper explores contrastive learning with an adversarial training effort to leverage unpaired real-world hazy and clean images, thus bridging the gap between synthetic and real-world haze is avoided. We propose an effective unsupervised contrastive learning paradigm for image dehazing, dubbed UCL-Dehaze. Unpaired real-world clean and hazy images are easily captured, and will serve as the important positive and negative samples respectively when training our UCL-Dehaze network. To train the network more effectively, we formulate a new self-contrastive perceptual loss function, which encourages the restored images to approach the positive samples and keep away from the negative samples in the embedding space. Besides the overall network architecture of UCL-Dehaze, adversarial training is utilized to align the distributions between the positive samples and the dehazed images. Compared with recent image dehazing works, UCL-Dehaze does not require paired data during training and utilizes unpaired positive/negative data to better enhance the dehazing performance. We conduct comprehensive experiments to evaluate our UCL-Dehaze and demonstrate its superiority over the state-of-the-arts, even only 1,800 unpaired real-world images are used to train our network. Source code has been available at https://github.com/yz-wang/UCL-Dehaze.
summary: While the wisdom of training an image dehazing model on synthetic hazy data can alleviate the difficulty of collecting real-world hazy/clean image pairs, it brings the well-known domain shift problem. From a different yet new perspective, this paper explores contrastive learning with an adversarial training effort to leverage unpaired real-world hazy and clean images, thus bridging the gap between synthetic and real-world haze is avoided. We propose an effective unsupervised contrastive learning paradigm for image dehazing, dubbed UCL-Dehaze. Unpaired real-world clean and hazy images are easily captured, and will serve as the important positive and negative samples respectively when training our UCL-Dehaze network. To train the network more effectively, we formulate a new self-contrastive perceptual loss function, which encourages the restored images to approach the positive samples and keep away from the negative samples in the embedding space. Besides the overall network architecture of UCL-Dehaze, adversarial training is utilized to align the distributions between the positive samples and the dehazed images. Compared with recent image dehazing works, UCL-Dehaze does not require paired data during training and utilizes unpaired positive/negative data to better enhance the dehazing performance. We conduct comprehensive experiments to evaluate our UCL-Dehaze and demonstrate its superiority over the state-of-the-arts, even only 1,800 unpaired real-world images are used to train our network. Source code has been available at https://github.com/yz-wang/UCL-Dehaze.
abstract_zh: 虽然在合成模糊数据上训练图像去雾模型的智慧可以减轻收集现实世界的模糊/干净图像对的难度，但它带来了众所周知的域转移问题。本文从不同但新的角度出发，通过对抗性训练探索对比学习，以利用不成对的现实世界雾霾和干净图像，从而避免弥合合成雾霾和现实世界雾霾之间的差距。我们提出了一种有效的无监督对比学习范式用于图像去雾，称为 UCL-Dehaze。不成对的真实世界的干净和模糊图像很容易被捕获，并且在训练我们的 UCL-Dehaze 网络时将分别作为重要的正样本和负样本。为了更有效地训练网络，我们制定了一种新的自对比感知损失函数，它鼓励恢复的图像在嵌入空间中接近正样本并远离负样本。除了 UCL-Dehaze 的整体网络架构之外，还利用对抗性训练来对齐正样本和去雾图像之间的分布。与最近的图像去雾工作相比，UCL-Dehaze 在训练过程中不需要配对数据，并利用不成对的正/负数据来更好地增强去雾性能。我们进行了全面的实验来评估我们的 UCL-Dehaze 并证明其相对于最先进技术的优越性，即使只使用 1,800 个未配对的真实世界图像来训练我们的网络。源代码已在 https://github.com/yz-wang/UCL-Dehaze 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无监督对比学习的图像去雾方法UCL-Dehaze，利用未配对的真实世界雾霾和清晰图像进行训练，避免了合成数据与真实场景间的领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖合成雾霾数据训练去雾模型，但存在领域偏移问题；而真实世界未配对的雾霾/清晰图像易获取，可有效提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 设计无监督对比学习框架，将未配对的真实清晰图像作为正样本、雾霾图像作为负样本，结合自对比感知损失函数与对抗训练，使恢复图像在嵌入空间中接近正样本并远离负样本。
AI.result: 在仅使用1800张未配对真实图像训练下，UCL-Dehaze在多个基准数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，且代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 通过无监督对比学习与对抗训练有效利用未配对数据，解决了领域偏移问题，为真实场景图像去雾提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: UCL-Dehaze: Towards Real-world Image Dehazing via Unsupervised Contrastive Learning UCL-Dehaze：通过无监督对比学习实现现实世界图像去雾 While the wisdom of training an image dehazing model on synthetic hazy data can alleviate the difficulty of collecting real-world hazy/clean image pairs, it brings the well-known domain shift problem. From a different yet new perspective, this paper explores contrastive learning with an adversarial training effort to leverage unpaired real-world hazy and clean images, thus bridging the gap between synthetic and real-world haze is avoided. We propose an effective unsupervised contrastive learning paradigm for image dehazing, dubbed UCL-Dehaze. Unpaired real-world clean and hazy images are easily captured, and will serve as the important positive and negative samples respectively when training our UCL-Dehaze network. To train the network more effectively, we formulate a new self-contrastive perceptual loss function, which encourages the restored images to approach the positive samples and keep away from the negative samples in the embedding space. Besides the overall network architecture of UCL-Dehaze, adversarial training is utilized to align the distributions between the positive samples and the dehazed images. Compared with recent image dehazing works, UCL-Dehaze does not require paired data during training and utilizes unpaired positive/negative data to better enhance the dehazing performance. We conduct comprehensive experiments to evaluate our UCL-Dehaze and demonstrate its superiority over the state-of-the-arts, even only 1,800 unpaired real-world images are used to train our network. Source code has been available at https://github.com/yz-wang/UCL-Dehaze. 虽然在合成模糊数据上训练图像去雾模型的智慧可以减轻收集现实世界的模糊/干净图像对的难度，但它带来了众所周知的域转移问题。本文从不同但新的角度出发，通过对抗性训练探索对比学习，以利用不成对的现实世界雾霾和干净图像，从而避免弥合合成雾霾和现实世界雾霾之间的差距。我们提出了一种有效的无监督对比学习范式用于图像去雾，称为 UCL-Dehaze。不成对的真实世界的干净和模糊图像很容易被捕获，并且在训练我们的 UCL-Dehaze 网络时将分别作为重要的正样本和负样本。为了更有效地训练网络，我们制定了一种新的自对比感知损失函数，它鼓励恢复的图像在嵌入空间中接近正样本并远离负样本。除了 UCL-Dehaze 的整体网络架构之外，还利用对抗性训练来对齐正样本和去雾图像之间的分布。与最近的图像去雾工作相比，UCL-Dehaze 在训练过程中不需要配对数据，并利用不成对的正/负数据来更好地增强去雾性能。我们进行了全面的实验来评估我们的 UCL-Dehaze 并证明其相对于最先进技术的优越性，即使只使用 1,800 个未配对的真实世界图像来训练我们的网络。源代码已在 https://github.com/yz-wang/UCL-Dehaze 上提供。 本文提出了一种基于无监督对比学习的图像去雾方法UCL-Dehaze，利用未配对的真实世界雾霾和清晰图像进行训练，避免了合成数据与真实场景间的领域偏移问题。 Yongzhen Wang,Xuefeng Yan,Fu Lee Wang,Haoran Xie,Wenhan Yang,Mingqiang Wei,Jing Qin cs.CV

authors_text: Max Kapur,Sung-Pil Hong
title: The College Application Problem
title_zh: 大学申请问题
comment: 31 pages, 3 figures. We welcome comments. Corrected URL in references
comments: 31 pages, 3 figures. We welcome comments. Corrected URL in references
abstract: This paper considers the maximization of the expected maximum value of a portfolio of random variables subject to a budget constraint. We refer to this as the optimal college application problem. When each variable's cost, or each college's application fee, is identical, we show that the optimal portfolios are nested in the budget constraint, yielding an exact polynomial-time algorithm. When colleges differ in their application fees, we show that the problem is NP-complete. We provide four algorithms for this more general setup: a branch-and-bound routine, a dynamic program that produces an exact solution in pseudopolynomial time, a different dynamic program that yields a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme, and a simulated-annealing heuristic. Numerical experiments demonstrate the algorithms' accuracy and efficiency.
summary: This paper considers the maximization of the expected maximum value of a portfolio of random variables subject to a budget constraint. We refer to this as the optimal college application problem. When each variable's cost, or each college's application fee, is identical, we show that the optimal portfolios are nested in the budget constraint, yielding an exact polynomial-time algorithm. When colleges differ in their application fees, we show that the problem is NP-complete. We provide four algorithms for this more general setup: a branch-and-bound routine, a dynamic program that produces an exact solution in pseudopolynomial time, a different dynamic program that yields a fully polynomial-time approximation scheme, and a simulated-annealing heuristic. Numerical experiments demonstrate the algorithms' accuracy and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑在预算约束下最大化随机变量投资组合的预期最大值。我们将此称为最优大学申请问题。当每个变量的成本或每个大学的申请费相同时，我们表明最佳投资组合嵌套在预算约束中，从而产生精确的多项式时间算法。当大学的申请费不同时，我们表明问题是 NP 完全的。我们为这种更通用的设置提供了四种算法：分支定界例程、在伪多项式时间内产生精确解的动态程序、产生完全多项式时间近似方案的不同动态程序以及模拟退火启发式。数值实验证明了算法的准确性和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在预算约束下最大化随机变量组合预期最大值的最优大学申请问题。
AI.motivation: 大学申请涉及有限预算下的资源分配决策，需在不同费用和收益的选项中寻找最优组合。
AI.method: 当申请费相同时，利用嵌套结构设计多项式时间算法；当费用不同时，提出分支定界、动态规划（伪多项式时间及全多项式近似方案）和模拟退火四种算法。
AI.result: 证明费用相同问题可多项式求解，费用不同问题为NP完全；四种算法在数值实验中展现准确性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 预算约束下的大学申请问题在不同费用条件下呈现差异性复杂度，所提算法为实际应用提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Uichin Lee,Gyuwon Jung,Eun-Yeol Ma,Jin San Kim,Heepyung Kim,Jumabek Alikhanov,Youngtae Noh,Heeyoung Kim
title: Toward Data-Driven Digital Therapeutics Analytics: Literature Review and Research Directions
title_zh: 迈向数据驱动的数字治疗分析：文献综述和研究方向
comment: This paper has been accepted by the IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica
comments: This paper has been accepted by the IEEE/CAA Journal of Automatica Sinica
abstract: With the advent of Digital Therapeutics (DTx), the development of software as a medical device (SaMD) for mobile and wearable devices has gained significant attention in recent years. Existing DTx evaluations, such as randomized clinical trials, mostly focus on verifying the effectiveness of DTx products. To acquire a deeper understanding of DTx engagement and behavioral adherence, beyond efficacy, a large amount of contextual and interaction data from mobile and wearable devices during field deployment would be required for analysis. In this work, the overall flow of the data-driven DTx analytics is reviewed to help researchers and practitioners to explore DTx datasets, to investigate contextual patterns associated with DTx usage, and to establish the (causal) relationship of DTx engagement and behavioral adherence. This review of the key components of data-driven analytics provides novel research directions in the analysis of mobile sensor and interaction datasets, which helps to iteratively improve the receptivity of existing DTx.
summary: With the advent of Digital Therapeutics (DTx), the development of software as a medical device (SaMD) for mobile and wearable devices has gained significant attention in recent years. Existing DTx evaluations, such as randomized clinical trials, mostly focus on verifying the effectiveness of DTx products. To acquire a deeper understanding of DTx engagement and behavioral adherence, beyond efficacy, a large amount of contextual and interaction data from mobile and wearable devices during field deployment would be required for analysis. In this work, the overall flow of the data-driven DTx analytics is reviewed to help researchers and practitioners to explore DTx datasets, to investigate contextual patterns associated with DTx usage, and to establish the (causal) relationship of DTx engagement and behavioral adherence. This review of the key components of data-driven analytics provides novel research directions in the analysis of mobile sensor and interaction datasets, which helps to iteratively improve the receptivity of existing DTx.
abstract_zh: 随着数字治疗（DTx）的出现，移动和可穿戴设备的软件即医疗设备（SaMD）的开发近年来引起了极大的关注。现有的DTx评估，例如随机临床试验，大多侧重于验证DTx产品的有效性。为了更深入地了解 DTx 参与度和行为依从性，除了功效之外，还需要在现场部署期间来自移动和可穿戴设备的大量上下文和交互数据进行分析。在这项工作中，回顾了数据驱动的 DTx 分析的整体流程，以帮助研究人员和从业者探索 DTx 数据集，调查与 DTx 使用相关的上下文模式，并建立 DTx 参与和行为依从性的（因果）关系。对数据驱动分析关键组成部分的回顾为移动传感器和交互数据集的分析提供了新颖的研究方向，这有助于迭代提高现有 DTx 的接收能力。

AI.tldr: 本文通过文献综述和研究方向探讨数据驱动的数字治疗分析方法，以深入理解DTx用户参与度和行为依从性。
AI.motivation: 现有DTx评估方法（如随机临床试验）仅关注产品有效性，缺乏对使用过程中上下文和交互数据的深度分析，难以全面优化DTx效果。
AI.method: 回顾数据驱动DTx分析的整体流程，分析移动和可穿戴设备采集的上下文及交互数据，探索使用模式并建立因果关系。
AI.result: 提出移动传感器和交互数据集分析的新研究方向，为迭代改进DTx接受度提供理论支持。
AI.conclusion: 数据驱动分析是深化DTx效果评估的关键，未来需结合多源数据挖掘行为模式以优化治疗方案。

authors_text: Chenyu Zhang,Benjamin Van Durme,Zhuowan Li,Elias Stengel-Eskin
title: Visual Commonsense in Pretrained Unimodal and Multimodal Models
title_zh: 预训练单峰和多峰模型中的视觉常识
abstract: Our commonsense knowledge about objects includes their typical visual attributes; we know that bananas are typically yellow or green, and not purple. Text and image corpora, being subject to reporting bias, represent this world-knowledge to varying degrees of faithfulness. In this paper, we investigate to what degree unimodal (language-only) and multimodal (image and language) models capture a broad range of visually salient attributes. To that end, we create the Visual Commonsense Tests (ViComTe) dataset covering 5 property types (color, shape, material, size, and visual co-occurrence) for over 5000 subjects. We validate this dataset by showing that our grounded color data correlates much better than ungrounded text-only data with crowdsourced color judgments provided by Paik et al. (2021). We then use our dataset to evaluate pretrained unimodal models and multimodal models. Our results indicate that multimodal models better reconstruct attribute distributions, but are still subject to reporting bias. Moreover, increasing model size does not enhance performance, suggesting that the key to visual commonsense lies in the data.
summary: Our commonsense knowledge about objects includes their typical visual attributes; we know that bananas are typically yellow or green, and not purple. Text and image corpora, being subject to reporting bias, represent this world-knowledge to varying degrees of faithfulness. In this paper, we investigate to what degree unimodal (language-only) and multimodal (image and language) models capture a broad range of visually salient attributes. To that end, we create the Visual Commonsense Tests (ViComTe) dataset covering 5 property types (color, shape, material, size, and visual co-occurrence) for over 5000 subjects. We validate this dataset by showing that our grounded color data correlates much better than ungrounded text-only data with crowdsourced color judgments provided by Paik et al. (2021). We then use our dataset to evaluate pretrained unimodal models and multimodal models. Our results indicate that multimodal models better reconstruct attribute distributions, but are still subject to reporting bias. Moreover, increasing model size does not enhance performance, suggesting that the key to visual commonsense lies in the data.
abstract_zh: 我们关于物体的常识知识包括它们典型的视觉属性；我们知道香蕉通常是黄色或绿色的，而不是紫色的。文本和图像语料库受到报道偏见的影响，以不同程度的忠实度代表了这种世界知识。在本文中，我们研究了单模态（仅语言）和多模态（图像和语言）模型在多大程度上捕获了广泛的视觉显着属性。为此，我们为超过 5000 名受试者创建了涵盖 5 种属性类型（颜色、形状、材质、大小和视觉共现）的视觉常识测试 (ViComTe) 数据集。我们通过表明我们的接地颜色数据与 Paik 等人提供的众包颜色判断的相关性比未接地的纯文本数据更好，从而验证了该数据集。 （2021）。然后，我们使用数据集来评估预训练的单峰模型和多峰模型。我们的结果表明，多模态模型可以更好地重建属性分布，但仍然会受到报告偏差的影响。此外，增加模型大小并不能提高性能，这表明视觉常识的关键在于数据。

AI.tldr: 该论文研究预训练单模态和多模态模型在捕捉视觉常识属性（如颜色、形状等）方面的能力，通过构建ViComTe数据集进行评估。
AI.motivation: 现有模型可能因数据偏差导致视觉常识理解不足，而系统性评估工具和方法尚未完善，需探索模型与数据的关系。
AI.method: 构建覆盖5类视觉属性的ViComTe数据集（5000+主体），验证其与人类判断的相关性，并评估单模态/多模态模型在属性重建任务中的表现。
AI.result: 多模态模型优于单模态模型，但均受数据偏差影响；模型规模扩大未提升性能，表明数据质量是视觉常识建模的关键。
AI.conclusion: 多模态模型更擅长捕捉视觉常识，但突破需依赖高质量数据而非单纯扩大模型规模，未来应重视数据偏差的缓解。

authors_text: Jinhao Jiang,Kun Zhou,Wayne Xin Zhao,Ji-Rong Wen
title: Great Truths are Always Simple: A Rather Simple Knowledge Encoder for Enhancing the Commonsense Reasoning Capacity of Pre-Trained Models
title_zh: 伟大的真理总是简单的：一个相当简单的知识编码器，用于增强预训练模型的常识推理能力
abstract: Commonsense reasoning in natural language is a desired ability of artificial intelligent systems. For solving complex commonsense reasoning tasks, a typical solution is to enhance pre-trained language models~(PTMs) with a knowledge-aware graph neural network~(GNN) encoder that models a commonsense knowledge graph~(CSKG). Despite the effectiveness, these approaches are built on heavy architectures, and can't clearly explain how external knowledge resources improve the reasoning capacity of PTMs. Considering this issue, we conduct a deep empirical analysis, and find that it is indeed relation features from CSKGs (but not node features) that mainly contribute to the performance improvement of PTMs. Based on this finding, we design a simple MLP-based knowledge encoder that utilizes statistical relation paths as features. Extensive experiments conducted on five benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, which also largely reduces the parameters for encoding CSKGs. Our codes and data are publicly available at https://github.com/RUCAIBox/SAFE.
summary: Commonsense reasoning in natural language is a desired ability of artificial intelligent systems. For solving complex commonsense reasoning tasks, a typical solution is to enhance pre-trained language models~(PTMs) with a knowledge-aware graph neural network~(GNN) encoder that models a commonsense knowledge graph~(CSKG). Despite the effectiveness, these approaches are built on heavy architectures, and can't clearly explain how external knowledge resources improve the reasoning capacity of PTMs. Considering this issue, we conduct a deep empirical analysis, and find that it is indeed relation features from CSKGs (but not node features) that mainly contribute to the performance improvement of PTMs. Based on this finding, we design a simple MLP-based knowledge encoder that utilizes statistical relation paths as features. Extensive experiments conducted on five benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach, which also largely reduces the parameters for encoding CSKGs. Our codes and data are publicly available at https://github.com/RUCAIBox/SAFE.
abstract_zh: 自然语言的常识推理是人工智能系统所需的能力。为了解决复杂的常识推理任务，一个典型的解决方案是使用知识感知图神经网络（GNN）编码器来增强预先训练的语言模型（PTM），该编码器对常识知识图（CSKG）进行建模。尽管有效，但这些方法建立在重型架构之上，无法清楚地解释外部知识资源如何提高 PTM 的推理能力。考虑到这个问题，我们进行了深入的实证分析，发现确实是 CSKG 中的关系特征（而不是节点特征）对 PTM 的性能提升做出了主要贡献。基于这一发现，我们设计了一个简单的基于 MLP 的知识编码器，它利用统计关系路径作为特征。在五个基准上进行的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性，这也大大减少了编码 CSKG 的参数。我们的代码和数据可在 https://github.com/RUCAIBox/SAFE 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于统计关系路径的简单MLP知识编码器，用于增强预训练模型的常识推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有基于GNN的复杂架构难以解释外部知识如何提升预训练模型推理能力，且参数冗余。
AI.method: 设计轻量MLP编码器，通过统计关系路径特征替代传统GNN节点特征进行知识编码。
AI.result: 在五个常识推理基准测试中取得优异效果，参数量较传统方法显著减少。
AI.conclusion: 关系特征是常识推理性能提升的关键，简单编码器可有效替代复杂GNN结构。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于统计关系路径的简单MLP知识编码器，用于增强预训练模型的常识推理能力。

authors_text: Jeffry Wicaksana,Zengqiang Yan,Dong Zhang,Xijie Huang,Huimin Wu,Xin Yang,Kwang-Ting Cheng
title: FedMix: Mixed Supervised Federated Learning for Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: FedMix：用于医学图像分割的混合监督联合学习
abstract: The purpose of federated learning is to enable multiple clients to jointly train a machine learning model without sharing data. However, the existing methods for training an image segmentation model have been based on an unrealistic assumption that the training set for each local client is annotated in a similar fashion and thus follows the same image supervision level. To relax this assumption, in this work, we propose a label-agnostic unified federated learning framework, named FedMix, for medical image segmentation based on mixed image labels. In FedMix, each client updates the federated model by integrating and effectively making use of all available labeled data ranging from strong pixel-level labels, weak bounding box labels, to weakest image-level class labels. Based on these local models, we further propose an adaptive weight assignment procedure across local clients, where each client learns an aggregation weight during the global model update. Compared to the existing methods, FedMix not only breaks through the constraint of a single level of image supervision, but also can dynamically adjust the aggregation weight of each local client, achieving rich yet discriminative feature representations. To evaluate its effectiveness, experiments have been carried out on two challenging medical image segmentation tasks, i.e., breast tumor segmentation and skin lesion segmentation. The results validate that our proposed FedMix outperforms the state-of-the-art method by a large margin.
summary: The purpose of federated learning is to enable multiple clients to jointly train a machine learning model without sharing data. However, the existing methods for training an image segmentation model have been based on an unrealistic assumption that the training set for each local client is annotated in a similar fashion and thus follows the same image supervision level. To relax this assumption, in this work, we propose a label-agnostic unified federated learning framework, named FedMix, for medical image segmentation based on mixed image labels. In FedMix, each client updates the federated model by integrating and effectively making use of all available labeled data ranging from strong pixel-level labels, weak bounding box labels, to weakest image-level class labels. Based on these local models, we further propose an adaptive weight assignment procedure across local clients, where each client learns an aggregation weight during the global model update. Compared to the existing methods, FedMix not only breaks through the constraint of a single level of image supervision, but also can dynamically adjust the aggregation weight of each local client, achieving rich yet discriminative feature representations. To evaluate its effectiveness, experiments have been carried out on two challenging medical image segmentation tasks, i.e., breast tumor segmentation and skin lesion segmentation. The results validate that our proposed FedMix outperforms the state-of-the-art method by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习的目的是使多个客户端能够在不共享数据的情况下联合训练机器学习模型。然而，现有的训练图像分割模型的方法基于一个不切实际的假设，即每个本地客户端的训练集以类似的方式注释，因此遵循相同的图像监督级别。为了放松这一假设，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种与标签无关的统一联邦学习框架，名为 FedMix，用于基于混合图像标签的医学图像分割。在 FedMix 中，每个客户端通过集成和有效利用所有可用的标记数据（从强像素级标签、弱边界框标签到最弱图像级类标签）来更新联合模型。基于这些本地模型，我们进一步提出了跨本地客户端的自适应权重分配过程，其中每个客户端在全局模型更新期间学习聚合权重。与现有方法相比，FedMix不仅突破了单一级别图像监督的约束，而且可以动态调整每个本地客户端的聚合权重，实现丰富而有区别的特征表示。为了评估其有效性，对两个具有挑战性的医学图像分割任务（即乳腺肿瘤分割和皮肤病变分割）进行了实验。结果验证了我们提出的 FedMix 的性能大幅优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FedMix框架，通过混合监督联邦学习解决医疗图像分割中不同客户端标签不一致的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习方法假设各客户端标注方式一致，但实际医疗数据存在像素级、边界框级和图像级等多级别标签差异，需更灵活的框架。
AI.method: FedMix整合各客户端所有可用标签数据，通过动态调整聚合权重实现模型更新，支持从强到弱的多级别标签联合训练。
AI.result: 在乳腺肿瘤分割和皮肤病变分割任务中，FedMix显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FedMix通过混合监督和动态权重分配有效解决了医疗图像分割中的标签异构性问题，提升了联邦学习性能。

ai_content.result: 在乳腺肿瘤分割和皮肤病变分割任务中，FedMix显著优于现有最先进方法。
ai_content.conclusion: FedMix通过混合监督和动态权重分配有效解决了医疗图像分割中的标签异构性问题，提升了联邦学习性能。

search_text: FedMix: Mixed Supervised Federated Learning for Medical Image Segmentation FedMix：用于医学图像分割的混合监督联合学习 The purpose of federated learning is to enable multiple clients to jointly train a machine learning model without sharing data. However, the existing methods for training an image segmentation model have been based on an unrealistic assumption that the training set for each local client is annotated in a similar fashion and thus follows the same image supervision level. To relax this assumption, in this work, we propose a label-agnostic unified federated learning framework, named FedMix, for medical image segmentation based on mixed image labels. In FedMix, each client updates the federated model by integrating and effectively making use of all available labeled data ranging from strong pixel-level labels, weak bounding box labels, to weakest image-level class labels. Based on these local models, we further propose an adaptive weight assignment procedure across local clients, where each client learns an aggregation weight during the global model update. Compared to the existing methods, FedMix not only breaks through the constraint of a single level of image supervision, but also can dynamically adjust the aggregation weight of each local client, achieving rich yet discriminative feature representations. To evaluate its effectiveness, experiments have been carried out on two challenging medical image segmentation tasks, i.e., breast tumor segmentation and skin lesion segmentation. The results validate that our proposed FedMix outperforms the state-of-the-art method by a large margin. 联邦学习的目的是使多个客户端能够在不共享数据的情况下联合训练机器学习模型。然而，现有的训练图像分割模型的方法基于一个不切实际的假设，即每个本地客户端的训练集以类似的方式注释，因此遵循相同的图像监督级别。为了放松这一假设，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种与标签无关的统一联邦学习框架，名为 FedMix，用于基于混合图像标签的医学图像分割。在 FedMix 中，每个客户端通过集成和有效利用所有可用的标记数据（从强像素级标签、弱边界框标签到最弱图像级类标签）来更新联合模型。基于这些本地模型，我们进一步提出了跨本地客户端的自适应权重分配过程，其中每个客户端在全局模型更新期间学习聚合权重。与现有方法相比，FedMix不仅突破了单一级别图像监督的约束，而且可以动态调整每个本地客户端的聚合权重，实现丰富而有区别的特征表示。为了评估其有效性，对两个具有挑战性的医学图像分割任务（即乳腺肿瘤分割和皮肤病变分割）进行了实验。结果验证了我们提出的 FedMix 的性能大幅优于最先进的方法。 本文提出FedMix框架，通过混合监督联邦学习解决医疗图像分割中不同客户端标签不一致的问题。 Jeffry Wicaksana,Zengqiang Yan,Dong Zhang,Xijie Huang,Huimin Wu,Xin Yang,Kwang-Ting Cheng cs.CV

authors_text: Angel Daruna,Devleena Das,Sonia Chernova
title: Explainable Knowledge Graph Embedding: Inference Reconciliation for Knowledge Inferences Supporting Robot Actions
title_zh: 可解释的知识图嵌入：支持机器人动作的知识推理的推理协调
abstract: Learned knowledge graph representations supporting robots contain a wealth of domain knowledge that drives robot behavior. However, there does not exist an inference reconciliation framework that expresses how a knowledge graph representation affects a robot's sequential decision making. We use a pedagogical approach to explain the inferences of a learned, black-box knowledge graph representation, a knowledge graph embedding. Our interpretable model, uses a decision tree classifier to locally approximate the predictions of the black-box model, and provides natural language explanations interpretable by non-experts. Results from our algorithmic evaluation affirm our model design choices, and the results of our user studies with non-experts support the need for the proposed inference reconciliation framework. Critically, results from our simulated robot evaluation indicate that our explanations enable non-experts to correct erratic robot behaviors due to nonsensical beliefs within the black-box.
summary: Learned knowledge graph representations supporting robots contain a wealth of domain knowledge that drives robot behavior. However, there does not exist an inference reconciliation framework that expresses how a knowledge graph representation affects a robot's sequential decision making. We use a pedagogical approach to explain the inferences of a learned, black-box knowledge graph representation, a knowledge graph embedding. Our interpretable model, uses a decision tree classifier to locally approximate the predictions of the black-box model, and provides natural language explanations interpretable by non-experts. Results from our algorithmic evaluation affirm our model design choices, and the results of our user studies with non-experts support the need for the proposed inference reconciliation framework. Critically, results from our simulated robot evaluation indicate that our explanations enable non-experts to correct erratic robot behaviors due to nonsensical beliefs within the black-box.
abstract_zh: 支持机器人的学习知识图表示包含驱动机器人行为的丰富领域知识。然而，不存在一个推理协调框架来表达知识图表示如何影响机器人的顺序决策。我们使用教学方法来解释学习的黑盒知识图表示（知识图嵌入）的推论。我们的可解释模型使用决策树分类器来局部近似黑盒模型的预测，并提供非专家可解释的自然语言解释。我们的算法评估结果证实了我们的模型设计选择，并且我们与非专家的用户研究结果支持了对所提出的推理协调框架的需求。至关重要的是，我们的模拟机器人评估结果表明，我们的解释使非专家能够纠正由于黑匣子内无意义的信念而导致的不稳定的机器人行为。

AI.tldr: 开发可解释的知识图谱嵌入框架，用于协调机器人行动中的知识推理
AI.motivation: 现有知识图谱表示缺乏推理协调框架，导致机器人决策不透明，难以被非专家理解和修正
AI.method: 采用决策树分类器局部近似黑箱知识图谱嵌入模型，并生成自然语言解释以增强可解释性
AI.result: 算法评估和用户研究验证了模型有效性，模拟实验表明解释能帮助非专家修正机器人异常行为
AI.conclusion: 提出的推理协调框架有效提升了机器人决策的可解释性，支持非专家参与修正异常行为

authors_text: Anirudh Mittal,Yufei Tian,Nanyun Peng
title: AmbiPun: Generating Humorous Puns with Ambiguous Context
title_zh: AmbiPun：在上下文模糊的情况下生成幽默双关语
abstract: In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective way to generate pun sentences that does not require any training on existing puns. Our approach is inspired by humor theories that ambiguity comes from the context rather than the pun word itself. Given a pair of definitions of a pun word, our model first produces a list of related concepts through a reverse dictionary. We then utilize one-shot GPT3 to generate context words and then generate puns incorporating context words from both concepts. Human evaluation shows that our method successfully generates pun 52\% of the time, outperforming well-crafted baselines and the state-of-the-art models by a large margin.
summary: In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective way to generate pun sentences that does not require any training on existing puns. Our approach is inspired by humor theories that ambiguity comes from the context rather than the pun word itself. Given a pair of definitions of a pun word, our model first produces a list of related concepts through a reverse dictionary. We then utilize one-shot GPT3 to generate context words and then generate puns incorporating context words from both concepts. Human evaluation shows that our method successfully generates pun 52\% of the time, outperforming well-crafted baselines and the state-of-the-art models by a large margin.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法来生成双关语句子，不需要对现有双关语进行任何训练。我们的方法受到幽默理论的启发，即歧义来自上下文而不是双关语本身。给定一对双关词的定义，我们的模型首先通过反向词典生成​​相关概念的列表。然后，我们利用一次性 GPT3 生成上下文单词，然后生成包含两个概念的上下文单词的双关语。人类评估表明，我们的方法在 52% 的时间内成功生成双关语，大大优于精心设计的基线和最先进的模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练现有双关语即可生成幽默双关语的新方法，通过利用上下文歧义而非双关词本身实现生成。
AI.motivation: 传统双关语生成方法依赖训练数据，而幽默理论表明歧义主要源于上下文而非词汇本身，因此提出无需训练数据的新方法。
AI.method: 通过反向词典获取双关词的关联概念，利用one-shot GPT3生成上下文词，并结合两组概念生成双关语。
AI.result: 人工评估显示该方法成功生成双关语52%，显著优于精心设计的基线模型和现有最佳模型。
AI.conclusion: 基于上下文歧义的生成方法无需训练数据即可有效创造双关语，验证了幽默理论在生成任务中的可行性。

authors_text: Nathaniel Merrill,Yuliang Guo,Xingxing Zuo,Xinyu Huang,Stefan Leutenegger,Xi Peng,Liu Ren,Guoquan Huang
title: Symmetry and Uncertainty-Aware Object SLAM for 6DoF Object Pose Estimation
title_zh: 用于 6DoF 对象姿态估计的对称性和不确定性感知对象 SLAM
abstract: We propose a keypoint-based object-level SLAM framework that can provide globally consistent 6DoF pose estimates for symmetric and asymmetric objects alike. To the best of our knowledge, our system is among the first to utilize the camera pose information from SLAM to provide prior knowledge for tracking keypoints on symmetric objects -- ensuring that new measurements are consistent with the current 3D scene. Moreover, our semantic keypoint network is trained to predict the Gaussian covariance for the keypoints that captures the true error of the prediction, and thus is not only useful as a weight for the residuals in the system's optimization problems, but also as a means to detect harmful statistical outliers without choosing a manual threshold. Experiments show that our method provides competitive performance to the state of the art in 6DoF object pose estimation, and at a real-time speed. Our code, pre-trained models, and keypoint labels are available https://github.com/rpng/suo_slam.
summary: We propose a keypoint-based object-level SLAM framework that can provide globally consistent 6DoF pose estimates for symmetric and asymmetric objects alike. To the best of our knowledge, our system is among the first to utilize the camera pose information from SLAM to provide prior knowledge for tracking keypoints on symmetric objects -- ensuring that new measurements are consistent with the current 3D scene. Moreover, our semantic keypoint network is trained to predict the Gaussian covariance for the keypoints that captures the true error of the prediction, and thus is not only useful as a weight for the residuals in the system's optimization problems, but also as a means to detect harmful statistical outliers without choosing a manual threshold. Experiments show that our method provides competitive performance to the state of the art in 6DoF object pose estimation, and at a real-time speed. Our code, pre-trained models, and keypoint labels are available https://github.com/rpng/suo_slam.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于关键点的物体级 SLAM 框架，可以为对称和非对称物体提供全局一致的 6DoF 位姿估计。据我们所知，我们的系统是第一个利用 SLAM 的相机姿态信息来提供跟踪对称对象关键点的先验知识的系统之一，确保新的测量结果与当前 3D 场景一致。此外，我们的语义关键点网络经过训练，可以预测捕获预测真实误差的关键点的高斯协方差，因此不仅可用作系统优化问题中残差的权重，而且还可作为检测有害统计异常值的方法，而无需选择手动阈值。实验表明，我们的方法在 6DoF 对象姿态估计中以实时速度提供了与现有技术相比具有竞争力的性能。我们的代码、预训练模型和关键点标签可在 https://github.com/rpng/suo_slam 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于关键点的对象级SLAM框架，用于对称和非对称物体的6自由度姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理对称物体的姿态估计时存在不一致性，且难以实时处理。
AI.method: 提出了一种利用SLAM中的相机姿态信息作为先验知识的框架，并通过语义关键点网络预测关键点的高斯协方差以优化系统。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在6自由度对象姿态估计方面具有竞争力，并且能够实时运行。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了对称和非对称对象的6自由度姿态估计问题，并在实时性方面表现出色。

search_text: Symmetry and Uncertainty-Aware Object SLAM for 6DoF Object Pose Estimation 用于 6DoF 对象姿态估计的对称性和不确定性感知对象 SLAM We propose a keypoint-based object-level SLAM framework that can provide globally consistent 6DoF pose estimates for symmetric and asymmetric objects alike. To the best of our knowledge, our system is among the first to utilize the camera pose information from SLAM to provide prior knowledge for tracking keypoints on symmetric objects -- ensuring that new measurements are consistent with the current 3D scene. Moreover, our semantic keypoint network is trained to predict the Gaussian covariance for the keypoints that captures the true error of the prediction, and thus is not only useful as a weight for the residuals in the system's optimization problems, but also as a means to detect harmful statistical outliers without choosing a manual threshold. Experiments show that our method provides competitive performance to the state of the art in 6DoF object pose estimation, and at a real-time speed. Our code, pre-trained models, and keypoint labels are available https://github.com/rpng/suo_slam. 我们提出了一种基于关键点的物体级 SLAM 框架，可以为对称和非对称物体提供全局一致的 6DoF 位姿估计。据我们所知，我们的系统是第一个利用 SLAM 的相机姿态信息来提供跟踪对称对象关键点的先验知识的系统之一，确保新的测量结果与当前 3D 场景一致。此外，我们的语义关键点网络经过训练，可以预测捕获预测真实误差的关键点的高斯协方差，因此不仅可用作系统优化问题中残差的权重，而且还可作为检测有害统计异常值的方法，而无需选择手动阈值。实验表明，我们的方法在 6DoF 对象姿态估计中以实时速度提供了与现有技术相比具有竞争力的性能。我们的代码、预训练模型和关键点标签可在 https://github.com/rpng/suo_slam 获取。 本文提出了一种基于关键点的对象级SLAM框架，用于对称和非对称物体的6自由度姿态估计。 Nathaniel Merrill,Yuliang Guo,Xingxing Zuo,Xinyu Huang,Stefan Leutenegger,Xi Peng,Liu Ren,Guoquan Huang cs.RO

authors_text: Yufei Tian,Nanyun Peng
title: Zero-shot Sonnet Generation with Discourse-level Planning and Aesthetics Features
title_zh: 具有话语级规划和美学特征的零样本十四行诗生成
abstract: Poetry generation, and creative language generation in general, usually suffers from the lack of large training data. In this paper, we present a novel framework to generate sonnets that does not require training on poems. We design a hierarchical framework which plans the poem sketch before decoding. Specifically, a content planning module is trained on non-poetic texts to obtain discourse-level coherence; then a rhyme module generates rhyme words and a polishing module introduces imagery and similes for aesthetics purposes. Finally, we design a constrained decoding algorithm to impose the meter-and-rhyme constraint of the generated sonnets. Automatic and human evaluation show that our multi-stage approach without training on poem corpora generates more coherent, poetic, and creative sonnets than several strong baselines.
summary: Poetry generation, and creative language generation in general, usually suffers from the lack of large training data. In this paper, we present a novel framework to generate sonnets that does not require training on poems. We design a hierarchical framework which plans the poem sketch before decoding. Specifically, a content planning module is trained on non-poetic texts to obtain discourse-level coherence; then a rhyme module generates rhyme words and a polishing module introduces imagery and similes for aesthetics purposes. Finally, we design a constrained decoding algorithm to impose the meter-and-rhyme constraint of the generated sonnets. Automatic and human evaluation show that our multi-stage approach without training on poem corpora generates more coherent, poetic, and creative sonnets than several strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 诗歌生成和一般的创造性语言生成通常会受到缺乏大量训练数据的困扰。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来生成十四行诗，不需要诗歌训练。我们设计了一个分层框架，在解码之前规划诗歌草图。具体来说，内容规划模块在非诗歌文本上进行训练，以获得话语层面的连贯性；然后，押韵模块生成押韵词，润色模块出于美学目的引入图像和明喻。最后，我们设计了一种约束解码算法来对生成的十四行诗施加格律和韵律约束。自动和人工评估表明，我们的多阶段方法无需对诗歌语料库进行训练，就能比几个强大的基线生成更加连贯、富有诗意和创造性的十四行诗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练诗歌数据的十四行诗生成框架，通过话语级规划和美学特征实现零样本生成。
AI.motivation: 传统诗歌生成依赖大量训练数据，而诗歌语料稀缺且难以获取，需探索无需诗歌语料的生成方法。
AI.method: 设计分层框架：内容规划模块基于非诗歌文本确保连贯性，押韵模块生成押韵词，润色模块增强美学表现，结合约束解码满足格律要求。
AI.result: 自动评估和人工评价表明，该方法生成的十四行诗在连贯性、诗意和创造性上优于多个强基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 多阶段框架无需诗歌训练数据即可生成高质量十四行诗，验证了话语级规划与美学特征结合的有效性。

authors_text: Ziyi Yang,Yuwei Fang,Chenguang Zhu,Reid Pryzant,Dongdong Chen,Yu Shi,Yichong Xu,Yao Qian,Mei Gao,Yi-Ling Chen,Liyang Lu,Yujia Xie,Robert Gmyr,Noel Codella,Naoyuki Kanda,Bin Xiao,Lu Yuan,Takuya Yoshioka,Michael Zeng,Xuedong Huang
title: i-Code: An Integrative and Composable Multimodal Learning Framework
title_zh: i-Code：集成且可组合的多模式学习框架
abstract: Human intelligence is multimodal; we integrate visual, linguistic, and acoustic signals to maintain a holistic worldview. Most current pretraining methods, however, are limited to one or two modalities. We present i-Code, a self-supervised pretraining framework where users may flexibly combine the modalities of vision, speech, and language into unified and general-purpose vector representations. In this framework, data from each modality are first given to pretrained single-modality encoders. The encoder outputs are then integrated with a multimodal fusion network, which uses novel attention mechanisms and other architectural innovations to effectively combine information from the different modalities. The entire system is pretrained end-to-end with new objectives including masked modality unit modeling and cross-modality contrastive learning. Unlike previous research using only video for pretraining, the i-Code framework can dynamically process single, dual, and triple-modality data during training and inference, flexibly projecting different combinations of modalities into a single representation space. Experimental results demonstrate how i-Code can outperform state-of-the-art techniques on five video understanding tasks and the GLUE NLP benchmark, improving by as much as 11% and demonstrating the power of integrative multimodal pretraining.
summary: Human intelligence is multimodal; we integrate visual, linguistic, and acoustic signals to maintain a holistic worldview. Most current pretraining methods, however, are limited to one or two modalities. We present i-Code, a self-supervised pretraining framework where users may flexibly combine the modalities of vision, speech, and language into unified and general-purpose vector representations. In this framework, data from each modality are first given to pretrained single-modality encoders. The encoder outputs are then integrated with a multimodal fusion network, which uses novel attention mechanisms and other architectural innovations to effectively combine information from the different modalities. The entire system is pretrained end-to-end with new objectives including masked modality unit modeling and cross-modality contrastive learning. Unlike previous research using only video for pretraining, the i-Code framework can dynamically process single, dual, and triple-modality data during training and inference, flexibly projecting different combinations of modalities into a single representation space. Experimental results demonstrate how i-Code can outperform state-of-the-art techniques on five video understanding tasks and the GLUE NLP benchmark, improving by as much as 11% and demonstrating the power of integrative multimodal pretraining.
abstract_zh: 人类智能是多模式的；我们整合视觉、语言和听觉信号来维持整体的世界观。然而，大多数当前的预训练方法仅限于一种或两种模式。我们提出了 i-Code，一个自监督的预训练框架，用户可以灵活地将视觉、语音和语言模式组合成统一的通用向量表示。在此框架中，来自每种模态的数据首先被提供给预训练的单模态编码器。然后，编码器输出与多模态融合网络集成，该网络使用新颖的注意力机制和其他架构创新来有效地组合来自不同模态的信息。整个系统经过端到端预训练，新目标包括屏蔽模态单元建模和跨模态对比学习。与之前仅使用视频进行预训练的研究不同，i-Code 框架可以在训练和推理过程中动态处理单模态、双模态和三模态数据，灵活地将不同模态组合投影到单个表示空间中。实验结果展示了 i-Code 如何在五个视频理解任务和 GLUE NLP 基准上超越最先进的技术，提高多达 11%，并展示了集成多模态预训练的强大功能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出i-Code框架，通过整合视觉、语音和语言模态，实现灵活的多模态预训练。
AI.motivation: 当前预训练方法局限于单一或两模态，无法全面模拟人类多模态感知能力，需开发可动态组合多模态的统一表示框架。
AI.method: 采用预训练单模态编码器提取特征，通过多模态融合网络结合注意力机制与架构创新，引入掩码模态单元建模和跨模态对比学习目标，支持单/双/三模态动态处理。
AI.result: 在五个视频理解任务和GLUE基准测试中超越现有方法，最高提升11%。
AI.conclusion: 集成式多模态预训练能显著提升模型性能，验证了跨模态融合的有效性。

authors_text: Franz Klein,Shweta Mahajan,Stefan Roth
title: Diverse Image Captioning with Grounded Style
title_zh: 具有接地气风格的多样化图像标题
comment: In the 43rd DAGM German Conference on Pattern Recognition (GCPR) 2021
comments: In the 43rd DAGM German Conference on Pattern Recognition (GCPR) 2021
abstract: Stylized image captioning as presented in prior work aims to generate captions that reflect characteristics beyond a factual description of the scene composition, such as sentiments. Such prior work relies on given sentiment identifiers, which are used to express a certain global style in the caption, e.g. positive or negative, however without taking into account the stylistic content of the visual scene. To address this shortcoming, we first analyze the limitations of current stylized captioning datasets and propose COCO attribute-based augmentations to obtain varied stylized captions from COCO annotations. Furthermore, we encode the stylized information in the latent space of a Variational Autoencoder; specifically, we leverage extracted image attributes to explicitly structure its sequential latent space according to different localized style characteristics. Our experiments on the Senticap and COCO datasets show the ability of our approach to generate accurate captions with diversity in styles that are grounded in the image.
summary: Stylized image captioning as presented in prior work aims to generate captions that reflect characteristics beyond a factual description of the scene composition, such as sentiments. Such prior work relies on given sentiment identifiers, which are used to express a certain global style in the caption, e.g. positive or negative, however without taking into account the stylistic content of the visual scene. To address this shortcoming, we first analyze the limitations of current stylized captioning datasets and propose COCO attribute-based augmentations to obtain varied stylized captions from COCO annotations. Furthermore, we encode the stylized information in the latent space of a Variational Autoencoder; specifically, we leverage extracted image attributes to explicitly structure its sequential latent space according to different localized style characteristics. Our experiments on the Senticap and COCO datasets show the ability of our approach to generate accurate captions with diversity in styles that are grounded in the image.
abstract_zh: 先前的工作中提出的风格化图像字幕旨在生成反映场景组成的事实描述之外的特征的字幕，例如情感。此类先前的工作依赖于给定的情感标识符，这些标识符用于在标题中表达某种全局风格，例如积极或消极，但不考虑视觉场景的风格内容。为了解决这个缺点，我们首先分析当前风格化字幕数据集的局限性，并提出基于 COCO 属性的增强，以从 COCO 注释中获取各种风格化字幕。此外，我们在变分自动编码器的潜在空间中对风格化信息进行编码；具体来说，我们利用提取的图像属性根据不同的局部风格特征显式地构造其顺序潜在空间。我们在 Senticap 和 COCO 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法能够生成基于图像的风格多样性的准确标题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决现有风格化图像描述方法未能考虑视觉场景自身风格的问题，生成更准确且风格多样的描述。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖全局情感标签（如正面/负面），忽略图像本身的视觉风格特征，导致生成描述与图像内容关联不足。
AI.method: 提出基于COCO属性的数据增强策略，并通过变分自编码器（VAE）将图像属性编码到潜在空间，结构化生成符合局部风格特征的描述。
AI.result: 在Senticap和COCO数据集上验证，方法能生成更准确且风格多样的描述，且风格与图像内容紧密关联。
AI.conclusion: 结合图像属性与VAE潜在空间建模，可有效提升风格化图像描述的多样性与内容相关性。

authors_text: Athiya Deviyani
title: Assessing Dataset Bias in Computer Vision
title_zh: 评估计算机视觉中的数据集偏差
abstract: A biased dataset is a dataset that generally has attributes with an uneven class distribution. These biases have the tendency to propagate to the models that train on them, often leading to a poor performance in the minority class. In this project, we will explore the extent to which various data augmentation methods alleviate intrinsic biases within the dataset. We will apply several augmentation techniques on a sample of the UTKFace dataset, such as undersampling, geometric transformations, variational autoencoders (VAEs), and generative adversarial networks (GANs). We then trained a classifier for each of the augmented datasets and evaluated their performance on the native test set and on external facial recognition datasets. We have also compared their performance to the state-of-the-art attribute classifier trained on the FairFace dataset. Through experimentation, we were able to find that training the model on StarGAN-generated images led to the best overall performance. We also found that training on geometrically transformed images lead to a similar performance with a much quicker training time. Additionally, the best performing models also exhibit a uniform performance across the classes within each attribute. This signifies that the model was also able to mitigate the biases present in the baseline model that was trained on the original training set. Finally, we were able to show that our model has a better overall performance and consistency on age and ethnicity classification on multiple datasets when compared with the FairFace model. Our final model has an accuracy on the UTKFace test set of 91.75%, 91.30%, and 87.20% for the gender, age, and ethnicity attribute respectively, with a standard deviation of less than 0.1 between the accuracies of the classes of each attribute.
summary: A biased dataset is a dataset that generally has attributes with an uneven class distribution. These biases have the tendency to propagate to the models that train on them, often leading to a poor performance in the minority class. In this project, we will explore the extent to which various data augmentation methods alleviate intrinsic biases within the dataset. We will apply several augmentation techniques on a sample of the UTKFace dataset, such as undersampling, geometric transformations, variational autoencoders (VAEs), and generative adversarial networks (GANs). We then trained a classifier for each of the augmented datasets and evaluated their performance on the native test set and on external facial recognition datasets. We have also compared their performance to the state-of-the-art attribute classifier trained on the FairFace dataset. Through experimentation, we were able to find that training the model on StarGAN-generated images led to the best overall performance. We also found that training on geometrically transformed images lead to a similar performance with a much quicker training time. Additionally, the best performing models also exhibit a uniform performance across the classes within each attribute. This signifies that the model was also able to mitigate the biases present in the baseline model that was trained on the original training set. Finally, we were able to show that our model has a better overall performance and consistency on age and ethnicity classification on multiple datasets when compared with the FairFace model. Our final model has an accuracy on the UTKFace test set of 91.75%, 91.30%, and 87.20% for the gender, age, and ethnicity attribute respectively, with a standard deviation of less than 0.1 between the accuracies of the classes of each attribute.
abstract_zh: 有偏差的数据集是通常具有类别分布不均匀的属性的数据集。这些偏差有传播到训练它们的模型的倾向，通常会导致少数群体的表现不佳。在这个项目中，我们将探索各种数据增强方法减轻数据集中内在偏差的程度。我们将在 UTKFace 数据集的样本上应用多种增强技术，例如欠采样、几何变换、变分自动编码器 (VAE) 和生成对抗网络 (GAN)。然后，我们为每个增强数据集训练了一个分类器，并评估了它们在本机测试集和外部面部识别数据集上的性能。我们还将它们的性能与在 FairFace 数据集上训练的最先进的属性分类器进行了比较。通过实验，我们发现在 StarGAN 生成的图像上训练模型可以获得最佳的整体性能。我们还发现，对几何变换图像进行训练可以带来相似的性能，但训练时间要快得多。此外，性能最佳的模型在每个属性的各个类别中也表现出统一的性能。这意味着该模型还能够减轻在原始训练集上训练的基线模型中存在的偏差。最后，我们能够证明，与 FairFace 模型相比，我们的模型在多个数据集上的年龄和种族分类方面具有更好的整体性能和一致性。我们的最终模型在 UTKFace 测试集上的性别、年龄和种族属性的准确度分别为 91.75%、91.30% 和 87.20%，每个属性的类别准确度之间的标准差小于 0.1。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在评估数据增强方法在减少计算机视觉数据集偏差方面的效果，通过对比不同技术在UTKFace数据集上的表现。
AI.motivation: 数据集中的偏差会导致模型在少数类别上表现不佳，因此需要探索有效的方法来缓解这种偏差。
AI.method: 对UTKFace数据集应用欠采样、几何变换、变分自编码器（VAEs）和生成对抗网络（GANs）等增强技术，训练分类器并在原测试集和外部数据集上评估性能。
AI.result: 基于StarGAN生成的图像训练的模型表现最佳，几何变换方法训练时间更短。性别、年龄和种族分类准确率分别为91.75%、91.30%和87.20%，类别间准确率标准差小于0.1，优于FairFace模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的方法有效缓解了数据集偏差，模型在多个数据集上的分类性能和一致性均优于现有方法。

authors_text: Marco Valentino,André Freitas
title: Scientific Explanation and Natural Language: A Unified Epistemological-Linguistic Perspective for Explainable AI
title_zh: 科学解释和自然语言：可解释人工智能的统一认识论-语言学视角
abstract: A fundamental research goal for Explainable AI (XAI) is to build models that are capable of reasoning through the generation of natural language explanations. However, the methodologies to design and evaluate explanation-based inference models are still poorly informed by theoretical accounts on the nature of explanation. As an attempt to provide an epistemologically grounded characterisation for XAI, this paper focuses on the scientific domain, aiming to bridge the gap between theory and practice on the notion of a scientific explanation. Specifically, the paper combines a detailed survey of the modern accounts of scientific explanation in Philosophy of Science with a systematic analysis of corpora of natural language explanations, clarifying the nature and function of explanatory arguments from both a top-down (categorical) and a bottom-up (corpus-based) perspective. Through a mixture of quantitative and qualitative methodologies, the presented study allows deriving the following main conclusions: (1) Explanations cannot be entirely characterised in terms of inductive or deductive arguments as their main function is to perform unification; (2) An explanation must cite causes and mechanisms that are responsible for the occurrence of the event to be explained; (3) While natural language explanations possess an intrinsic causal-mechanistic nature, they are not limited to causes and mechanisms, also accounting for pragmatic elements such as definitions, properties and taxonomic relations; (4) Patterns of unification naturally emerge in corpora of explanations even if not intentionally modelled; (5) Unification is realised through a process of abstraction, whose function is to provide the inference substrate for subsuming the event to be explained under recurring patterns and high-level regularities.

Specifically, the paper combines a detailed survey of the modern accounts of scientific explanation in Philosophy of Science with a systematic analysis of corpora of natural language explanations, clarifying the nature and function of explanatory arguments from both a top-down (categorical) and a bottom-up (corpus-based) perspective. Through a mixture of quantitative and qualitative methodologies, the presented study allows deriving the following main conclusions: (1) Explanations cannot be entirely characterised in terms of inductive or deductive arguments as their main function is to perform unification; (2) An explanation must cite causes and mechanisms that are responsible for the occurrence of the event to be explained; (3) While natural language explanations possess an intrinsic causal-mechanistic nature, they are not limited to causes and mechanisms, also accounting for pragmatic elements such as definitions, properties and taxonomic relations; (4) Patterns of unification naturally emerge in corpora of explanations even if not intentionally modelled; (5) Unification is realised through a process of abstraction, whose function is to provide the inference substrate for subsuming the event to be explained under recurring patterns and high-level regularities.
abstract_zh: 可解释人工智能（XAI）的一个基本研究目标是构建能够通过生成自然语言解释进行推理的模型。然而，设计和评估基于解释的推理模型的方法仍然缺乏关于解释本质的理论解释。为了给 XAI 提供一个有认识论基础的表征，本文重点关注科学领域，旨在弥合科学解释概念上理论与实践之间的差距。具体来说，本文将科学哲学中对现代科学解释的详细考察与对自然语言解释语料库的系统分析相结合，从自上而下（分类）和自下而上（基于语料库）的角度阐明了解释性论证的性质和功能。通过定量和定性方法的结合，本研究可以得出以下主要结论：（1）解释不能完全用归纳或演绎论证来表征，因为它们的主要功能是进行统一； （二）解释必须列举所解释事件发生的原因和机制； （3）虽然自然语言解释具有内在的因果机制性质，但它们不仅限于原因和机制，还考虑了定义、属性和分类关系等语用要素； （4）统一模式自然地出现在解释语料库中，即使不是有意建模的； (5)统一是通过抽象过程实现的，抽象过程的作用是为将要解释的事件纳入循环模式和高级规律提供推理基础。

AI.tldr: 本文从认识论与语言学统一视角出发，探讨科学解释与自然语言的关系，旨在为可解释AI（XAI）构建理论基础并弥合科学解释理论与实践间的差距。
AI.motivation: 当前XAI方法论缺乏对科学解释本质的理论指导，需结合哲学理论与自然语言分析以完善解释性模型的构建与评估。
AI.method: 综合哲学科学解释理论与自然语言语料库分析，采用定量与定性混合方法，从自上而下（理论框架）和自下而上（语料实证）双视角研究解释机制。
AI.result: 揭示科学解释的核心在于统一性而非单纯归纳/演绎，需包含因果机制及语用元素；语料库中自然呈现统一模式，其通过抽象过程实现事件归类。
AI.conclusion: XAI需以统一性与抽象机制为核心构建解释框架，自然语言解释兼具因果性与语用性，未来研究应强化理论与数据驱动的结合。

search_text: Scientific Explanation and Natural Language: A Unified Epistemological-Linguistic Perspective for Explainable AI 科学解释和自然语言：可解释人工智能的统一认识论-语言学视角 A fundamental research goal for Explainable AI (XAI) is to build models that are capable of reasoning through the generation of natural language explanations. However, the methodologies to design and evaluate explanation-based inference models are still poorly informed by theoretical accounts on the nature of explanation. As an attempt to provide an epistemologically grounded characterisation for XAI, this paper focuses on the scientific domain, aiming to bridge the gap between theory and practice on the notion of a scientific explanation. Specifically, the paper combines a detailed survey of the modern accounts of scientific explanation in Philosophy of Science with a systematic analysis of corpora of natural language explanations, clarifying the nature and function of explanatory arguments from both a top-down (categorical) and a bottom-up (corpus-based) perspective. Through a mixture of quantitative and qualitative methodologies, the presented study allows deriving the following main conclusions: (1) Explanations cannot be entirely characterised in terms of inductive or deductive arguments as their main function is to perform unification; (2) An explanation must cite causes and mechanisms that are responsible for the occurrence of the event to be explained; (3) While natural language explanations possess an intrinsic causal-mechanistic nature, they are not limited to causes and mechanisms, also accounting for pragmatic elements such as definitions, properties and taxonomic relations; (4) Patterns of unification naturally emerge in corpora of explanations even if not intentionally modelled; (5) Unification is realised through a process of abstraction, whose function is to provide the inference substrate for subsuming the event to be explained under recurring patterns and high-level regularities. 可解释人工智能（XAI）的一个基本研究目标是构建能够通过生成自然语言解释进行推理的模型。然而，设计和评估基于解释的推理模型的方法仍然缺乏关于解释本质的理论解释。为了给 XAI 提供一个有认识论基础的表征，本文重点关注科学领域，旨在弥合科学解释概念上理论与实践之间的差距。具体来说，本文将科学哲学中对现代科学解释的详细考察与对自然语言解释语料库的系统分析相结合，从自上而下（分类）和自下而上（基于语料库）的角度阐明了解释性论证的性质和功能。通过定量和定性方法的结合，本研究可以得出以下主要结论：（1）解释不能完全用归纳或演绎论证来表征，因为它们的主要功能是进行统一； （二）解释必须列举所解释事件发生的原因和机制； （3）虽然自然语言解释具有内在的因果机制性质，但它们不仅限于原因和机制，还考虑了定义、属性和分类关系等语用要素； （4）统一模式自然地出现在解释语料库中，即使不是有意建模的； (5)统一是通过抽象过程实现的，抽象过程的作用是为将要解释的事件纳入循环模式和高级规律提供推理基础。 本文从认识论与语言学统一视角出发，探讨科学解释与自然语言的关系，旨在为可解释AI（XAI）构建理论基础并弥合科学解释理论与实践间的差距。 Marco Valentino,André Freitas cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Helei Duan,Ashish Malik,Mohitvishnu S. Gadde,Jeremy Dao,Alan Fern,Jonathan Hurst
title: Learning Dynamic Bipedal Walking Across Stepping Stones
title_zh: 学习动态双足行走踏脚石
abstract: In this work, we propose a learning approach for 3D dynamic bipedal walking when footsteps are constrained to stepping stones. While recent work has shown progress on this problem, real-world demonstrations have been limited to relatively simple open-loop, perception-free scenarios. Our main contribution is a more advanced learning approach that enables real-world demonstrations, using the Cassie robot, of closed-loop dynamic walking over moderately difficult stepping-stone patterns. Our approach first uses reinforcement learning (RL) in simulation to train a controller that maps footstep commands onto joint actions without any reference motion information. We then learn a model of that controller's capabilities, which enables prediction of feasible footsteps given the robot's current dynamic state. The resulting controller and model are then integrated with a real-time overhead camera system for detecting stepping stone locations. For evaluation, we develop a benchmark set of stepping stone patterns, which are used to test performance in both simulation and the real world. Overall, we demonstrate that sim-to-real learning is extremely promising for enabling dynamic locomotion over stepping stones. We also identify challenges remaining that motivate important future research directions.
summary: In this work, we propose a learning approach for 3D dynamic bipedal walking when footsteps are constrained to stepping stones. While recent work has shown progress on this problem, real-world demonstrations have been limited to relatively simple open-loop, perception-free scenarios. Our main contribution is a more advanced learning approach that enables real-world demonstrations, using the Cassie robot, of closed-loop dynamic walking over moderately difficult stepping-stone patterns. Our approach first uses reinforcement learning (RL) in simulation to train a controller that maps footstep commands onto joint actions without any reference motion information. We then learn a model of that controller's capabilities, which enables prediction of feasible footsteps given the robot's current dynamic state. The resulting controller and model are then integrated with a real-time overhead camera system for detecting stepping stone locations. For evaluation, we develop a benchmark set of stepping stone patterns, which are used to test performance in both simulation and the real world. Overall, we demonstrate that sim-to-real learning is extremely promising for enabling dynamic locomotion over stepping stones. We also identify challenges remaining that motivate important future research directions.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种当脚步被限制在垫脚石上时进行 3D 动态双足行走的学习方法。虽然最近的工作在这个问题上取得了进展，但现实世界的演示仅限于相对简单的开环、无感知场景。我们的主要贡献是一种更先进的学习方法，可以使用 Cassie 机器人在现实世界中演示在中等难度的垫脚石模式上进行闭环动态行走。我们的方法首先在模拟中使用强化学习（RL）来训练控制器，将脚步命令映射到关节动作上，而无需任何参考运动信息。然后，我们学习该控制器功能的模型，该模型可以根据机器人当前的动态状态预测可行的脚步。然后将所得的控制器和模型与实时高架摄像头系统集成，以检测踏脚石位置。为了进行评估，我们开发了一组基准模式，用于测试模拟和现实世界中的性能。总的来说，我们证明了模拟到真实的学习对于实现跨越垫脚石的动态运动非常有前景。我们还确定了仍然存在的挑战，这些挑战激发了未来的重要研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习方法，使双足机器人能够在受限的 stepping stones 上实现动态行走，并在真实世界中验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究在真实场景中仅能实现简单开环控制，缺乏复杂闭环动态行走能力，需更先进的方法应对实际挑战。
AI.method: 采用强化学习在仿真中训练控制器，结合动态状态预测可行脚步，并集成实时视觉系统检测 stepping stones 位置。
AI.result: 在仿真和真实环境（Cassie机器人）中验证了中等难度 stepping stone 模式的行走能力，证明 sim-to-real 学习的可行性。
AI.conclusion: sim-to-real 学习为动态越障行走提供新思路，但仍需解决现实环境中的未预见挑战以推动进一步研究。

Gadde,Jeremy Dao,Alan Fern,Jonathan Hurst cs.RO

authors_text: Emily R. Bartusiak,Edward J. Delp
title: Frequency Domain-Based Detection of Generated Audio
title_zh: 生成音频的基于频域的检测
comment: Accepted to the 2021 Media Watermarking, Security, and Forensics Conference, IS&T Electronic Imaging Symposium (EI)
comments: Accepted to the 2021 Media Watermarking, Security, and Forensics Conference, IS&T Electronic Imaging Symposium (EI)
abstract: Attackers may manipulate audio with the intent of presenting falsified reports, changing an opinion of a public figure, and winning influence and power. The prevalence of inauthentic multimedia continues to rise, so it is imperative to develop a set of tools that determines the legitimacy of media. We present a method that analyzes audio signals to determine whether they contain real human voices or fake human voices (i.e., voices generated by neural acoustic and waveform models). Instead of analyzing the audio signals directly, the proposed approach converts the audio signals into spectrogram images displaying frequency, intensity, and temporal content and evaluates them with a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Trained on both genuine human voice signals and synthesized voice signals, we show our approach achieves high accuracy on this classification task.
summary: Attackers may manipulate audio with the intent of presenting falsified reports, changing an opinion of a public figure, and winning influence and power. The prevalence of inauthentic multimedia continues to rise, so it is imperative to develop a set of tools that determines the legitimacy of media. We present a method that analyzes audio signals to determine whether they contain real human voices or fake human voices (i.e., voices generated by neural acoustic and waveform models). Instead of analyzing the audio signals directly, the proposed approach converts the audio signals into spectrogram images displaying frequency, intensity, and temporal content and evaluates them with a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Trained on both genuine human voice signals and synthesized voice signals, we show our approach achieves high accuracy on this classification task.
abstract_zh: 攻击者可能会操纵音频，目的是提供伪造的报告、改变公众人物的观点并赢得影响力和权力。不真实多媒体的盛行率持续上升，因此开发一套确定媒体合法性的工具势在必行。我们提出了一种分析音频信号的方法，以确定它们是否包含真实的人声或假人声（即由神经声学和波形模型生成的声音）。该方法不是直接分析音频信号，而是将音频信号转换为显示频率、强度和时间内容的频谱图图像，并使用卷积神经网络（CNN）对其进行评估。经过对真实人类语音信号和合成语音信号的训练，我们表明我们的方法在此分类任务上实现了高精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于频域分析的音频检测方法，通过将音频信号转换为频谱图并利用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行分类，以判断音频中是否包含真实人类声音或合成声音。
AI.motivation: 随着虚假多媒体内容的增多，攻击者可能通过操纵音频传播虚假信息或影响公众舆论，因此亟需开发工具来验证媒体真实性。
AI.method: 将音频信号转换为显示频率、强度和时域内容的频谱图，再通过训练在真实人声和合成人声数据集上的卷积神经网络进行分类。
AI.result: 该方法在真实与合成人声分类任务中表现出高准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效识别合成音频，为媒体真实性验证提供了可行的技术手段。

search_text: Frequency Domain-Based Detection of Generated Audio 生成音频的基于频域的检测 Attackers may manipulate audio with the intent of presenting falsified reports, changing an opinion of a public figure, and winning influence and power. The prevalence of inauthentic multimedia continues to rise, so it is imperative to develop a set of tools that determines the legitimacy of media. We present a method that analyzes audio signals to determine whether they contain real human voices or fake human voices (i.e., voices generated by neural acoustic and waveform models). Instead of analyzing the audio signals directly, the proposed approach converts the audio signals into spectrogram images displaying frequency, intensity, and temporal content and evaluates them with a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN). Trained on both genuine human voice signals and synthesized voice signals, we show our approach achieves high accuracy on this classification task. 攻击者可能会操纵音频，目的是提供伪造的报告、改变公众人物的观点并赢得影响力和权力。不真实多媒体的盛行率持续上升，因此开发一套确定媒体合法性的工具势在必行。我们提出了一种分析音频信号的方法，以确定它们是否包含真实的人声或假人声（即由神经声学和波形模型生成的声音）。该方法不是直接分析音频信号，而是将音频信号转换为显示频率、强度和时间内容的频谱图图像，并使用卷积神经网络（CNN）对其进行评估。经过对真实人类语音信号和合成语音信号的训练，我们表明我们的方法在此分类任务上实现了高精度。 本文提出一种基于频域分析的音频检测方法，通过将音频信号转换为频谱图并利用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行分类，以判断音频中是否包含真实人类声音或合成声音。 Emily R. Bartusiak,Edward J. Delp cs.SD,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Emily R. Bartusiak,Sri Kalyan Yarlagadda,David Güera,Paolo Bestagini,Stefano Tubaro,Fengqing M. Zhu,Edward J. Delp
title: Splicing Detection and Localization In Satellite Imagery Using Conditional GANs
title_zh: 使用条件 GAN 在卫星图像中进行拼接检测和定位
comment: Accepted to the 2019 IEEE Conference on Multimedia Information Processing and Retrieval (MIPR)
comments: Accepted to the 2019 IEEE Conference on Multimedia Information Processing and Retrieval (MIPR)
abstract: The widespread availability of image editing tools and improvements in image processing techniques allow image manipulation to be very easy. Oftentimes, easy-to-use yet sophisticated image manipulation tools yields distortions/changes imperceptible to the human observer. Distribution of forged images can have drastic ramifications, especially when coupled with the speed and vastness of the Internet. Therefore, verifying image integrity poses an immense and important challenge to the digital forensic community. Satellite images specifically can be modified in a number of ways, including the insertion of objects to hide existing scenes and structures. In this paper, we describe the use of a Conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) to identify the presence of such spliced forgeries within satellite images. Additionally, we identify their locations and shapes. Trained on pristine and falsified images, our method achieves high success on these detection and localization objectives.
summary: The widespread availability of image editing tools and improvements in image processing techniques allow image manipulation to be very easy. Oftentimes, easy-to-use yet sophisticated image manipulation tools yields distortions/changes imperceptible to the human observer. In this paper, we describe the use of a Conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) to identify the presence of such spliced forgeries within satellite images. Additionally, we identify their locations and shapes. Trained on pristine and falsified images, our method achieves high success on these detection and localization objectives.
abstract_zh: 图像编辑工具的广泛使用和图像处理技术的改进使得图像处理变得非常容易。通常，易于使用但复杂的图像处理工具会产生人类观察者难以察觉的扭曲/变化。伪造图像的传播可能会产生巨大的影响，尤其是与互联网的速度和规模相结合时。因此，验证图像完整性对数字取证界提出了巨大而重要的挑战。具体来说，卫星图像可以通过多种方式进行修改，包括插入对象以隐藏现有场景和结构。在本文中，我们描述了使用条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）来识别卫星图像中是否存在此类拼接伪造品。此外，我们还确定了它们的位置和形状。经过对原始图像和伪造图像的训练，我们的方法在这些检测和定位目标上取得了巨大成功。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）检测和定位卫星图像中的拼接伪造区域。
AI.motivation: 图像编辑工具的普及导致伪造图像传播风险增加，尤其卫星图像可能被篡改以隐藏场景或结构，威胁数字取证安全。
AI.method: 基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN），通过训练原始图像和伪造图像数据集，实现对卫星图像中拼接伪造的检测与定位。
AI.result: 该方法在拼接伪造检测和定位任务中表现出高准确率。
AI.conclusion: cGAN方法有效解决了卫星图像拼接伪造的检测与定位问题，为数字取证提供了新思路。

authors_text: Dinuka Ravijaya Piyadigama,Guhanathan Poravi
title: A Review on Pushing the Limits of Baseline Recommendation Systems with the integration of Opinion Mining & Information Retrieval Techniques
title_zh: 结合意见挖掘和信息检索技术突破基线推荐系统极限的综述
abstract: Recommendations Systems allow users to identify trending items among a community while being timely and relevant to the user's expectations. When the purpose of various Recommendation Systems differs, the required type of recommendations also differs for each use case. While one Recommendation System may focus on recommending popular items, another may focus on recommending items that are comparable to the user's interests. Content-based filtering, user-to-user & item-to-item Collaborative filtering, and more recently; Deep Learning methods have been brought forward by the researchers to achieve better quality recommendations. Even though each of these methods has proven to perform well individually, there have been attempts to push the boundaries of their limitations. Following a wide range of methods, researchers have tried to expand on the capabilities of standard recommendation systems to provide the most effective recommendations to users while being more profitable from a business's perspective. This has been achieved by taking a hybrid approach when building models and architectures for Recommendation Systems. This paper is a review of the novel models & architectures of hybrid Recommendation Systems. The author identifies possibilities of expanding the capabilities of baseline models & the advantages and drawbacks of each model with selected use cases in this review.
summary: Recommendations Systems allow users to identify trending items among a community while being timely and relevant to the user's expectations. When the purpose of various Recommendation Systems differs, the required type of recommendations also differs for each use case. The author identifies possibilities of expanding the capabilities of baseline models & the advantages and drawbacks of each model with selected use cases in this review.
abstract_zh: 推荐系统允许用户识别社区中的趋势项目，同时及时且与用户的期望相关。当各种推荐系统的目的不同时，每个用例所需的推荐类型也不同。虽然一种推荐系统可能专注于推荐流行的项目，但另一种推荐系统可能专注于推荐与用户兴趣相当的项目。基于内容的过滤、用户到用户和项目到项目的协作过滤，以及最近的更新；研究人员提出了深度学习方法来获得更好质量的推荐。尽管这些方法中的每一种都已被证明单独表现良好，但仍有人尝试突破其局限性。研究人员采用了多种方法，试图扩展标准推荐系统的功能，为用户提供最有效的推荐，同时从企业的角度来看更有利可图。这是通过在构建推荐系统的模型和架​​构时采用混合方法来实现的。本文是对混合推荐系统的新颖模型和架构的回顾。作者在本次审查中确定了扩展基线模型功能的可能性以及每个模型与选定用例的优点和缺点。

AI.tldr: 综述新型混合推荐系统模型与架构，探讨其扩展基线模型的能力及优缺点
AI.motivation: 现有推荐系统方法存在局限，需通过混合方法提升推荐效果及商业价值
AI.method: 采用文献综述法，分析混合推荐系统模型架构及应用案例，结合意见挖掘与信息检索技术
AI.result: 总结各混合模型的优缺点，指出扩展基线模型的潜力与适用场景
AI.conclusion: 混合方法有效提升推荐系统性能，未来需进一步整合意见挖掘与信息检索技术

authors_text: Emily R. Bartusiak,Edward J. Delp
title: Synthesized Speech Detection Using Convolutional Transformer-Based Spectrogram Analysis
title_zh: 使用基于卷积变换器的频谱图分析进行合成语音检测
comment: Accepted to the 2021 IEEE Asilomar Conference on Signals, Systems, and Computers
comments: Accepted to the 2021 IEEE Asilomar Conference on Signals, Systems, and Computers
abstract: Synthesized speech is common today due to the prevalence of virtual assistants, easy-to-use tools for generating and modifying speech signals, and remote work practices. Synthesized speech can also be used for nefarious purposes, including creating a purported speech signal and attributing it to someone who did not speak the content of the signal. We need methods to detect if a speech signal is synthesized. In this paper, we analyze speech signals in the form of spectrograms with a Compact Convolutional Transformer (CCT) for synthesized speech detection. A CCT utilizes a convolutional layer that introduces inductive biases and shared weights into a network, allowing a transformer architecture to perform well with fewer data samples used for training. The CCT uses an attention mechanism to incorporate information from all parts of a signal under analysis. Trained on both genuine human voice signals and synthesized human voice signals, we demonstrate that our CCT approach successfully differentiates between genuine and synthesized speech signals.
summary: Synthesized speech is common today due to the prevalence of virtual assistants, easy-to-use tools for generating and modifying speech signals, and remote work practices. Synthesized speech can also be used for nefarious purposes, including creating a purported speech signal and attributing it to someone who did not speak the content of the signal. We need methods to detect if a speech signal is synthesized. In this paper, we analyze speech signals in the form of spectrograms with a Compact Convolutional Transformer (CCT) for synthesized speech detection. A CCT utilizes a convolutional layer that introduces inductive biases and shared weights into a network, allowing a transformer architecture to perform well with fewer data samples used for training. The CCT uses an attention mechanism to incorporate information from all parts of a signal under analysis. Trained on both genuine human voice signals and synthesized human voice signals, we demonstrate that our CCT approach successfully differentiates between genuine and synthesized speech signals.
abstract_zh: 由于虚拟助手、用于生成和修改语音信号的易于使用的工具以及远程工作实践的盛行，合成语音如今很常见。合成语音也可用于邪恶目的，包括创建所谓的语音信号并将其归因于未说出该信号内容的人。我们需要方法来检测语音信号是否是合成的。在本文中，我们使用紧凑卷积变换器（CCT）以频谱图的形式分析语音信号，以进行合成语音检测。 CCT 利用卷积层将归纳偏差和共享权重引入网络，从而使 Transformer 架构能够在用于训练的数据样本较少的情况下表现良好。 CCT 使用注意力机制来整合所分析信号所有部分的信息。通过对真实人类语音信号和合成人类语音信号进行训练，我们证明了我们的 CCT 方法成功区分了真实语音信号和合成语音信号。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用紧凑卷积变换器（CCT）模型分析频谱图以检测合成语音信号。
AI.motivation: 合成语音可能被用于伪造音频内容，需开发有效检测方法以防止恶意使用。
AI.method: 基于卷积层与注意力机制的CCT模型，通过频谱图分析实现语音信号分类。
AI.result: 实验表明CCT能有效区分真实语音与合成语音信号，且在小样本训练下表现优异。
AI.conclusion: CCT模型为合成语音检测提供了高效且数据友好的解决方案。

authors_text: Samuel Triest,Matthew Sivaprakasam,Sean J. Wang,Wenshan Wang,Aaron M. Johnson,Sebastian Scherer
title: TartanDrive: A Large-Scale Dataset for Learning Off-Road Dynamics Models
title_zh: TartanDrive：用于学习越野动力学模型的大规模数据集
abstract: We present TartanDrive, a large scale dataset for learning dynamics models for off-road driving. We collected a dataset of roughly 200,000 off-road driving interactions on a modified Yamaha Viking ATV with seven unique sensing modalities in diverse terrains. To the authors' knowledge, this is the largest real-world multi-modal off-road driving dataset, both in terms of number of interactions and sensing modalities. We also benchmark several state-of-the-art methods for model-based reinforcement learning from high-dimensional observations on this dataset. We find that extending these models to multi-modality leads to significant performance on off-road dynamics prediction, especially in more challenging terrains. We also identify some shortcomings with current neural network architectures for the off-road driving task. Our dataset is available at https://github.com/castacks/tartan_drive.
summary: We present TartanDrive, a large scale dataset for learning dynamics models for off-road driving. We collected a dataset of roughly 200,000 off-road driving interactions on a modified Yamaha Viking ATV with seven unique sensing modalities in diverse terrains. To the authors' knowledge, this is the largest real-world multi-modal off-road driving dataset, both in terms of number of interactions and sensing modalities. We also benchmark several state-of-the-art methods for model-based reinforcement learning from high-dimensional observations on this dataset. We find that extending these models to multi-modality leads to significant performance on off-road dynamics prediction, especially in more challenging terrains. We also identify some shortcomings with current neural network architectures for the off-road driving task. Our dataset is available at https://github.com/castacks/tartan_drive.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 TartanDrive，这是一个用于学习越野驾驶动力学模型的大型数据集。我们收集了改装后的 Yamaha Viking ATV 上约 200,000 次越野驾驶交互的数据集，该车具有不同地形中的七种独特的传感模式。据作者所知，无论是在交互数量还是传感模式方面，这都是现实世界中最大的多模式越野驾驶数据集。我们还根据该数据集的高维观察对几种最先进的基于模型的强化学习方法进行了基准测试。我们发现，将这些模型扩展到多模态可以在越野动力学预测方面取得显着的性能，特别是在更具挑战性的地形中。我们还发现了当前越野驾驶任务神经网络架构的一些缺点。我们的数据集可从 https://github.com/castacks/tartan_drive 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TartanDrive数据集，用于学习越野驾驶的动力学模型。
AI.motivation: 现有越野驾驶数据集在交互数量和传感模态多样性上存在不足，需构建更大规模的数据集以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 通过改装的雅马哈ATV采集约20万次越野驾驶交互数据，涵盖7种传感模态，并对多种基于模型的强化学习方法进行基准测试。
AI.result: 多模态扩展显著提升越野动力学预测性能，尤其在复杂地形中表现突出，同时发现当前神经网络架构的局限性。
AI.conclusion: TartanDrive数据集为越野驾驶研究提供重要资源，可推动更鲁棒的动力学模型开发。
