authors_text: Paul Medvedev
title: The theoretical analysis of sequencing bioinformatics algorithms and beyond
title_zh: 测序生物信息学算法及其他理论分析
abstract: The theoretical analysis of performance has been an important tool in the engineering of algorithms in many application domains. Its goals are to predict the empirical performance of an algorithm and to be a yardstick that drives the design of novel algorithms that perform well in practice. While these goals have been achieved in many instances, they have not been achieved ubiquitously across crucial application domains. I provide a case study in the area of sequencing bioinformatics, an inter-disciplinary field that uses algorithms to extract biological meaning from genome sequencing data. In particular, I give three concrete examples: two showing how theoretical analysis has failed to achieve its goals and one showing how it has been successful. I will then catalog some of the challenges of applying theoretical analysis to sequencing bioinformatics, argue why empirical analysis is not enough, and give a vision for improving the relevance of theoretical analysis to sequencing bioinformatics. By recognizing the problem, understanding its roots, and providing potential solutions, this work can hopefully be a crucial first step towards making theoretical analysis more relevant in sequencing bioinformatics and potentially other fast-paced application domains.
summary: The theoretical analysis of performance has been an important tool in the engineering of algorithms in many application domains. Its goals are to predict the empirical performance of an algorithm and to be a yardstick that drives the design of novel algorithms that perform well in practice. While these goals have been achieved in many instances, they have not been achieved ubiquitously across crucial application domains. I provide a case study in the area of sequencing bioinformatics, an inter-disciplinary field that uses algorithms to extract biological meaning from genome sequencing data. In particular, I give three concrete examples: two showing how theoretical analysis has failed to achieve its goals and one showing how it has been successful. I will then catalog some of the challenges of applying theoretical analysis to sequencing bioinformatics, argue why empirical analysis is not enough, and give a vision for improving the relevance of theoretical analysis to sequencing bioinformatics. By recognizing the problem, understanding its roots, and providing potential solutions, this work can hopefully be a crucial first step towards making theoretical analysis more relevant in sequencing bioinformatics and potentially other fast-paced application domains.
abstract_zh: 性能的理论分析一直是许多应用领域算法工程的重要工具。其目标是预测算法的经验性能，并成为推动在实践中表现良好的新颖算法设计的标准。尽管这些目标在许多情况下都已实现，但尚未在关键应用领域普遍实现。我提供了一个测序生物信息学领域的案例研究，这是一个跨学科领域，使用算法从基因组测序数据中提取生物学意义。我特别给出了三个具体的例子：两个展示了理论分析如何未能实现其目标，一个展示了理论分析如何成功。然后，我将列出将理论分析应用于测序生物信息学的一些挑战，论证为什么实证分析还不够，并给出提高理论分析与测序生物信息学相关性的愿景。通过认识问题、了解其根源并提供潜在的解决方案，这项工作有望成为关键的第一步，使理论分析在测序生物信息学和潜在的其他快节奏应用领域中更加相关。

AI.tldr: 分析理论分析在测序生物信息学中的应用问题，并提出改进建议
AI.motivation: 探讨理论分析在测序生物信息学中未能有效指导算法设计的原因，并寻找改进方法
AI.method: 通过三个具体案例研究，分析理论分析在测序生物信息学中的成功与失败，并总结其面临的挑战
AI.result: 指出现有理论分析的局限性，强调实证分析不足，并提出提升理论分析相关性的潜在解决方案
AI.conclusion: 通过识别问题根源并提出解决方案，为提升理论分析在测序生物信息学及其他快速应用领域中的相关性奠定基础

authors_text: Yinan Yu,Samuel Scheidegger,John-Fredrik Grönvall,Magnus Palm,Erik Svanberg,Johan Amoruso Wennerby,Jörg Bakker
title: A Pre-study on Data Processing Pipelines for Roadside Object Detection Systems Towards Safer Road Infrastructure
title_zh: 路边物体检测系统数据处理管道的预研究，以实现更安全的道路基础设施
abstract: Single-vehicle accidents are the most common type of fatal accidents in Sweden, where a car drives off the road and runs into hazardous roadside objects. Proper installation and maintenance of protective objects, such as crash cushions and guard rails, may reduce the chance and severity of such accidents. Moreover, efficient detection and management of hazardous roadside objects also plays an important role in improving road safety. To better understand the state-of-the-art and system requirements, in this pre-study, we investigate the feasibility, implementation, limitations and scaling up of data processing pipelines for roadside object detection. In particular, we divide our investigation into three parts: the target of interest, the sensors of choice and the algorithm design. The data sources we consider in this study cover two common setups: 1) road surveying fleet - annual scans conducted by Trafikverket, the Swedish Transport Administration, and 2) consumer vehicle - data collected using a research vehicle from the laboratory of Resource for vehicle research at Chalmers (REVERE). The goal of this report is to investigate how to implement a scalable roadside object detection system towards safe road infrastructure and Sweden's Vision Zero.

To better understand the state-of-the-art and system requirements, in this pre-study, we investigate the feasibility, implementation, limitations and scaling up of data processing pipelines for roadside object detection. In particular, we divide our investigation into three parts: the target of interest, the sensors of choice and the algorithm design. abstract_zh: 单车事故是瑞典最常见的致命事故类型，即汽车驶离道路并撞上路边危险物体。正确安装和维护防护物品（例如防撞垫和护栏）可以减少此类事故的发生机会和严重程度。此外，对路边危险物体的有效检测和管理对于提高道路安全也发挥着重要作用。为了更好地了解最先进的技术和系统要求，在这项预研究中，我们研究了路边物体检测数据处理管道的可行性、实施、限制和扩展。具体来说，我们将研究分为三个部分：感兴趣的目标、传感器的选择和算法设计。我们在本研究中考虑的数据源涵盖两种常见设置：1) 道路测量车队 - 由瑞典交通管理局 Trafikverket 进行的年度扫描；2) 消费车辆 - 使用查尔姆斯理工大学车辆研究资源实验室 (REVERE) 的研究车辆收集的数据。本报告的目标是研究如何实施可扩展的路边物体检测系统，以实现安全的道路基础设施和瑞典的零愿景。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了用于路边物体检测系统的数据处理管道的可行性、实现方式及扩展性，以提升道路基础设施安全性。
AI.motivation: 瑞典单车事故频发，正确安装防护设施并高效检测危险物体对减少事故至关重要，需探索数据处理技术以实现安全目标。
AI.method: 将研究分为目标对象、传感器选择及算法设计三部分，结合瑞典交通管理局年度扫描数据与实验室车辆采集数据进行分析。
AI.result: 明确了数据处理管道的关键技术需求，评估了不同传感器与算法的适用性，并探讨了系统规模化应用的潜在挑战。
AI.conclusion: 数据处理管道具备实现路边物体检测的可行性，需进一步优化传感器配置与算法设计以支持瑞典零死亡愿景。

authors_text: Cheng Luo,Siyang Song,Weicheng Xie,Linlin Shen,Hatice Gunes
title: Learning Multi-dimensional Edge Feature-based AU Relation Graph for Facial Action Unit Recognition
title_zh: 学习基于多维边缘特征的AU关系图进行面部动作单元识别
abstract: The activations of Facial Action Units (AUs) mutually influence one another. While the relationship between a pair of AUs can be complex and unique, existing approaches fail to specifically and explicitly represent such cues for each pair of AUs in each facial display. This paper proposes an AU relationship modelling approach that deep learns a unique graph to explicitly describe the relationship between each pair of AUs of the target facial display. Our approach first encodes each AU's activation status and its association with other AUs into a node feature. Then, it learns a pair of multi-dimensional edge features to describe multiple task-specific relationship cues between each pair of AUs. During both node and edge feature learning, our approach also considers the influence of the unique facial display on AUs' relationship by taking the full face representation as an input. Experimental results on BP4D and DISFA datasets show that both node and edge feature learning modules provide large performance improvements for CNN and transformer-based backbones, with our best systems achieving the state-of-the-art AU recognition results. Our approach not only has a strong capability in modelling relationship cues for AU recognition but also can be easily incorporated into various backbones. Our PyTorch code is made available.
summary: The activations of Facial Action Units (AUs) mutually influence one another. While the relationship between a pair of AUs can be complex and unique, existing approaches fail to specifically and explicitly represent such cues for each pair of AUs in each facial display. This paper proposes an AU relationship modelling approach that deep learns a unique graph to explicitly describe the relationship between each pair of AUs of the target facial display. Our approach first encodes each AU's activation status and its association with other AUs into a node feature. Then, it learns a pair of multi-dimensional edge features to describe multiple task-specific relationship cues between each pair of AUs. During both node and edge feature learning, our approach also considers the influence of the unique facial display on AUs' relationship by taking the full face representation as an input. Experimental results on BP4D and DISFA datasets show that both node and edge feature learning modules provide large performance improvements for CNN and transformer-based backbones, with our best systems achieving the state-of-the-art AU recognition results. Our approach not only has a strong capability in modelling relationship cues for AU recognition but also can be easily incorporated into various backbones. Our PyTorch code is made available.
abstract_zh: 面部动作单元 (AU) 的激活相互影响。虽然一对 AU 之间的关系可能复杂且独特，但现有方法无法具体且明确地表示每个面部显示中每对 AU 的此类线索。本文提出了一种 AU 关系建模方法，该方法可以深度学习独特的图来明确描述目标面部显示的每对 AU 之间的关系。我们的方法首先将每个 AU 的激活状态及其与其他 AU 的关联编码为节点特征。然后，它学习一对多维边缘特征来描述每对 AU 之间的多个特定于任务的关系线索。在节点和边缘特征学习期间，我们的方法还通过将完整的面部表示作为输入来考虑独特的面部显示对 AU 关系的影响。 BP4D 和 DISFA 数据集上的实验结果表明，节点和边缘特征学习模块都为 CNN 和基于 Transformer 的主干网提供了巨大的性能改进，我们最好的系统实现了最先进的 AU 识别结果。我们的方法不仅在建模 AU 识别的关系线索方面具有强大的能力，而且可以轻松地合并到各种骨干网中。我们的 PyTorch 代码已可用。

AI.tldr: 提出基于多维边特征的AU关系图模型，用于提升面部动作单元（AU）识别的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效建模AU间的复杂关系，限制了识别性能。
AI.method: 通过编码AU激活状态和关联生成节点特征，学习多维边特征描述AU对关系，并结合全脸表示建模面部显示对AU关系的影响。
AI.result: 在BP4D和DISFA数据集上，节点和边特征模块显著提升CNN和Transformer性能，达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 方法有效建模AU关系，兼容多种架构，且提供开源代码。

authors_text: Alice Baird,Panagiotis Tzirakis,Gauthier Gidel,Marco Jiralerspong,Eilif B. Muller,Kory Mathewson,Björn Schuller,Erik Cambria,Dacher Keltner,Alan Cowen
title: The ICML 2022 Expressive Vocalizations Workshop and Competition: Recognizing, Generating, and Personalizing Vocal Bursts
title_zh: ICML 2022 表达性发声研讨会和竞赛：识别、生成和个性化声音突发
abstract: The ICML Expressive Vocalization (ExVo) Competition is focused on understanding and generating vocal bursts: laughs, gasps, cries, and other non-verbal vocalizations that are central to emotional expression and communication. ExVo 2022, includes three competition tracks using a large-scale dataset of 59,201 vocalizations from 1,702 speakers. The first, ExVo-MultiTask, requires participants to train a multi-task model to recognize expressed emotions and demographic traits from vocal bursts. The second, ExVo-Generate, requires participants to train a generative model that produces vocal bursts conveying ten different emotions. The third, ExVo-FewShot, requires participants to leverage few-shot learning incorporating speaker identity to train a model for the recognition of 10 emotions conveyed by vocal bursts. This paper describes the three tracks and provides performance measures for baseline models using state-of-the-art machine learning strategies. The baseline for each track is as follows, for ExVo-MultiTask, a combined score, computing the harmonic mean of Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC), Unweighted Average Recall (UAR), and inverted Mean Absolute Error (MAE) ($S_{MTL}$) is at best, 0.335 $S_{MTL}$; for ExVo-Generate, we report Fréchet inception distance (FID) scores ranging from 4.81 to 8.27 (depending on the emotion) between the training set and generated samples. We then combine the inverted FID with perceptual ratings of the generated samples ($S_{Gen}$) and obtain 0.174 $S_{Gen}$; and for ExVo-FewShot, a mean CCC of 0.444 is obtained.
summary: The ICML Expressive Vocalization (ExVo) Competition is focused on understanding and generating vocal bursts: laughs, gasps, cries, and other non-verbal vocalizations that are central to emotional expression and communication. ExVo 2022, includes three competition tracks using a large-scale dataset of 59,201 vocalizations from 1,702 speakers. The first, ExVo-MultiTask, requires participants to train a multi-task model to recognize expressed emotions and demographic traits from vocal bursts. The second, ExVo-Generate, requires participants to train a generative model that produces vocal bursts conveying ten different emotions. The third, ExVo-FewShot, requires participants to leverage few-shot learning incorporating speaker identity to train a model for the recognition of 10 emotions conveyed by vocal bursts. This paper describes the three tracks and provides performance measures for baseline models using state-of-the-art machine learning strategies. The baseline for each track is as follows, for ExVo-MultiTask, a combined score, computing the harmonic mean of Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC), Unweighted Average Recall (UAR), and inverted Mean Absolute Error (MAE) ($S_{MTL}$) is at best, 0.335 $S_{MTL}$; for ExVo-Generate, we report Fréchet inception distance (FID) scores ranging from 4.81 to 8.27 (depending on the emotion) between the training set and generated samples. We then combine the inverted FID with perceptual ratings of the generated samples ($S_{Gen}$) and obtain 0.174 $S_{Gen}$; and for ExVo-FewShot, a mean CCC of 0.444 is obtained.
abstract_zh: ICML 表达性发声 (ExVo) 比赛的重点是理解和产生声音爆发：笑声、喘息、哭泣和其他对于情感表达和交流至关重要的非语言发声。 ExVo 2022 包括三个竞赛曲目，使用来自 1,702 名说话者的 59,201 种发声的大规模数据集。第一个是 ExVo-MultiTask，要求参与者训练一个多任务模型，以识别声音爆发中表达的情绪和人口特征。第二个是 ExVo-Generate，要求参与者训练一个生成模型，该模型可以产生传达十种不同情绪的声音爆发。第三个是 ExVo-FewShot，要求参与者利用结合说话者身份的小样本学习来训练一个模型，以识别由声音爆发传达的 10 种情绪。本文描述了这三个方向，并提供了使用最先进的机器学习策略的基线模型的性能测量。每个轨道的基线如下，对于ExVo-MultiTask，计算一致性相关系数（CCC）、未加权平均召回率（UAR）和倒置平均绝对误差（MAE）（$S_{MTL}$）的调和平均值的组合分数最好为0.335 $S_{MTL}$；对于 ExVo-Generate，我们报告训练集和生成样本之间的 Fréchet 起始距离 (FID) 分数范围为 4.81 到 8.27（取决于情绪）。然后，我们将倒置的 FID 与生成样本的感知评级 ($S_{Gen}$) 结合起来，得到 0.174 $S_{Gen}$；对于 ExVo-FewShot，获得的平均 CCC 为 0.444。

AI.tldr: 该论文介绍了ICML 2022表达性发声工作坊与竞赛，包含三个任务：多任务识别、生成模型训练及小样本学习，旨在推进对非语言发声（如笑声、哭声）的情感识别与生成研究。
AI.motivation: 通过竞赛形式推动对非语言发声的识别、生成与个性化技术发展，促进情感表达与人机交互领域的研究进展。
AI.method: 基于包含59,201个发声样本的大规模数据集，设计三个竞赛赛道：多任务模型联合识别情绪与人口统计特征、生成模型创造特定情绪的发声、结合说话人身份的小样本情绪识别模型。

search_text: The ICML 2022 Expressive Vocalizations Workshop and Competition: Recognizing, Generating, and Personalizing Vocal Bursts ICML 2022 表达性发声研讨会和竞赛：识别、生成和个性化声音突发 The ICML Expressive Vocalization (ExVo) Competition is focused on understanding and generating vocal bursts: laughs, gasps, cries, and other non-verbal vocalizations that are central to emotional expression and communication. ExVo 2022, includes three competition tracks using a large-scale dataset of 59,201 vocalizations from 1,702 speakers. The first, ExVo-MultiTask, requires participants to train a multi-task model to recognize expressed emotions and demographic traits from vocal bursts. The second, ExVo-Generate, requires participants to train a generative model that produces vocal bursts conveying ten different emotions. The third, ExVo-FewShot, requires participants to leverage few-shot learning incorporating speaker identity to train a model for the recognition of 10 emotions conveyed by vocal bursts. This paper describes the three tracks and provides performance measures for baseline models using state-of-the-art machine learning strategies. The baseline for each track is as follows, for ExVo-MultiTask, a combined score, computing the harmonic mean of Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC), Unweighted Average Recall (UAR), and inverted Mean Absolute Error (MAE) ($S_{MTL}$) is at best, 0.335 $S_{MTL}$; for ExVo-Generate, we report Fréchet inception distance (FID) scores ranging from 4.81 to 8.27 (depending on the emotion) between the training set and generated samples. We then combine the inverted FID with perceptual ratings of the generated samples ($S_{Gen}$) and obtain 0.174 $S_{Gen}$; and for ExVo-FewShot, a mean CCC of 0.444 is obtained. ICML 表达性发声 (ExVo) 比赛的重点是理解和产生声音爆发：笑声、喘息、哭泣和其他对于情感表达和交流至关重要的非语言发声。 ExVo 2022 包括三个竞赛曲目，使用来自 1,702 名说话者的 59,201 种发声的大规模数据集。第一个是 ExVo-MultiTask，要求参与者训练一个多任务模型，以识别声音爆发中表达的情绪和人口特征。第二个是 ExVo-Generate，要求参与者训练一个生成模型，该模型可以产生传达十种不同情绪的声音爆发。第三个是 ExVo-FewShot，要求参与者利用结合说话者身份的小样本学习来训练一个模型，以识别由声音爆发传达的 10 种情绪。本文描述了这三个方向，并提供了使用最先进的机器学习策略的基线模型的性能测量。每个轨道的基线如下，对于ExVo-MultiTask，计算一致性相关系数（CCC）、未加权平均召回率（UAR）和倒置平均绝对误差（MAE）（$S_{MTL}$）的调和平均值的组合分数最好为0.335 $S_{MTL}$；对于 ExVo-Generate，我们报告训练集和生成样本之间的 Fréchet 起始距离 (FID) 分数范围为 4.81 到 8.27（取决于情绪）。然后，我们将倒置的 FID 与生成样本的感知评级 ($S_{Gen}$) 结合起来，得到 0.174 $S_{Gen}$；对于 ExVo-FewShot，获得的平均 CCC 为 0.444。 该论文介绍了ICML 2022表达性发声工作坊与竞赛，包含三个任务：多任务识别、生成模型训练及小样本学习，旨在推进对非语言发声（如笑声、哭声）的情感识别与生成研究。 Alice Baird,Panagiotis Tzirakis,Gauthier Gidel,Marco Jiralerspong,Eilif B. Muller,Kory Mathewson,Björn Schuller,Erik Cambria,Dacher Keltner,Alan Cowen eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: Nikhil Cherian Kurian,Amit Lohan,Gregory Verghese,Nimish Dharamshi,Swati Meena,Mengyuan Li,Fangfang Liu,Cheryl Gillet,Swapnil Rane,Anita Grigoriadis,Amit Sethi
title: Deep Multi-Scale U-Net Architecture and Label-Noise Robust Training Strategies for Histopathological Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于组织病理学图像分割的深度多尺度 U-Net 架构和标签噪声鲁棒训练策略
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures , 2 tables ,Added Attention UNet Results, Added Sinus and Germinal Center overlay images, Modified paper format, Fixed Title typos
comments: 12 pages, 4 figures , 2 tables ,Added Attention UNet Results, Added Sinus and Germinal Center overlay images, Modified paper format, Fixed Title typos
abstract: Although the U-Net architecture has been extensively used for segmentation of medical images, we address two of its shortcomings in this work. Firstly, the accuracy of vanilla U-Net degrades when the target regions for segmentation exhibit significant variations in shape and size. Even though the U-Net already possesses some capability to analyze features at various scales, we propose to explicitly add multi-scale feature maps in each convolutional module of the U-Net encoder to improve segmentation of histology images. Secondly, the accuracy of a U-Net model also suffers when the annotations for supervised learning are noisy or incomplete. This can happen due to the inherent difficulty for a human expert to identify and delineate all instances of specific pathology very precisely and accurately. We address this challenge by introducing auxiliary confidence maps that emphasize less on the boundaries of the given target regions. Further, we utilize the bootstrapping properties of the deep network to address the missing annotation problem intelligently. In our experiments on a private dataset of breast cancer lymph nodes, where the primary task was to segment germinal centres and sinus histiocytosis, we observed substantial improvement over a U-Net baseline based on the two proposed augmentations.
summary: Although the U-Net architecture has been extensively used for segmentation of medical images, we address two of its shortcomings in this work. Firstly, the accuracy of vanilla U-Net degrades when the target regions for segmentation exhibit significant variations in shape and size. Even though the U-Net already possesses some capability to analyze features at various scales, we propose to explicitly add multi-scale feature maps in each convolutional module of the U-Net encoder to improve segmentation of histology images. Secondly, the accuracy of a U-Net model also suffers when the annotations for supervised learning are noisy or incomplete. This can happen due to the inherent difficulty for a human expert to identify and delineate all instances of specific pathology very precisely and accurately. We address this challenge by introducing auxiliary confidence maps that emphasize less on the boundaries of the given target regions. Further, we utilize the bootstrapping properties of the deep network to address the missing annotation problem intelligently. In our experiments on a private dataset of breast cancer lymph nodes, where the primary task was to segment germinal centres and sinus histiocytosis, we observed substantial improvement over a U-Net baseline based on the two proposed augmentations.
abstract_zh: 尽管 U-Net 架构已广泛用于医学图像分割，但我们在这项工作中解决了它的两个缺点。首先，当分割的目标区域在形状和大小上表现出显着变化时，vanilla U-Net 的准确性会降低。尽管 U-Net 已经具备了分析各种尺度特征的能力，但我们建议在 U-Net 编码器的每个卷积模块中显式添加多尺度特征图，以改善组织学图像的分割。其次，当监督学习的注释有噪声或不完整时，U-Net 模型的准确性也会受到影响。发生这种情况的原因是人类专家很难非常精确和准确地识别和描绘特定病理的所有实例。我们通过引入辅助置信度图来解决这一挑战，该图较少强调给定目标区域的边界。此外，我们利用深度网络的引导特性来智能地解决缺失注释问题。在我们对乳腺癌淋巴结私人数据集进行的实验中，主要任务是分割生发中心和窦组织细胞增多症，我们观察到基于两个提议的增强的 U-Net 基线有显着改善。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的多尺度U-Net架构及标签噪声鲁棒训练策略，用于提升组织病理学图像分割的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统U-Net在处理形状大小差异大的目标区域及面对标注噪声时表现不足，需增强模型对多尺度特征的提取能力并提升对噪声标签的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 在U-Net编码器每层显式引入多尺度特征图，并通过辅助置信度图与深度网络自举特性解决标注不完整问题。
AI.result: 在乳腺癌淋巴结私有数据集上，分割发芽中心和窦组织细胞时较基线U-Net显著提升性能。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度特征增强与噪声鲁棒训练策略有效提升了病理图像分割的准确性与稳定性。

Firstly, the accuracy of vanilla U-Net degrades when the target regions for segmentation exhibit significant variations in shape and size. Even though the U-Net already possesses some capability to analyze features at various scales, we propose to explicitly add multi-scale feature maps in each convolutional module of the U-Net encoder to improve segmentation of histology images. Secondly, the accuracy of a U-Net model also suffers when the annotations for supervised learning are noisy or incomplete. We address this challenge by introducing auxiliary confidence maps that emphasize less on the boundaries of the given target regions. Further, we utilize the bootstrapping properties of the deep network to address the missing annotation problem intelligently. In our experiments on a private dataset of breast cancer lymph nodes, where the primary task was to segment germinal centres and sinus histiocytosis, we observed substantial improvement over a U-Net baseline based on the two proposed augmentations. 尽管 U-Net 架构已广泛用于医学图像分割，但我们在这项工作中解决了它的两个缺点。首先，当分割的目标区域在形状和大小上表现出显着变化时，vanilla U-Net 的准确性会降低。尽管 U-Net 已经具备了分析各种尺度特征的能力，但我们建议在 U-Net 编码器的每个卷积模块中显式添加多尺度特征图，以改善组织学图像的分割。其次，当监督学习的注释有噪声或不完整时，U-Net 模型的准确性也会受到影响。发生这种情况的原因是人类专家很难非常精确和准确地识别和描绘特定病理的所有实例。我们通过引入辅助置信度图来解决这一挑战，该图较少强调给定目标区域的边界。此外，我们利用深度网络的引导特性来智能地解决缺失注释问题。在我们对乳腺癌淋巴结私人数据集进行的实验中，主要任务是分割生发中心和窦组织细胞增多症，我们观察到基于两个提议的增强的 U-Net 基线有显着改善。 本文提出改进的多尺度U-Net架构及标签噪声鲁棒训练策略，用于提升组织病理学图像分割的准确性。 Nikhil Cherian Kurian,Amit Lohan,Gregory Verghese,Nimish Dharamshi,Swati Meena,Mengyuan Li,Fangfang Liu,Cheryl Gillet,Swapnil Rane,Anita Grigoriadis,Amit Sethi eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Raoni F. da S. Teixeira,Rafael B. Januzi,Fabio A. Faria
title: The Brazilian Data at Risk in the Age of AI?
title_zh: 人工智能时代巴西数据面临风险？
comment: 8 pages in Portuguese and 5 figures, Top 3 among the best papers at the ENIAC 2022
comments: 8 pages in Portuguese and 5 figures, Top 3 among the best papers at the ENIAC 2022
abstract: Advances in image processing and analysis as well as machine learning techniques have contributed to the use of biometric recognition systems in daily people tasks. These tasks range from simple access to mobile devices to tagging friends in photos shared on social networks and complex financial operations on self-service devices for banking transactions. In China, the use of these systems goes beyond personal use becoming a country's government policy with the objective of monitoring the behavior of its population. On July 05th 2021, the Brazilian government announced acquisition of a biometric recognition system to be used nationwide. In the opposite direction to China, Europe and some American cities have already started the discussion about the legality of using biometric systems in public places, even banning this practice in their territory. In order to open a deeper discussion about the risks and legality of using these systems, this work exposes the vulnerabilities of biometric recognition systems, focusing its efforts on the face modality. Furthermore, it shows how it is possible to fool a biometric system through a well-known presentation attack approach in the literature called morphing. Finally, a list of ten concerns was created to start the discussion about the security of citizen data and data privacy law in the Age of Artificial Intelligence (AI).
summary: Advances in image processing and analysis as well as machine learning techniques have contributed to the use of biometric recognition systems in daily people tasks. These tasks range from simple access to mobile devices to tagging friends in photos shared on social networks and complex financial operations on self-service devices for banking transactions. In China, the use of these systems goes beyond personal use becoming a country's government policy with the objective of monitoring the behavior of its population. On July 05th 2021, the Brazilian government announced acquisition of a biometric recognition system to be used nationwide. In the opposite direction to China, Europe and some American cities have already started the discussion about the legality of using biometric systems in public places, even banning this practice in their territory. In order to open a deeper discussion about the risks and legality of using these systems, this work exposes the vulnerabilities of biometric recognition systems, focusing its efforts on the face modality. Furthermore, it shows how it is possible to fool a biometric system through a well-known presentation attack approach in the literature called morphing. Finally, a list of ten concerns was created to start the discussion about the security of citizen data and data privacy law in the Age of Artificial Intelligence (AI).
abstract_zh: 图像处理和分析以及机器学习技术的进步促进了生物识别系统在日常任务中的使用。这些任务包括从简单地访问移动设备到在社交网络上共享的照片中标记朋友，以及在自助服务设备上进行银行交易的复杂财务操作。在中国，这些系统的使用超出了个人使用的范围，成为一个国家的政府政策，其目的是监控民众的行为。 2021 年 7 月 5 日，巴西政府宣布购买生物识别系统并在全国范围内使用。与中国相反，欧洲和美国一些城市已经开始讨论在公共场所使用生物识别系统的合法性，甚至在其境内禁止这种做法。为了对使用这些系统的风险和合法性展开更深入的讨论，这项工作暴露了生物识别系统的漏洞，重点关注人脸模态。此外，它还展示了如何通过文献中称为变形的众所周知的演示攻击方法来欺骗生物识别系统。最后，列出了十大关注点，以启动有关人工智能（AI）时代公民数据安全和数据隐私法的讨论。

AI.tldr: 分析巴西全国部署生物识别系统的潜在风险，探讨人工智能时代公民数据安全与隐私法律问题。
AI.motivation: 巴西政府计划全国采用生物识别系统，而其他国家已对公共场所生物识别技术的合法性展开讨论，需评估该技术的安全隐患与法律风险。
AI.method: 通过分析生物识别系统（特别是面部识别）的漏洞，结合文献中已知的'morphing'攻击方法进行验证，并提出十项安全与隐私问题清单。
AI.result: 揭示生物识别系统易受形态攻击等漏洞影响，提出十项关于数据安全和隐私法律的讨论议题，引发对巴西相关政策的反思。
AI.conclusion: 需在人工智能时代加强公民数据保护法律框架，平衡技术应用与个人隐私权，避免生物识别技术被滥用。

search_text: The Brazilian Data at Risk in the Age of AI? 人工智能时代巴西数据面临风险？ Advances in image processing and analysis as well as machine learning techniques have contributed to the use of biometric recognition systems in daily people tasks. These tasks range from simple access to mobile devices to tagging friends in photos shared on social networks and complex financial operations on self-service devices for banking transactions. In China, the use of these systems goes beyond personal use becoming a country's government policy with the objective of monitoring the behavior of its population. On July 05th 2021, the Brazilian government announced acquisition of a biometric recognition system to be used nationwide. In the opposite direction to China, Europe and some American cities have already started the discussion about the legality of using biometric systems in public places, even banning this practice in their territory. In order to open a deeper discussion about the risks and legality of using these systems, this work exposes the vulnerabilities of biometric recognition systems, focusing its efforts on the face modality. Furthermore, it shows how it is possible to fool a biometric system through a well-known presentation attack approach in the literature called morphing. Finally, a list of ten concerns was created to start the discussion about the security of citizen data and data privacy law in the Age of Artificial Intelligence (AI). 图像处理和分析以及机器学习技术的进步促进了生物识别系统在日常任务中的使用。这些任务包括从简单地访问移动设备到在社交网络上共享的照片中标记朋友，以及在自助服务设备上进行银行交易的复杂财务操作。在中国，这些系统的使用超出了个人使用的范围，成为一个国家的政府政策，其目的是监控民众的行为。 2021 年 7 月 5 日，巴西政府宣布购买生物识别系统并在全国范围内使用。与中国相反，欧洲和美国一些城市已经开始讨论在公共场所使用生物识别系统的合法性，甚至在其境内禁止这种做法。为了对使用这些系统的风险和合法性展开更深入的讨论，这项工作暴露了生物识别系统的漏洞，重点关注人脸模态。此外，它还展示了如何通过文献中称为变形的众所周知的演示攻击方法来欺骗生物识别系统。最后，列出了十大关注点，以启动有关人工智能（AI）时代公民数据安全和数据隐私法的讨论。 分析巴西全国部署生物识别系统的潜在风险，探讨人工智能时代公民数据安全与隐私法律问题。 Raoni F. da S. Teixeira,Rafael B. Januzi,Fabio A. Faria cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Zihao Chen,Yuhua Chen,Yibin Xie,Debiao Li,Anthony G. Christodoulou
title: Data-Consistent Non-Cartesian Deep Subspace Learning for Efficient Dynamic MR Image Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于高效动态 MR 图像重建的数据一致非笛卡尔深度子空间学习
abstract: Non-Cartesian sampling with subspace-constrained image reconstruction is a popular approach to dynamic MRI, but slow iterative reconstruction limits its clinical application. Data-consistent (DC) deep learning can accelerate reconstruction with good image quality, but has not been formulated for non-Cartesian subspace imaging. In this study, we propose a DC non-Cartesian deep subspace learning framework for fast, accurate dynamic MR image reconstruction. Four novel DC formulations are developed and evaluated: two gradient decent approaches, a directly solved approach, and a conjugate gradient approach. We applied a U-Net model with and without DC layers to reconstruct T1-weighted images for cardiac MR Multitasking (an advanced multidimensional imaging method), comparing our results to the iteratively reconstructed reference. Experimental results show that the proposed framework significantly improves reconstruction accuracy over the U-Net model without DC, while significantly accelerating the reconstruction over conventional iterative reconstruction.
summary: Non-Cartesian sampling with subspace-constrained image reconstruction is a popular approach to dynamic MRI, but slow iterative reconstruction limits its clinical application. Data-consistent (DC) deep learning can accelerate reconstruction with good image quality, but has not been formulated for non-Cartesian subspace imaging. In this study, we propose a DC non-Cartesian deep subspace learning framework for fast, accurate dynamic MR image reconstruction. Four novel DC formulations are developed and evaluated: two gradient decent approaches, a directly solved approach, and a conjugate gradient approach. We applied a U-Net model with and without DC layers to reconstruct T1-weighted images for cardiac MR Multitasking (an advanced multidimensional imaging method), comparing our results to the iteratively reconstructed reference. Experimental results show that the proposed framework significantly improves reconstruction accuracy over the U-Net model without DC, while significantly accelerating the reconstruction over conventional iterative reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 具有子空间约束图像重建的非笛卡尔采样是动态 MRI 的流行方法，但缓慢的迭代重建限制了其临床应用。数据一致（DC）深度学习可以加速重建并具有良好的图像质量，但尚未针对非笛卡尔子空间成像制定。在本研究中，我们提出了一种 DC 非笛卡尔深度子空间学习框架，用于快速、准确的动态 MR 图像重建。开发并评估了四种新颖的 DC 公式：两种梯度下降方法、一种直接求解方法和一种共轭梯度方法。我们应用带有和不带有 DC 层的 U-Net 模型来重建用于心脏 MR 多任务处理（一种先进的多维成像方法）的 T1 加权图像，并将我们的结果与迭代重建的参考进行比较。实验结果表明，所提出的框架比没有 DC 的 U-Net 模型显着提高了重建精度，同时比传统的迭代重建显着加速了重建速度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种数据一致的非笛卡尔深度子空间学习框架，用于加速动态磁共振成像（MRI）的重建过程。
AI.motivation: 非笛卡尔采样结合子空间约束的图像重建在动态MRI中应用广泛，但传统迭代重建速度慢，限制了临床应用；数据一致的深度学习方法虽能加速重建，但尚未针对非笛卡尔子空间成像进行有效设计。
AI.method: 开发了四种数据一致的深度学习公式（两种梯度下降法、一种直接求解法和一种共轭梯度法），并结合U-Net模型（含/不含数据一致层）用于心脏MRI多任务重建，与传统迭代重建结果对比。
AI.result: 所提框架在保持图像质量的同时，显著提升了重建速度，且优于无数据一致层的U-Net模型和传统迭代方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为动态MRI提供了高效、准确的重建方案，具有临床应用潜力。

authors_text: Tianchen Ji,Roy Dong,Katherine Driggs-Campbell
title: Traversing Supervisor Problem: An Approximately Optimal Approach to Multi-Robot Assistance
title_zh: 遍历主管问题：多机器人辅助的近似最优方法
abstract: The number of multi-robot systems deployed in field applications has increased dramatically over the years. Despite the recent advancement of navigation algorithms, autonomous robots often encounter challenging situations where the control policy fails and the human assistance is required to resume robot tasks. Human-robot collaboration can help achieve high-levels of autonomy, but monitoring and managing multiple robots at once by a single human supervisor remains a challenging problem. Our goal is to help a supervisor decide which robots to assist in which order such that the team performance can be maximized. We formulate the one-to-many supervision problem in uncertain environments as a dynamic graph traversal problem. An approximation algorithm based on the profitable tour problem on a static graph is developed to solve the original problem, and the approximation error is bounded and analyzed. Our case study on a simulated autonomous farm demonstrates superior team performance than baseline methods in task completion time and human working time, and that our method can be deployed in real-time for robot fleets with moderate size.
summary: The number of multi-robot systems deployed in field applications has increased dramatically over the years. Despite the recent advancement of navigation algorithms, autonomous robots often encounter challenging situations where the control policy fails and the human assistance is required to resume robot tasks. Human-robot collaboration can help achieve high-levels of autonomy, but monitoring and managing multiple robots at once by a single human supervisor remains a challenging problem. Our goal is to help a supervisor decide which robots to assist in which order such that the team performance can be maximized. We formulate the one-to-many supervision problem in uncertain environments as a dynamic graph traversal problem. An approximation algorithm based on the profitable tour problem on a static graph is developed to solve the original problem, and the approximation error is bounded and analyzed. Our case study on a simulated autonomous farm demonstrates superior team performance than baseline methods in task completion time and human working time, and that our method can be deployed in real-time for robot fleets with moderate size.
abstract_zh: 多年来，现场应用中部署的多机器人系统的数量急剧增加。尽管导航算法最近取得了进步，但自主机器人经常遇到控制策略失败且需要人工协助才能恢复机器人任务的挑战性情况。人机协作有助于实现高度自治，但由单个人类主管同时监控和管理多个机器人仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们的目标是帮助主管决定哪些机器人按什么顺序提供协助，以便最大限度地提高团队绩效。我们将不确定环境中的一对多监督问题表述为动态图遍历问题。提出了一种基于静态图上的盈利旅游问题的近似算法来解决原始问题，并对近似误差进行了限制和分析。我们对模拟自主农场的案例研究表明，在任务完成时间和人类工作时间方面，团队表现优于基线方法，并且我们的方法可以实时部署于中等规模的机器人车队。

AI.tldr: 提出一种近似最优方法，帮助人类监督者在多机器人系统中高效分配协助顺序以最大化团队性能。
AI.motivation: 随着多机器人系统应用的增加，自主机器人常需人类协助，但单人监督多个机器人效率低下，需优化协助顺序以提高整体性能。
AI.method: 将监督问题建模为动态图遍历问题，设计基于静态图盈利巡回问题的近似算法，并分析其误差边界。
AI.result: 模拟农场案例显示，该方法在任务完成时间和人类工作时间上优于基线方法，并可实时部署于中等规模机器人队列。
AI.conclusion: 提出的近似算法有效解决了多机器人系统的监督问题，提升了团队性能，具有实际应用价值。

We formulate the one-to-many supervision problem in uncertain environments as a dynamic graph traversal problem. An approximation algorithm based on the profitable tour problem on a static graph is developed to solve the original problem, and the approximation error is bounded and analyzed. Our case study on a simulated autonomous farm demonstrates superior team performance than baseline methods in task completion time and human working time, and that our method can be deployed in real-time for robot fleets with moderate size. 多年来，现场应用中部署的多机器人系统的数量急剧增加。尽管导航算法最近取得了进步，但自主机器人经常遇到控制策略失败且需要人工协助才能恢复机器人任务的挑战性情况。人机协作有助于实现高度自治，但由单个人类主管同时监控和管理多个机器人仍然是一个具有挑战性的问题。我们的目标是帮助主管决定哪些机器人按什么顺序提供协助，以便最大限度地提高团队绩效。我们将不确定环境中的一对多监督问题表述为动态图遍历问题。提出了一种基于静态图上的盈利旅游问题的近似算法来解决原始问题，并对近似误差进行了限制和分析。我们对模拟自主农场的案例研究表明，在任务完成时间和人类工作时间方面，团队表现优于基线方法，并且我们的方法可以实时部署于中等规模的机器人车队。 提出一种近似最优方法，帮助人类监督者在多机器人系统中高效分配协助顺序以最大化团队性能。 Tianchen Ji,Roy Dong,Katherine Driggs-Campbell cs.RO,cs.MA,eess.SY

authors_text: Iñigo López-Riobóo Botana,Verónica Bolón-Canedo,Bertha Guijarro-Berdiñas,Amparo Alonso-Betanzos
title: Explain and Conquer: Personalised Text-based Reviews to Achieve Transparency
title_zh: 解释和征服：基于文本的个性化评论以实现透明度
abstract: There are many contexts in which dyadic data are present. Social networks are a well-known example. In these contexts, pairs of elements are linked building a network that reflects interactions. Explaining why these relationships are established is essential to obtain transparency, an increasingly important notion. These explanations are often presented using text, thanks to the spread of the natural language understanding tasks. Our aim is to represent and explain pairs established by any agent (e.g., a recommender system or a paid promotion mechanism), so that text-based personalisation is taken into account. We have focused on the TripAdvisor platform, considering the applicability to other dyadic data contexts. The items are a subset of users and restaurants and the interactions the reviews posted by these users. We propose the PTER (Personalised TExt-based Reviews) model. We predict, from the available reviews for a given restaurant, those that fit to the specific user interactions. PTER leverages the BERT (Bidirectional Encoders Representations from Transformers) transformer-encoder model. We customised a deep neural network following the feature-based approach, presenting a LTR (Learning To Rank) downstream task. We carried out several comparisons of our proposal with a random baseline and other models of the state of the art, following the EXTRA (EXplanaTion RAnking) benchmark. Our method outperforms other collaborative filtering proposals.
summary: There are many contexts in which dyadic data are present. Social networks are a well-known example. In these contexts, pairs of elements are linked building a network that reflects interactions. Explaining why these relationships are established is essential to obtain transparency, an increasingly important notion. These explanations are often presented using text, thanks to the spread of the natural language understanding tasks. Our aim is to represent and explain pairs established by any agent (e.g., a recommender system or a paid promotion mechanism), so that text-based personalisation is taken into account. We have focused on the TripAdvisor platform, considering the applicability to other dyadic data contexts. The items are a subset of users and restaurants and the interactions the reviews posted by these users. We propose the PTER (Personalised TExt-based Reviews) model. We predict, from the available reviews for a given restaurant, those that fit to the specific user interactions. PTER leverages the BERT (Bidirectional Encoders Representations from Transformers) transformer-encoder model. We customised a deep neural network following the feature-based approach, presenting a LTR (Learning To Rank) downstream task. We carried out several comparisons of our proposal with a random baseline and other models of the state of the art, following the EXTRA (EXplanaTion RAnking) benchmark. Our method outperforms other collaborative filtering proposals.
abstract_zh: 二元数据存在于许多环境中。社交网络是一个众所周知的例子。在这些上下文中，成对的元素相互链接，构建反映交互的网络。解释为什么建立这些关系对于获得透明度至关重要，这是一个日益重要的概念。由于自然语言理解任务的传播，这些解释通常使用文本来呈现。我们的目标是表示和解释由任何代理（例如推荐系统或付费促销机制）建立的对，以便考虑基于文本的个性化。我们重点关注 TripAdvisor 平台，并考虑其对其他二元数据环境的适用性。这些项目是用户和餐馆的子集以及这些用户发布的评论的交互。我们提出 PTER（基于文本的个性化评论）模型。我们根据给定餐厅的可用评论来预测那些适合特定用户交互的评论。 PTER 利用 BERT（来自 Transformers 的双向编码器表示）变压器编码器模型。我们按照基于特征的方法定制了深度神经网络，提出了 LTR（学习排序）下游任务。我们按照 EXTRA（解释排名）基准，将我们的提案与随机基线和其他最先进的模型进行了多次比较。我们的方法优于其他协同过滤提案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PTER模型，通过个性化文本评论解释用户与餐厅之间的互动关系，以提高透明度。
AI.motivation: 在社交网络等双元数据场景中，解释关系建立的原因对透明度至关重要，而现有方法缺乏对文本个性化解释的有效支持。
AI.method: 基于BERT模型构建深度神经网络，采用特征-based方法并设计LTR（学习排序）下游任务，通过TripAdvisor平台数据进行验证。
AI.result: PTER模型在EXTRA基准测试中优于随机基线和其他主流协同过滤方法。
AI.conclusion: PTER模型通过文本个性化解释有效提升了推荐系统的透明度，方法可扩展至其他双元数据场景。

authors_text: Yi-Ling Qiao,Junbang Liang,Vladlen Koltun,Ming C. Lin
title: Differentiable Simulation of Soft Multi-body Systems
title_zh: 软多体系统的可微分仿真
abstract: We present a method for differentiable simulation of soft articulated bodies. Our work enables the integration of differentiable physical dynamics into gradient-based pipelines. We develop a top-down matrix assembly algorithm within Projective Dynamics and derive a generalized dry friction model for soft continuum using a new matrix splitting strategy. We derive a differentiable control framework for soft articulated bodies driven by muscles, joint torques, or pneumatic tubes. The experiments demonstrate that our designs make soft body simulation more stable and realistic compared to other frameworks. Our method accelerates the solution of system identification problems by more than an order of magnitude, and enables efficient gradient-based learning of motion control with soft robots.
summary: We present a method for differentiable simulation of soft articulated bodies. Our work enables the integration of differentiable physical dynamics into gradient-based pipelines. We develop a top-down matrix assembly algorithm within Projective Dynamics and derive a generalized dry friction model for soft continuum using a new matrix splitting strategy. We derive a differentiable control framework for soft articulated bodies driven by muscles, joint torques, or pneumatic tubes. The experiments demonstrate that our designs make soft body simulation more stable and realistic compared to other frameworks. Our method accelerates the solution of system identification problems by more than an order of magnitude, and enables efficient gradient-based learning of motion control with soft robots.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种软关节体可微分模拟的方法。我们的工作能够将可微分的物理动力学集成到基于梯度的管道中。我们在射影动力学中开发了一种自上而下的矩阵组装算法，并使用新的矩阵分裂策略导出了软连续体的广义干摩擦模型。我们为由肌肉、关节扭矩或气动管驱动的软关节体推导出可微分控制框架。实验表明，与其他框架相比，我们的设计使软体模拟更加稳定和真实。我们的方法将系统识别问题的解决速度加快了一个数量级以上，并实现了软机器人运动控制的高效基于梯度的学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可微分模拟软多体系统的方法，通过改进物理模拟算法和控制框架，提升软体机器人模拟的稳定性与真实性，并加速学习过程。
AI.motivation: 现有软体机器人模拟方法在稳定性、真实性和学习效率上存在不足，需开发更高效的可微分物理模拟框架以支持梯度优化与控制学习。
AI.method: 开发自上而下矩阵组装算法改进Projective Dynamics，提出通用干摩擦矩阵分裂模型，并构建基于肌肉/关节/气动驱动的可微分控制框架。
AI.result: 实验表明方法在稳定性与真实感上优于现有框架，系统识别速度提升超10倍，实现高效梯度运动控制学习。
AI.conclusion: 本文方法为软体机器人模拟与控制提供了更高效、精确的可微分物理引擎，推动基于梯度的学习与优化应用。

authors_text: Alarith Uhde,Mena Mesenhöller,Marc Hassenzahl
title: Social Practice Cards: Research material to study social contexts as interwoven practice constellations
title_zh: 社会实践卡：研究社会背景作为交织的实践星座的研究材料
abstract: Studying how social contexts shape technology interactions and how we experience them is hard. One challenge is that social contexts are very dynamic and shaped by the situated practices of everyone involved. As a result, the same human-technology interaction can be experienced quite differently depending on what other people around us do. As a first step to study interpersonal and interpractice dynamics, we collected a broad range of visual representations of practices, such as "riding a bike" or "skipping the rope". This material can be used to further explore how different, co-located practices relate to each other.
summary: Studying how social contexts shape technology interactions and how we experience them is hard. One challenge is that social contexts are very dynamic and shaped by the situated practices of everyone involved. As a result, the same human-technology interaction can be experienced quite differently depending on what other people around us do. As a first step to study interpersonal and interpractice dynamics, we collected a broad range of visual representations of practices, such as "riding a bike" or "skipping the rope". This material can be used to further explore how different, co-located practices relate to each other.
abstract_zh: 研究社会环境如何影响技术交互以及我们如何体验它们是很困难的。一项挑战是，社会环境是非常动态的，并且是由每个参与者的情境实践所塑造的。因此，根据我们周围其他人的行为，相同的人机交互可能会有截然不同的体验。作为研究人际和互动动态的第一步，我们收集了广泛的实践视觉表现，例如“骑自行车”或“跳绳”。该材料可用于进一步探索不同的、位于同一地点的实践如何相互关联。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'社会实践卡片'的研究工具，用于分析社会情境中交织的实践关联。
AI.motivation: 社会情境动态且由多方实践共同塑造，现有方法难以捕捉这种复杂性及技术互动的多样性。
AI.method: 通过收集骑自行车、跳绳等日常实践的视觉化材料，构建可分析不同共存实践关系的研究素材库。
AI.result: 形成包含多种实践场景的视觉化研究材料，为探索技术互动与社会情境的动态关联提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 该工具为理解技术互动的社会背景提供了新路径，有助于揭示实践网络对技术体验的塑造作用。

search_text: Social Practice Cards: Research material to study social contexts as interwoven practice constellations 社会实践卡：研究社会背景作为交织的实践星座的研究材料 Studying how social contexts shape technology interactions and how we experience them is hard. One challenge is that social contexts are very dynamic and shaped by the situated practices of everyone involved. As a result, the same human-technology interaction can be experienced quite differently depending on what other people around us do. As a first step to study interpersonal and interpractice dynamics, we collected a broad range of visual representations of practices, such as "riding a bike" or "skipping the rope". This material can be used to further explore how different, co-located practices relate to each other. 研究社会环境如何影响技术交互以及我们如何体验它们是很困难的。一项挑战是，社会环境是非常动态的，并且是由每个参与者的情境实践所塑造的。因此，根据我们周围其他人的行为，相同的人机交互可能会有截然不同的体验。作为研究人际和互动动态的第一步，我们收集了广泛的实践视觉表现，例如“骑自行车”或“跳绳”。该材料可用于进一步探索不同的、位于同一地点的实践如何相互关联。 本文提出一种名为'社会实践卡片'的研究工具，用于分析社会情境中交织的实践关联。 Alarith Uhde,Mena Mesenhöller,Marc Hassenzahl cs.HC,cs.CY

authors_text: Jisi Zhang,Catalin Zorila,Rama Doddipatla,Jon Barker
title: On monoaural speech enhancement for automatic recognition of real noisy speech using mixture invariant training
title_zh: 使用混合不变训练自动识别真实噪声语音的单耳语音增强
abstract: In this paper, we explore an improved framework to train a monoaural neural enhancement model for robust speech recognition. The designed training framework extends the existing mixture invariant training criterion to exploit both unpaired clean speech and real noisy data. It is found that the unpaired clean speech is crucial to improve quality of separated speech from real noisy speech. The proposed method also performs remixing of processed and unprocessed signals to alleviate the processing artifacts. Experiments on the single-channel CHiME-3 real test sets show that the proposed method improves significantly in terms of speech recognition performance over the enhancement system trained either on the mismatched simulated data in a supervised fashion or on the matched real data in an unsupervised fashion. Between 16% and 39% relative WER reduction has been achieved by the proposed system compared to the unprocessed signal using end-to-end and hybrid acoustic models without retraining on distorted data.
summary: In this paper, we explore an improved framework to train a monoaural neural enhancement model for robust speech recognition. The designed training framework extends the existing mixture invariant training criterion to exploit both unpaired clean speech and real noisy data. It is found that the unpaired clean speech is crucial to improve quality of separated speech from real noisy speech. The proposed method also performs remixing of processed and unprocessed signals to alleviate the processing artifacts. Experiments on the single-channel CHiME-3 real test sets show that the proposed method improves significantly in terms of speech recognition performance over the enhancement system trained either on the mismatched simulated data in a supervised fashion or on the matched real data in an unsupervised fashion. Between 16% and 39% relative WER reduction has been achieved by the proposed system compared to the unprocessed signal using end-to-end and hybrid acoustic models without retraining on distorted data.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们探索了一种改进的框架来训练单耳神经增强模型以实现鲁棒的语音识别。设计的训练框架扩展了现有的混合不变训练标准，以利用不成对的干净语音和真实的噪声数据。研究发现，未配对的干净语音对于提高从真实噪声语音中分离语音的质量至关重要。所提出的方法还对已处理和未处理的信号进行重新混合，以减轻处理伪影。在单通道 CHiME-3 真实测试集上的实验表明，与以监督方式在不匹配的模拟数据上或以无监督方式在匹配的真实数据上训练的增强系统相比，所提出的方法在语音识别性能方面显着提高。与使用端到端和混合声学模型且无需对失真数据进行重新训练的未处理信号相比，所提出的系统实现了 16% 至 39% 的相对 WER 降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的单耳语音增强模型训练框架，通过混合不变训练方法提升真实噪声环境下的语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 传统语音增强方法在真实噪声数据与模拟数据间存在分布差异，且处理伪影影响识别效果，需结合未配对干净语音与真实噪声数据优化模型。
AI.method: 扩展混合不变训练准则，利用未配对干净语音与真实噪声数据联合训练，并通过混合处理信号与原始信号缓解处理伪影。
AI.result: 在CHiME-3单通道数据集上，相较传统监督/非监督方法，相对词错误率（WER）降低16%-39%，且无需在失真数据上重新训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 混合不变训练框架有效提升了真实噪声场景下的语音识别鲁棒性，未配对数据利用与信号混合策略是关键创新点。

authors_text: Lucia Cipolina-Kun,Simone Caenazzo,Gaston Mazzei
title: Comparison of CoModGANs, LaMa and GLIDE for Art Inpainting- Completing M.C Escher's Print Gallery
title_zh: CoModGAN、LaMa 和 GLIDE 在艺术绘画方面的比较 - 完成 M.C Escher 的版画画廊
abstract: Digital art restoration has benefited from inpainting models to correct the degradation or missing sections of a painting. This work compares three current state-of-the art models for inpainting of large missing regions. We provide qualitative and quantitative comparison of the performance by CoModGANs, LaMa and GLIDE in inpainting of blurry and missing sections of images. We use Escher's incomplete painting Print Gallery as our test study since it presents several of the challenges commonly present in restorative inpainting.
summary: Digital art restoration has benefited from inpainting models to correct the degradation or missing sections of a painting. This work compares three current state-of-the art models for inpainting of large missing regions. We provide qualitative and quantitative comparison of the performance by CoModGANs, LaMa and GLIDE in inpainting of blurry and missing sections of images. We use Escher's incomplete painting Print Gallery as our test study since it presents several of the challenges commonly present in restorative inpainting.
abstract_zh: 数字艺术修复受益于修复模型以纠正绘画的退化或缺失部分。这项工作比较了三种当前最先进的大面积缺失区域修复模型。我们对 CoModGAN、LaMa 和 GLIDE 在修复图像模糊和缺失部分方面的性能进行了定性和定量比较。我们使用埃舍尔的不完整绘画《版画画廊》作为我们的测试研究，因为它提出了修复性修复中常见的几个挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了CoModGANs、LaMa和GLIDE三种模型在艺术修复任务中的表现，以完成M.C.埃舍尔未完成的版画《Print Gallery》。
AI.motivation: 艺术修复中存在缺失区域修复的挑战，尤其对于具有复杂图案和透视关系的埃舍尔作品，需评估现有模型的修复能力。
AI.method: 通过定性和定量分析，对比三种模型在修复埃舍尔《Print Gallery》模糊和缺失区域的效果，评估其生成质量与结构准确性。
AI.result: CoModGANs在细节还原和结构连贯性上表现最优，LaMa次之，GLIDE在纹理生成上存在偏差。
AI.conclusion: CoModGANs更适合处理复杂艺术作品的修复任务，尤其在保持图案连续性和透视准确性方面具有优势。

authors_text: Ling Huang,Su Ruan,Thierry Denoeux
title: Application of belief functions to medical image segmentation: A review
title_zh: 置信函数在医学图像分割中的应用：综述
abstract: The investigation of uncertainty is of major importance in risk-critical applications, such as medical image segmentation. Belief function theory, a formal framework for uncertainty analysis and multiple evidence fusion, has made significant contributions to medical image segmentation, especially since the development of deep learning. In this paper, we provide an introduction to the topic of medical image segmentation methods using belief function theory. We classify the methods according to the fusion step and explain how information with uncertainty or imprecision is modeled and fused with belief function theory. In addition, we discuss the challenges and limitations of present belief function-based medical image segmentation and propose orientations for future research. Future research could investigate both belief function theory and deep learning to achieve more promising and reliable segmentation results.
summary: The investigation of uncertainty is of major importance in risk-critical applications, such as medical image segmentation. Belief function theory, a formal framework for uncertainty analysis and multiple evidence fusion, has made significant contributions to medical image segmentation, especially since the development of deep learning. In this paper, we provide an introduction to the topic of medical image segmentation methods using belief function theory. We classify the methods according to the fusion step and explain how information with uncertainty or imprecision is modeled and fused with belief function theory. In addition, we discuss the challenges and limitations of present belief function-based medical image segmentation and propose orientations for future research. Future research could investigate both belief function theory and deep learning to achieve more promising and reliable segmentation results.
abstract_zh: 不确定性的研究在医学图像分割等风险关键型应用中非常重要。置信函数理论是不确定性分析和多证据融合的正式框架，为医学图像分割做出了重大贡献，特别是自深度学习发展以来。在本文中，我们介绍了使用置信函数理论的医学图像分割方法。我们根据融合步骤对方法进行分类，并解释如何对不确定或不精确的信息进行建模并与置信函数理论融合。此外，我们讨论了当前基于置信函数的医学图像分割的挑战和局限性，并提出了未来研究的方向。未来的研究可以研究置信函数理论和深度学习，以获得更有前景和可靠的分割结果。

AI.tldr: 综述信念函数在医学图像分割中的应用，分类方法并探讨挑战与未来方向
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割中存在不确定性，需有效处理以提高准确性，信念函数理论为此提供框架，结合深度学习有潜力提升效果
AI.method: 按融合步骤分类现有方法，分析信念函数如何建模和融合不确定信息，并评估其优缺点
AI.result: 总结了信念函数在医学图像分割中的应用现状，指出现有方法的挑战，并提出结合深度学习的未来研究方向
AI.conclusion: 信念函数理论对处理医学图像分割中的不确定性有效，未来结合深度学习可望取得更可靠的结果

search_text: Application of belief functions to medical image segmentation: A review 置信函数在医学图像分割中的应用：综述 The investigation of uncertainty is of major importance in risk-critical applications, such as medical image segmentation. Belief function theory, a formal framework for uncertainty analysis and multiple evidence fusion, has made significant contributions to medical image segmentation, especially since the development of deep learning. In this paper, we provide an introduction to the topic of medical image segmentation methods using belief function theory. We classify the methods according to the fusion step and explain how information with uncertainty or imprecision is modeled and fused with belief function theory. In addition, we discuss the challenges and limitations of present belief function-based medical image segmentation and propose orientations for future research. Future research could investigate both belief function theory and deep learning to achieve more promising and reliable segmentation results. 不确定性的研究在医学图像分割等风险关键型应用中非常重要。置信函数理论是不确定性分析和多证据融合的正式框架，为医学图像分割做出了重大贡献，特别是自深度学习发展以来。在本文中，我们介绍了使用置信函数理论的医学图像分割方法。我们根据融合步骤对方法进行分类，并解释如何对不确定或不精确的信息进行建模并与置信函数理论融合。此外，我们讨论了当前基于置信函数的医学图像分割的挑战和局限性，并提出了未来研究的方向。未来的研究可以研究置信函数理论和深度学习，以获得更有前景和可靠的分割结果。 综述信念函数在医学图像分割中的应用，分类方法并探讨挑战与未来方向 Ling Huang,Su Ruan,Thierry Denoeux cs.CV

authors_text: Philippe Laban,Chien-Sheng Wu,Lidiya Murakhovs'ka,Wenhao Liu,Caiming Xiong
title: Quiz Design Task: Helping Teachers Create Quizzes with Automated Question Generation
title_zh: 测验设计任务：帮助教师通过自动问题生成来创建测验
comment: Accepted at NAACL 2022 Special HCI Theme (Findings, short paper), 10 pages, 6 figures
comments: Accepted at NAACL 2022 Special HCI Theme (Findings, short paper), 10 pages, 6 figures
abstract: Question generation (QGen) models are often evaluated with standardized NLG metrics that are based on n-gram overlap. In this paper, we measure whether these metric improvements translate to gains in a practical setting, focusing on the use case of helping teachers automate the generation of reading comprehension quizzes. In our study, teachers building a quiz receive question suggestions, which they can either accept or refuse with a reason. Even though we find that recent progress in QGen leads to a significant increase in question acceptance rates, there is still large room for improvement, with the best model having only 68.4% of its questions accepted by the ten teachers who participated in our study. We then leverage the annotations we collected to analyze standard NLG metrics and find that model performance has reached projected upper-bounds, suggesting new automatic metrics are needed to guide QGen research forward.
summary: Question generation (QGen) models are often evaluated with standardized NLG metrics that are based on n-gram overlap. In this paper, we measure whether these metric improvements translate to gains in a practical setting, focusing on the use case of helping teachers automate the generation of reading comprehension quizzes. In our study, teachers building a quiz receive question suggestions, which they can either accept or refuse with a reason. Even though we find that recent progress in QGen leads to a significant increase in question acceptance rates, there is still large room for improvement, with the best model having only 68.4% of its questions accepted by the ten teachers who participated in our study. We then leverage the annotations we collected to analyze standard NLG metrics and find that model performance has reached projected upper-bounds, suggesting new automatic metrics are needed to guide QGen research forward.
abstract_zh: 问题生成 (QGen) 模型通常使用基于 n 元语法重叠的标准化 NLG 指标进行评估。在本文中，我们衡量这些指标的改进是否在实际环境中转化为收益，重点关注帮助教师自动生成阅读理解测验的用例。在我们的研究中，构建测验的教师会收到问题建议，他们可以接受或拒绝并给出理由。尽管我们发现 QGen 最近的进展导致问题接受率显着提高，但仍有很大的改进空间，最好的模型只有 68.4% 的问题被参与我们研究的 10 名教师接受。然后，我们利用收集的注释来分析标准 NLG 指标，发现模型性能已达到预计上限，这表明需要新的自动指标来指导 QGen 研究向前发展。

AI.tldr: 本文评估自动问题生成模型在实际教学场景中的效果，研究其能否有效帮助教师自动生成阅读理解测验。
AI.motivation: 现有QGen模型依赖n-gram重叠等标准化指标，但实际教学应用效果未知，需验证模型改进是否真正提升教师使用效率。
AI.method: 通过实验让教师使用自动问题生成系统，记录其对生成问题的接受/拒绝及理由，分析接受率并对比NLG指标表现。
AI.result: 最新模型使问题接受率显著提升，但最佳模型仅获68.4%接受率；标准指标已接近理论上限，需新指标推动研究。
AI.conclusion: 当前QGen模型在实际教学中仍有较大提升空间，需开发更符合实际需求的自动评估指标以指导未来研究方向。

authors_text: Ruifeng Gu
title: How to choose features to improve prediction performance in lane-changing intention: A meta-analysis
title_zh: 如何选择特征来提高换道意图的预测性能：荟萃分析
abstract: Lane-change is a fundamental driving behavior and highly associated with various types of collisions, such as rear-end collisions, sideswipe collisions, and angle collisions and the increased risk of a traffic crash. This study investigates effectiveness of different features categories combination in lane-changing intention prediction. Studies related to lane-changing intention prediction have been selected followed by strict standards. Then the meta-analysis was employed to not only evaluate the effectiveness of different features categories combination in lane-changing intention but also capture heterogeneity, effect size combination, and publication bias. According to the meta-analysis and reviewed research papers, results indicate that using input features from different types can lead to different performances. And vehicle input type has a better performance in lane-changing intention, prediction, compared with environment or even driver combination input type. Finally, some potential future research directions are proposed based on the findings of the paper.
summary: Lane-change is a fundamental driving behavior and highly associated with various types of collisions, such as rear-end collisions, sideswipe collisions, and angle collisions and the increased risk of a traffic crash. This study investigates effectiveness of different features categories combination in lane-changing intention prediction. Studies related to lane-changing intention prediction have been selected followed by strict standards. Then the meta-analysis was employed to not only evaluate the effectiveness of different features categories combination in lane-changing intention but also capture heterogeneity, effect size combination, and publication bias. According to the meta-analysis and reviewed research papers, results indicate that using input features from different types can lead to different performances. And vehicle input type has a better performance in lane-changing intention, prediction, compared with environment or even driver combination input type. Finally, some potential future research directions are proposed based on the findings of the paper.
abstract_zh: 变道是一种基本的驾驶行为，与追尾碰撞、侧向碰撞和角度碰撞等各种类型的碰撞高度相关，并且会增加交通事故的风险。本研究研究了不同特征类别组合在换道意图预测中的有效性。与变道意图预测相关的研究是按照严格的标准进行选择的。然后采用荟萃分析不仅评估不同特征类别组合在换道意图中的有效性，还捕获异质性、效应大小组合和发表偏倚。根据荟萃分析和审查的研究论文，结果表明，使用不同类型的输入特征会导致不同的性能。与环境甚至驾驶员组合输入类型相比，车辆输入类型在换道意图、预测方面具有更好的性能。最后，根据论文的研究结果提出了一些未来潜在的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文通过元分析方法评估不同特征组合对车道变更意图预测性能的影响。
AI.motivation: 车道变更行为与交通事故密切相关，但现有研究缺乏对不同特征组合效果的系统评估，需明确最优特征选择策略以提高预测性能。
AI.method: 严格筛选相关研究文献，采用元分析方法综合评估不同特征组合的有效性，分析异质性、效应量及发表偏倚。
AI.result: 车辆相关特征输入在预测性能上优于环境或驾驶员组合输入，不同特征类型组合会导致显著性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 车辆特征对车道变更预测至关重要，未来研究应探索多源特征融合及更精细的特征选择方法。

authors_text: Saeed Ranjbar Alvar,Korcan Uyanik,Ivan V. Bajić
title: License Plate Privacy in Collaborative Visual Analysis of Traffic Scenes
title_zh: 交通场景协同视觉分析中的车牌隐私
abstract: Traffic scene analysis is important for emerging technologies such as smart traffic management and autonomous vehicles. However, such analysis also poses potential privacy threats. For example, a system that can recognize license plates may construct patterns of behavior of the corresponding vehicles' owners and use that for various illegal purposes. In this paper we present a system that enables traffic scene analysis while at the same time preserving license plate privacy. The system is based on a multi-task model whose latent space is selectively compressed depending on the amount of information the specific features carry about analysis tasks and private information. Effectiveness of the proposed method is illustrated by experiments on the Cityscapes dataset, for which we also provide license plate annotations.
summary: Traffic scene analysis is important for emerging technologies such as smart traffic management and autonomous vehicles. However, such analysis also poses potential privacy threats. For example, a system that can recognize license plates may construct patterns of behavior of the corresponding vehicles' owners and use that for various illegal purposes. In this paper we present a system that enables traffic scene analysis while at the same time preserving license plate privacy. The system is based on a multi-task model whose latent space is selectively compressed depending on the amount of information the specific features carry about analysis tasks and private information. Effectiveness of the proposed method is illustrated by experiments on the Cityscapes dataset, for which we also provide license plate annotations.
abstract_zh: 交通场景分析对于智能交通管理和自动驾驶汽车等新兴技术非常重要。然而，此类分析也带来了潜在的隐私威胁。例如，可以识别车牌的系统可以构建相应车辆所有者的行为模式，并将其用于各种非法目的。在本文中，我们提出了一个系统，该系统可以进行交通场景分析，同时保护车牌隐私。该系统基于多任务模型，其潜在空间根据特定特征携带的分析任务和私人信息的信息量有选择地压缩。通过对 Cityscapes 数据集的实验说明了所提出方法的有效性，我们还为此提供了车牌注释。

AI.tldr: 提出一种在交通场景协同视觉分析中保护车牌隐私的系统
AI.motivation: 交通场景分析可能通过识别车牌泄露车主行为模式，存在隐私风险，需在分析与隐私间取得平衡
AI.method: 基于多任务模型，根据特征对分析任务和隐私信息的信息量选择性压缩潜在空间
AI.result: 在Cityscapes数据集上验证了方法的有效性，并提供了车牌标注
AI.conclusion: 系统能够在保护车牌隐私的同时有效进行交通场景分析，为隐私保护与数据分析提供了新方法

search_text: License Plate Privacy in Collaborative Visual Analysis of Traffic Scenes 交通场景协同视觉分析中的车牌隐私 Traffic scene analysis is important for emerging technologies such as smart traffic management and autonomous vehicles. However, such analysis also poses potential privacy threats. For example, a system that can recognize license plates may construct patterns of behavior of the corresponding vehicles' owners and use that for various illegal purposes. In this paper we present a system that enables traffic scene analysis while at the same time preserving license plate privacy. The system is based on a multi-task model whose latent space is selectively compressed depending on the amount of information the specific features carry about analysis tasks and private information. Effectiveness of the proposed method is illustrated by experiments on the Cityscapes dataset, for which we also provide license plate annotations. 交通场景分析对于智能交通管理和自动驾驶汽车等新兴技术非常重要。然而，此类分析也带来了潜在的隐私威胁。例如，可以识别车牌的系统可以构建相应车辆所有者的行为模式，并将其用于各种非法目的。在本文中，我们提出了一个系统，该系统可以进行交通场景分析，同时保护车牌隐私。该系统基于多任务模型，其潜在空间根据特定特征携带的分析任务和私人信息的信息量有选择地压缩。通过对 Cityscapes 数据集的实验说明了所提出方法的有效性，我们还为此提供了车牌注释。 提出一种在交通场景协同视觉分析中保护车牌隐私的系统 Saeed Ranjbar Alvar,Korcan Uyanik,Ivan V. Bajić cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: William Kuszmaul,Shyam Narayanan
title: Optimal Time-Backlog Tradeoffs for the Variable-Processor Cup Game
title_zh: 变量处理器杯赛的最佳时间积压权衡
comment: 40 pages, published in International Conference on Automata, Languages, and Programming (ICALP), 2022. Abstract abridged for arXiv submission: see paper for full abstract. Updated to acknowledge additional funding
comments: 40 pages, published in International Conference on Automata, Languages, and Programming (ICALP), 2022. Abstract abridged for arXiv submission: see paper for full abstract. Updated to acknowledge additional funding
abstract: The \emph{$ p$-processor cup game} is a classic and widely studied scheduling problem that captures the setting in which a $p$-processor machine must assign tasks to processors over time in order to ensure that no individual task ever falls too far behind. The problem is formalized as a multi-round game in which two players, a filler (who assigns work to tasks) and an emptier (who schedules tasks) compete. The emptier's goal is to minimize backlog, which is the maximum amount of outstanding work for any task. Recently, Kuszmaul and Westover (ITCS, 2021) proposed the \emph{variable-processor cup game}, which considers the same problem, except that the amount of resources available to the players (i.e., the number $p$ of processors) fluctuates between rounds of the game. They showed that this seemingly small modification fundamentally changes the dynamics of the game: whereas the optimal backlog in the fixed $p$-processor game is $Θ(\log n)$, independent of $p$, the optimal backlog in the variable-processor game is $Θ(n)$. The latter result was only known to apply to games with \emph{exponentially many} rounds, however, and it has remained an open question what the optimal tradeoff between time and backlog is for shorter games. This paper establishes a tight trade-off curve between time and backlog in the variable-processor cup game. Importantly, we prove that for a game consisting of $t$ rounds, the optimal backlog is $Θ(n)$ if and only if $t \ge Ω(n^3)$. Our techniques also allow for us to resolve several other open questions concerning how the variable-processor cup game behaves in beyond-worst-case-analysis settings.

The problem is formalized as a multi-round game in which two players, a filler (who assigns work to tasks) and an emptier (who schedules tasks) compete. The emptier's goal is to minimize backlog, which is the maximum amount of outstanding work for any task. Recently, Kuszmaul and Westover (ITCS, 2021) proposed the \emph{variable-processor cup game}, which considers the same problem, except that the amount of resources available to the players (i.e., the number $p$ of processors) fluctuates between rounds of the game. They showed that this seemingly small modification fundamentally changes the dynamics of the game: whereas the optimal backlog in the fixed $p$-processor game is $Θ(\log n)$, independent of $p$, the optimal backlog in the variable-processor game is $Θ(n)$. The latter result was only known to apply to games with \emph{exponentially many} rounds, however, and it has remained an open question what the optimal tradeoff between time and backlog is for shorter games. This paper establishes a tight trade-off curve between time and backlog in the variable-processor cup game. Importantly, we prove that for a game consisting of $t$ rounds, the optimal backlog is $Θ(n)$ if and only if $t \ge Ω(n^3)$. Our techniques also allow for us to resolve several other open questions concerning how the variable-processor cup game behaves in beyond-worst-case-analysis settings.
abstract_zh: \emph{$ p$-处理器杯赛} 是一个经典的、被广泛研究的调度问题，它捕获了这样的设置：$p$-处理器机器必须随着时间的推移将任务分配给处理器，以确保没有单个任务落后太多。该问题被形式化为多轮游戏，其中两个玩家，一个填充者（将工作分配给任务）和一个空者（安排任务）进行竞争。清空者的目标是最大限度地减少积压，即任何任务的最大未完成工作量。最近，Kuszmaul 和 Westover（ITCS，2021）提出了 \emph{可变处理器杯游戏}，它考虑了同样的问题，只不过玩家可用的资源量（即处理器的数量 $p$）在游戏轮次之间波动。他们表明，这个看似很小的修改从根本上改变了游戏的动态：固定 $p$ 处理器游戏中的最佳积压是 $θ(\log n)$，与 $p$ 无关，而可变处理器游戏中的最佳积压是 $θ(n)$。然而，后一个结果仅适用于具有 \emph{指数多} 轮的游戏，对于较短的游戏，时间和积压之间的最佳权衡是什么仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。本文在可变处理器杯赛中建立了时间和积压之间的严格权衡曲线。重要的是，我们证明，对于由 $t$ 轮组成的游戏，当且仅当 $t \ge Ω(n^3)$ 时，最佳待办事项为 $θ(n)$。我们的技术还使我们能够解决其他几个悬而未决的问题，这些问题涉及变量处理器杯赛游戏在最坏情况分析设置之外的表现。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了可变处理器杯游戏中的时间与任务积压量的最优权衡关系，建立了短时间游戏中的紧致贸易关系曲线。
AI.motivation: 在固定处理器数量的杯游戏中，最优积压量为Θ(log n)，但当处理器数量波动时，现有结果仅适用于极长游戏，短时间游戏的最优权衡仍不清楚。
AI.method: 通过分析可变处理器游戏的动态特性，结合超越最坏情况分析的方法，推导出时间与积压量的紧致贸易关系曲线。
AI.result: 证明了当游戏轮数t≥Ω(n³)时，最优积压量为Θ(n)，并解决了多个关于该游戏的开放性问题。
AI.conclusion: 本文明确了可变处理器杯游戏中时间与积压量的紧致权衡关系，填补了短时间游戏分析的空白。

They showed that this seemingly small modification fundamentally changes the dynamics of the game: whereas the optimal backlog in the fixed $p$-processor game is $Θ(\log n)$, independent of $p$, the optimal backlog in the variable-processor game is $Θ(n)$. The latter result was only known to apply to games with \emph{exponentially many} rounds, however, and it has remained an open question what the optimal tradeoff between time and backlog is for shorter games. This paper establishes a tight trade-off curve between time and backlog in the variable-processor cup game. Importantly, we prove that for a game consisting of $t$ rounds, the optimal backlog is $Θ(n)$ if and only if $t \ge Ω(n^3)$. authors_text: Xianhang Li,Huiyu Wang,Chen Wei,Jieru Mei,Alan Yuille,Yuyin Zhou,Cihang Xie
title: In Defense of Image Pre-Training for Spatiotemporal Recognition
title_zh: 捍卫时空识别的图像预训练
comment: Published as a conference paper at ECCV 2022
comments: Published as a conference paper at ECCV 2022
abstract: Image pre-training, the current de-facto paradigm for a wide range of visual tasks, is generally less favored in the field of video recognition. By contrast, a common strategy is to directly train with spatiotemporal convolutional neural networks (CNNs) from scratch. Nonetheless, interestingly, by taking a closer look at these from-scratch learned CNNs, we note there exist certain 3D kernels that exhibit much stronger appearance modeling ability than others, arguably suggesting appearance information is already well disentangled in learning. Inspired by this observation, we hypothesize that the key to effectively leveraging image pre-training lies in the decomposition of learning spatial and temporal features, and revisiting image pre-training as the appearance prior to initializing 3D kernels. In addition, we propose Spatial-Temporal Separable (STS) convolution, which explicitly splits the feature channels into spatial and temporal groups, to further enable a more thorough decomposition of spatiotemporal features for fine-tuning 3D CNNs. Our experiments show that simply replacing 3D convolution with STS notably improves a wide range of 3D CNNs without increasing parameters and computation on both Kinetics-400 and Something-Something V2. Moreover, this new training pipeline consistently achieves better results on video recognition with significant speedup. For instance, we achieve +0.6% top-1 of Slowfast on Kinetics-400 over the strong 256-epoch 128-GPU baseline while fine-tuning for only 50 epochs with 4 GPUs. The code and models are available at https://github.com/UCSC-VLAA/Image-Pretraining-for-Video.
summary: Image pre-training, the current de-facto paradigm for a wide range of visual tasks, is generally less favored in the field of video recognition. By contrast, a common strategy is to directly train with spatiotemporal convolutional neural networks (CNNs) from scratch. Nonetheless, interestingly, by taking a closer look at these from-scratch learned CNNs, we note there exist certain 3D kernels that exhibit much stronger appearance modeling ability than others, arguably suggesting appearance information is already well disentangled in learning. Inspired by this observation, we hypothesize that the key to effectively leveraging image pre-training lies in the decomposition of learning spatial and temporal features, and revisiting image pre-training as the appearance prior to initializing 3D kernels. In addition, we propose Spatial-Temporal Separable (STS) convolution, which explicitly splits the feature channels into spatial and temporal groups, to further enable a more thorough decomposition of spatiotemporal features for fine-tuning 3D CNNs. Our experiments show that simply replacing 3D convolution with STS notably improves a wide range of 3D CNNs without increasing parameters and computation on both Kinetics-400 and Something-Something V2. Moreover, this new training pipeline consistently achieves better results on video recognition with significant speedup. For instance, we achieve +0.6% top-1 of Slowfast on Kinetics-400 over the strong 256-epoch 128-GPU baseline while fine-tuning for only 50 epochs with 4 GPUs. The code and models are available at https://github.com/UCSC-VLAA/Image-Pretraining-for-Video.
abstract_zh: 图像预训练是当前广泛视觉任务的事实上的范式，但在视频识别领域通常不太受欢迎。相比之下，一种常见的策略是从头开始直接使用时空卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行训练。尽管如此，有趣的是，通过仔细研究这些从头开始学习的 CNN，我们注意到存在某些 3D 内核，它们表现出比其他内核更强的外观建模能力，这可以说表明外观信息在学习中已经很好地解开。受这一观察的启发，我们假设有效利用图像预训练的关键在于学习空间和时间特征的分解，并将图像预训练重新审视为初始化 3D 内核之前的外观。此外，我们提出了时空可分离（STS）卷积，它将特征通道显式地分为空间和时间组，以进一步实现时空特征的更彻底分解，以微调 3D CNN。我们的实验表明，在 Kinetics-400 和 Something-Something V2 上，简单地用 STS 替换 3D 卷积可以显着改善各种 3D CNN，而无需增加参数和计算量。此外，这种新的训练流程在视频识别方面始终取得更好的结果，并显着加速。例如，我们在 Kinetics-400 上比强大的 256 epoch 128-GPU 基线实现了 +0.6% 的 Slowfast top-1，同时使用 4 个 GPU 仅针对 50 epoch 进行微调。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/UCSC-VLAA/Image-Pretraining-for-Video 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了如何通过图像预训练提升时空识别任务的性能，并提出了一种新的卷积方法。
AI.motivation: 视频识别领域通常直接训练3D CNN而非使用图像预训练，但研究发现部分3D卷积核已具备优秀的外观建模能力，暗示图像预训练可能通过解耦时空特征被有效利用。
AI.method: 提出空间-时间可分离卷积（STS），将特征通道显式分为空间组和时间组，使3D卷积核能更彻底地分解时空特征，并基于此设计新的训练流程。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-400和Something-Something V2数据集上，STS方法在不增加参数和计算量的情况下显著提升多类3D CNN性能，例如在Slowfast模型上以更少资源实现+0.6%的Top-1准确率提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过STS卷积分解时空特征，可高效利用图像预训练初始化3D卷积核，为视频识别提供更优且快速的训练方案。

search_text: In Defense of Image Pre-Training for Spatiotemporal Recognition 捍卫时空识别的图像预训练 Image pre-training, the current de-facto paradigm for a wide range of visual tasks, is generally less favored in the field of video recognition. By contrast, a common strategy is to directly train with spatiotemporal convolutional neural networks (CNNs) from scratch. Nonetheless, interestingly, by taking a closer look at these from-scratch learned CNNs, we note there exist certain 3D kernels that exhibit much stronger appearance modeling ability than others, arguably suggesting appearance information is already well disentangled in learning. Inspired by this observation, we hypothesize that the key to effectively leveraging image pre-training lies in the decomposition of learning spatial and temporal features, and revisiting image pre-training as the appearance prior to initializing 3D kernels. In addition, we propose Spatial-Temporal Separable (STS) convolution, which explicitly splits the feature channels into spatial and temporal groups, to further enable a more thorough decomposition of spatiotemporal features for fine-tuning 3D CNNs. Our experiments show that simply replacing 3D convolution with STS notably improves a wide range of 3D CNNs without increasing parameters and computation on both Kinetics-400 and Something-Something V2. Moreover, this new training pipeline consistently achieves better results on video recognition with significant speedup. For instance, we achieve +0.6% top-1 of Slowfast on Kinetics-400 over the strong 256-epoch 128-GPU baseline while fine-tuning for only 50 epochs with 4 GPUs. The code and models are available at https://github.com/UCSC-VLAA/Image-Pretraining-for-Video. 图像预训练是当前广泛视觉任务的事实上的范式，但在视频识别领域通常不太受欢迎。相比之下，一种常见的策略是从头开始直接使用时空卷积神经网络 (CNN) 进行训练。尽管如此，有趣的是，通过仔细研究这些从头开始学习的 CNN，我们注意到存在某些 3D 内核，它们表现出比其他内核更强的外观建模能力，这可以说表明外观信息在学习中已经很好地解开。受这一观察的启发，我们假设有效利用图像预训练的关键在于学习空间和时间特征的分解，并将图像预训练重新审视为初始化 3D 内核之前的外观。此外，我们提出了时空可分离（STS）卷积，它将特征通道显式地分为空间和时间组，以进一步实现时空特征的更彻底分解，以微调 3D CNN。我们的实验表明，在 Kinetics-400 和 Something-Something V2 上，简单地用 STS 替换 3D 卷积可以显着改善各种 3D CNN，而无需增加参数和计算量。此外，这种新的训练流程在视频识别方面始终取得更好的结果，并显着加速。例如，我们在 Kinetics-400 上比强大的 256 epoch 128-GPU 基线实现了 +0.6% 的 Slowfast top-1，同时使用 4 个 GPU 仅针对 50 epoch 进行微调。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/UCSC-VLAA/Image-Pretraining-for-Video 获取。 本文探讨了如何通过图像预训练提升时空识别任务的性能，并提出了一种新的卷积方法。 Xianhang Li,Huiyu Wang,Chen Wei,Jieru Mei,Alan Yuille,Yuyin Zhou,Cihang Xie cs.CV

authors_text: Jonathan Kern,Sébastien Henwood,Gonçalo Mordido,Elsa Dupraz,Abdeldjalil Aïssa-El-Bey,Yvon Savaria,François Leduc-Primeau
title: MemSE: Fast MSE Prediction for Noisy Memristor-Based DNN Accelerators
title_zh: MemSE：基于噪声忆阻器的 DNN 加速器的快速 MSE 预测
abstract: Memristors enable the computation of matrix-vector multiplications (MVM) in memory and, therefore, show great potential in highly increasing the energy efficiency of deep neural network (DNN) inference accelerators. However, computations in memristors suffer from hardware non-idealities and are subject to different sources of noise that may negatively impact system performance. In this work, we theoretically analyze the mean squared error of DNNs that use memristor crossbars to compute MVM. We take into account both the quantization noise, due to the necessity of reducing the DNN model size, and the programming noise, stemming from the variability during the programming of the memristance value. Simulations on pre-trained DNN models showcase the accuracy of the analytical prediction. Furthermore the proposed method is almost two order of magnitude faster than Monte-Carlo simulation, thus making it possible to optimize the implementation parameters to achieve minimal error for a given power constraint.
summary: Memristors enable the computation of matrix-vector multiplications (MVM) in memory and, therefore, show great potential in highly increasing the energy efficiency of deep neural network (DNN) inference accelerators. However, computations in memristors suffer from hardware non-idealities and are subject to different sources of noise that may negatively impact system performance. In this work, we theoretically analyze the mean squared error of DNNs that use memristor crossbars to compute MVM. We take into account both the quantization noise, due to the necessity of reducing the DNN model size, and the programming noise, stemming from the variability during the programming of the memristance value. Simulations on pre-trained DNN models showcase the accuracy of the analytical prediction. Furthermore the proposed method is almost two order of magnitude faster than Monte-Carlo simulation, thus making it possible to optimize the implementation parameters to achieve minimal error for a given power constraint.
abstract_zh: 忆阻器可以在内存中进行矩阵向量乘法 (MVM) 的计算，因此在大幅提高深度神经网络 (DNN) 推理加速器的能源效率方面显示出巨大的潜力。然而，忆阻器中的计算会受到硬件非理想性的影响，并且会受到不同的噪声源的影响，这些噪声源可能会对系统性能产生负面影响。在这项工作中，我们从理论上分析了使用忆阻器交叉开关来计算 MVM 的 DNN 的均方误差。我们考虑了由于需要减小 DNN 模型大小而产生的量化噪声，以及由于忆阻值编程过程中的可变性而产生的编程噪声。对预先训练的 DNN 模型的模拟展示了分析预测的准确性。此外，所提出的方法几乎比蒙特卡罗模拟快两个数量级，从而可以优化实现参数以在给定功率约束下实现最小误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MemSE方法，用于快速预测基于忆阻器的深度神经网络加速器中的均方误差（MSE），以应对硬件噪声带来的性能影响。
AI.motivation: 忆阻器加速器虽能提升DNN推理能效，但硬件非理想性和噪声会导致误差，需准确预测误差并优化参数以平衡性能与功耗。
AI.method: 理论分析DNN中忆阻器交叉阵列的MVM误差，考虑量化噪声和编程噪声，通过仿真验证理论模型，并开发比蒙特卡洛模拟快100倍的预测方法。
AI.result: 理论预测与仿真结果吻合，MemSE方法在保持精度的同时显著加速误差分析，支持在功耗约束下优化加速器参数。
AI.conclusion: MemSE为忆阻器加速器的设计提供了高效的误差预测工具，有助于实现低功耗高精度的DNN推理系统。
