authors_text: Mohammad Baradaran,Robert Bergevin
title: Object Class Aware Video Anomaly Detection through Image Translation
title_zh: 通过图像转换进行对象类感知视频异常检测
abstract: Semi-supervised video anomaly detection (VAD) methods formulate the task of anomaly detection as detection of deviations from the learned normal patterns. Previous works in the field (reconstruction or prediction-based methods) suffer from two drawbacks: 1) They focus on low-level features, and they (especially holistic approaches) do not effectively consider the object classes. 2) Object-centric approaches neglect some of the context information (such as location). To tackle these challenges, this paper proposes a novel two-stream object-aware VAD method that learns the normal appearance and motion patterns through image translation tasks. The appearance branch translates the input image to the target semantic segmentation map produced by Mask-RCNN, and the motion branch associates each frame with its expected optical flow magnitude. Any deviation from the expected appearance or motion in the inference stage shows the degree of potential abnormality. We evaluated our proposed method on the ShanghaiTech, UCSD-Ped1, and UCSD-Ped2 datasets and the results show competitive performance compared with state-of-the-art works. Most importantly, the results show that, as significant improvements to previous methods, detections by our method are completely explainable and anomalies are localized accurately in the frames.
summary: Semi-supervised video anomaly detection (VAD) methods formulate the task of anomaly detection as detection of deviations from the learned normal patterns. Previous works in the field (reconstruction or prediction-based methods) suffer from two drawbacks: 1) They focus on low-level features, and they (especially holistic approaches) do not effectively consider the object classes. 2) Object-centric approaches neglect some of the context information (such as location). To tackle these challenges, this paper proposes a novel two-stream object-aware VAD method that learns the normal appearance and motion patterns through image translation tasks. The appearance branch translates the input image to the target semantic segmentation map produced by Mask-RCNN, and the motion branch associates each frame with its expected optical flow magnitude. Any deviation from the expected appearance or motion in the inference stage shows the degree of potential abnormality. We evaluated our proposed method on the ShanghaiTech, UCSD-Ped1, and UCSD-Ped2 datasets and the results show competitive performance compared with state-of-the-art works. Most importantly, the results show that, as significant improvements to previous methods, detections by our method are completely explainable and anomalies are localized accurately in the frames.
abstract_zh: 半监督视频异常检测（VAD）方法将异常检测任务制定为检测与学习的正常模式的偏差。该领域以前的工作（基于重建或预测的方法）有两个缺点：1）它们专注于低级特征，并且它们（尤其是整体方法）没有有效地考虑对象类。 2）以对象为中心的方法忽略了一些上下文信息（例如位置）。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种新颖的双流对象感知 VAD 方法，该方法通过图像翻译任务学习正常外观和运动模式。外观分支将输入图像转换为 Mask-RCNN 生成的目标语义分割图，运动分支将每个帧与其预期光流大小相关联。推理阶段任何与预期外观或运动的偏差都表明潜在异常的程度。我们在 ShanghaiTech、UCSD-Ped1 和 UCSD-Ped2 数据集上评估了我们提出的方法，结果显示与最先进的作品相比具有竞争性的性能。最重要的是，结果表明，作为对先前方法的重大改进，我们的方法的检测是完全可解释的，并且异常在帧中被准确定位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图像翻译的双流视频异常检测方法，通过学习正常外观和运动模式实现可解释的异常定位。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么过度依赖低级特征忽视物体类别信息，要么以物体为中心时丢失场景上下文信息，导致检测效果受限。
AI.method: 设计双流网络架构：外观流通过图像翻译生成语义分割图，运动流关联帧间光流信息，联合判断外观与运动异常。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，检测结果具有空间可解释性且能准确定位异常区域。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过显式建模物体类别和场景上下文，在保持检测性能的同时实现了更可信的异常解释。

The appearance branch translates the input image to the target semantic segmentation map produced by Mask-RCNN, and the motion branch associates each frame with its expected optical flow magnitude. Any deviation from the expected appearance or motion in the inference stage shows the degree of potential abnormality. We evaluated our proposed method on the ShanghaiTech, UCSD-Ped1, and UCSD-Ped2 datasets and the results show competitive performance compared with state-of-the-art works. Most importantly, the results show that, as significant improvements to previous methods, detections by our method are completely explainable and anomalies are localized accurately in the frames. 半监督视频异常检测（VAD）方法将异常检测任务制定为检测与学习的正常模式的偏差。该领域以前的工作（基于重建或预测的方法）有两个缺点：1）它们专注于低级特征，并且它们（尤其是整体方法）没有有效地考虑对象类。 2）以对象为中心的方法忽略了一些上下文信息（例如位置）。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一种新颖的双流对象感知 VAD 方法，该方法通过图像翻译任务学习正常外观和运动模式。外观分支将输入图像转换为 Mask-RCNN 生成的目标语义分割图，运动分支将每个帧与其预期光流大小相关联。推理阶段任何与预期外观或运动的偏差都表明潜在异常的程度。我们在 ShanghaiTech、UCSD-Ped1 和 UCSD-Ped2 数据集上评估了我们提出的方法，结果显示与最先进的作品相比具有竞争性的性能。最重要的是，结果表明，作为对先前方法的重大改进，我们的方法的检测是完全可解释的，并且异常在帧中被准确定位。 本文提出一种基于图像翻译的双流视频异常检测方法，通过学习正常外观和运动模式实现可解释的异常定位。 Mohammad Baradaran,Robert Bergevin cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Barbara Roessle,Matthias Nießner
title: End2End Multi-View Feature Matching with Differentiable Pose Optimization
title_zh: 具有可微姿态优化的端到端多视图特征匹配
abstract: Erroneous feature matches have severe impact on subsequent camera pose estimation and often require additional, time-costly measures, like RANSAC, for outlier rejection. Our method tackles this challenge by addressing feature matching and pose optimization jointly. To this end, we propose a graph attention network to predict image correspondences along with confidence weights. The resulting matches serve as weighted constraints in a differentiable pose estimation. Training feature matching with gradients from pose optimization naturally learns to down-weight outliers and boosts pose estimation on image pairs compared to SuperGlue by 6.7% on ScanNet. At the same time, it reduces the pose estimation time by over 50% and renders RANSAC iterations unnecessary. Moreover, we integrate information from multiple views by spanning the graph across multiple frames to predict the matches all at once. Multi-view matching combined with end-to-end training improves the pose estimation metrics on Matterport3D by 18.5% compared to SuperGlue.
summary: Erroneous feature matches have severe impact on subsequent camera pose estimation and often require additional, time-costly measures, like RANSAC, for outlier rejection. Our method tackles this challenge by addressing feature matching and pose optimization jointly. To this end, we propose a graph attention network to predict image correspondences along with confidence weights. The resulting matches serve as weighted constraints in a differentiable pose estimation. Training feature matching with gradients from pose optimization naturally learns to down-weight outliers and boosts pose estimation on image pairs compared to SuperGlue by 6.7% on ScanNet. At the same time, it reduces the pose estimation time by over 50% and renders RANSAC iterations unnecessary. Moreover, we integrate information from multiple views by spanning the graph across multiple frames to predict the matches all at once. Multi-view matching combined with end-to-end training improves the pose estimation metrics on Matterport3D by 18.5% compared to SuperGlue.
abstract_zh: 错误的特征匹配会对后续的相机姿态估计产生严重影响，并且通常需要额外的、耗时的措施（例如 RANSAC）来拒绝异常值。我们的方法通过联合解决特征匹配和姿势优化来解决这一挑战。为此，我们提出了一个图注意网络来预测图像对应关系以及置信度权重。得到的匹配充当可微姿态估计中的加权约束。与 ScanNet 上的 SuperGlue 相比，使用姿势优化的梯度训练特征匹配自然会学习降低异常值的权重，并将图像对的姿势估计提高 6.7%。同时，它将姿态估计时间减少了 50% 以上，并且不需要 RANSAC 迭代。此外，我们通过将图表跨越多个帧来集成来自多个视图的信息，以一次性预测所有匹配项。与 SuperGlue 相比，多视图匹配与端到端训练相结合，Matterport3D 上的姿态估计指标提高了 18.5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端的多视角特征匹配方法，通过可微分的位姿优化提升相机位姿估计的准确性与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统特征匹配中错误匹配会影响后续位姿估计，且需依赖耗时的RANSAC等方法剔除异常值，亟需一种联合优化匹配与位姿估计的高效方案。
AI.method: 设计图注意力网络预测图像对应关系及置信度权重，将匹配结果作为加权约束输入可微分位姿估计框架，并通过跨多帧图扩展实现多视角联合匹配。
AI.result: 在ScanNet数据集上相较SuperGlue提升6.7%位姿估计精度并减少50%耗时，消除RANSAC需求；在Matterport3D数据集上提升18.5%。
AI.conclusion: 端到端训练与多视角联合优化显著提升了位姿估计性能，验证了特征匹配与位姿优化联合建模的有效性。

authors_text: Zoran Kostić,Alex Angus,Zhengye Yang,Zhuoxu Duan,Ivan Seskar,Gil Zussman,Dipankar Raychaudhuri
title: Smart City Intersections: Intelligence Nodes for Future Metropolises
title_zh: 智慧城市路口：未来大都市的智慧节点
abstract: Traffic intersections are the most suitable locations for the deployment of computing, communications, and intelligence services for smart cities of the future. The abundance of data to be collected and processed, in combination with privacy and security concerns, motivates the use of the edge-computing paradigm which aligns well with physical intersections in metropolises. This paper focuses on high-bandwidth, low-latency applications, and in that context it describes: (i) system design considerations for smart city intersection intelligence nodes; (ii) key technological components including sensors, networking, edge computing, low latency design, and AI-based intelligence; and (iii) applications such as privacy preservation, cloud-connected vehicles, a real-time "radar-screen", traffic management, and monitoring of pedestrian behavior during pandemics. The results of the experimental studies performed on the COSMOS testbed located in New York City are illustrated. Future challenges in designing human-centered smart city intersections are summarized.
summary: Traffic intersections are the most suitable locations for the deployment of computing, communications, and intelligence services for smart cities of the future. The abundance of data to be collected and processed, in combination with privacy and security concerns, motivates the use of the edge-computing paradigm which aligns well with physical intersections in metropolises. This paper focuses on high-bandwidth, low-latency applications, and in that context it describes: (i) system design considerations for smart city intersection intelligence nodes; (ii) key technological components including sensors, networking, edge computing, low latency design, and AI-based intelligence; and (iii) applications such as privacy preservation, cloud-connected vehicles, a real-time "radar-screen", traffic management, and monitoring of pedestrian behavior during pandemics. The results of the experimental studies performed on the COSMOS testbed located in New York City are illustrated. Future challenges in designing human-centered smart city intersections are summarized.
abstract_zh: 交通路口是未来智慧城市最适合部署计算、通信和智能服务的地点。需要收集和处理的大量数据，加上隐私和安全问题，推动了边缘计算范式的使用，该范式与大都市的物理交叉点非常吻合。本文重点关注高带宽、低延迟应用，并在此背景下描述：(i) 智慧城市交叉口智能节点的系统设计注意事项； (ii) 关键技术组件，包括传感器、网络、边缘计算、低延迟设计和基于人工智能的智能； (iii) 隐私保护、云连接车辆、实时“雷达屏幕”、交通管理和流行病期间行人行为监控等应用。图中展示了在纽约市 COSMOS 测试台上进行的实验研究的结果。总结了以人为本的智慧城市交叉口设计的未来挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文研究未来智慧城市中交通交叉口作为智能节点的设计与应用，结合边缘计算与人工智能技术，以提升城市交通管理效率并保障隐私安全。
AI.motivation: 交通交叉口数据量大且需实时处理，传统云计算存在延迟与隐私风险，需通过边缘计算实现低延迟、高安全性的智能交通管理。
AI.method: 设计智能交叉口节点系统，整合传感器、边缘计算、低延迟网络与AI算法，开发隐私保护、车辆云连接、实时监控等应用，并在纽约COSMOS测试平台进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验验证了智能交叉口节点在交通管理、行人行为监测等场景中的有效性，证明了边缘计算与AI技术结合的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 未来需进一步解决以人为本的智能交叉口设计挑战，包括技术可靠性、隐私保护及跨系统协同等问题。

authors_text: Adarsh Bhandary Panambur,Prathmesh Madhu,Andreas Maier
title: Effect of Random Histogram Equalization on Breast Calcification Analysis Using Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习随机直方图均衡对乳腺钙化分析的影响
comment: Accepted at Bildverarbeitung für die Medizin (BVM) Workshop 2022
comments: Accepted at Bildverarbeitung für die Medizin (BVM) Workshop 2022
abstract: Early detection and analysis of calcifications in mammogram images is crucial in a breast cancer diagnosis workflow. Management of calcifications that require immediate follow-up and further analyzing its benignancy or malignancy can result in a better prognosis. Recent studies have shown that deep learning-based algorithms can learn robust representations to analyze suspicious calcifications in mammography. In this work, we demonstrate that randomly equalizing the histograms of calcification patches as a data augmentation technique can significantly improve the classification performance for analyzing suspicious calcifications. We validate our approach by using the CBIS-DDSM dataset for two classification tasks. The results on both the tasks show that the proposed methodology gains more than 1% mean accuracy and F1-score when equalizing the data with a probability of 0.4 when compared to not using histogram equalization. This is further supported by the t-tests, where we obtain a p-value of p<0.0001, thus showing the statistical significance of our approach.
summary: Early detection and analysis of calcifications in mammogram images is crucial in a breast cancer diagnosis workflow. Management of calcifications that require immediate follow-up and further analyzing its benignancy or malignancy can result in a better prognosis. Recent studies have shown that deep learning-based algorithms can learn robust representations to analyze suspicious calcifications in mammography. In this work, we demonstrate that randomly equalizing the histograms of calcification patches as a data augmentation technique can significantly improve the classification performance for analyzing suspicious calcifications. We validate our approach by using the CBIS-DDSM dataset for two classification tasks. The results on both the tasks show that the proposed methodology gains more than 1% mean accuracy and F1-score when equalizing the data with a probability of 0.4 when compared to not using histogram equalization. This is further supported by the t-tests, where we obtain a p-value of p<0.0001, thus showing the statistical significance of our approach.
abstract_zh: 乳房 X 光检查图像中钙化的早期检测和分析对于乳腺癌诊断工作流程至关重要。需要立即随访并进一步分析其良性或恶性的钙化治疗可以带来更好的预后。最近的研究表明，基于深度学习的算法可以学习稳健的表示来分析乳房 X 光检查中的可疑钙化。在这项工作中，我们证明，随机均衡钙化斑块的直方图作为数据增强技术可以显着提高分析可疑钙化的分类性能。我们通过使用 CBIS-DDSM 数据集执行两个分类任务来验证我们的方法。这两项任务的结果表明，与不使用直方图均衡相比，当以 0.4 的概率均衡数据时，所提出的方法获得了超过 1% 的平均准确度和 F1 分数。 t 检验进一步支持了这一点，我们获得 p<0.0001 的 p 值，从而显示了我们的方法的统计显着性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了随机直方图均衡化作为数据增强技术对深度学习分析乳腺钙化点的影响。
AI.motivation: 乳腺钙化点的早期检测对乳腺癌诊断至关重要，而现有深度学习方法在钙化点分类任务中存在性能提升空间。
AI.method: 在钙化点图像补丁上应用随机直方图均衡化作为数据增强技术，并在CBIS-DDSM数据集上进行两类分类任务验证。
AI.result: 当以0.4概率应用直方图均衡化时，分类任务的平均准确率和F1分数提升超过1%，t检验显示结果具有统计显著性(p<0.0001)。
AI.conclusion: 随机直方图均衡化能有效提升深度学习模型对可疑钙化点的分类性能，为乳腺癌筛查提供改进方案。

search_text: Effect of Random Histogram Equalization on Breast Calcification Analysis Using Deep Learning 使用深度学习随机直方图均衡对乳腺钙化分析的影响 Early detection and analysis of calcifications in mammogram images is crucial in a breast cancer diagnosis workflow. Management of calcifications that require immediate follow-up and further analyzing its benignancy or malignancy can result in a better prognosis. Recent studies have shown that deep learning-based algorithms can learn robust representations to analyze suspicious calcifications in mammography. In this work, we demonstrate that randomly equalizing the histograms of calcification patches as a data augmentation technique can significantly improve the classification performance for analyzing suspicious calcifications. We validate our approach by using the CBIS-DDSM dataset for two classification tasks. The results on both the tasks show that the proposed methodology gains more than 1% mean accuracy and F1-score when equalizing the data with a probability of 0.4 when compared to not using histogram equalization. This is further supported by the t-tests, where we obtain a p-value of p<0.0001, thus showing the statistical significance of our approach. 乳房 X 光检查图像中钙化的早期检测和分析对于乳腺癌诊断工作流程至关重要。需要立即随访并进一步分析其良性或恶性的钙化治疗可以带来更好的预后。最近的研究表明，基于深度学习的算法可以学习稳健的表示来分析乳房 X 光检查中的可疑钙化。在这项工作中，我们证明，随机均衡钙化斑块的直方图作为数据增强技术可以显着提高分析可疑钙化的分类性能。我们通过使用 CBIS-DDSM 数据集执行两个分类任务来验证我们的方法。这两项任务的结果表明，与不使用直方图均衡相比，当以 0.4 的概率均衡数据时，所提出的方法获得了超过 1% 的平均准确度和 F1 分数。 t 检验进一步支持了这一点，我们获得 p<0.0001 的 p 值，从而显示了我们的方法的统计显着性。 本文探讨了随机直方图均衡化作为数据增强技术对深度学习分析乳腺钙化点的影响。 Adarsh Bhandary Panambur,Prathmesh Madhu,Andreas Maier eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Weichao Lan,Yiu-ming Cheung,Juyong Jiang
title: Compact Neural Networks via Stacking Designed Basic Units
title_zh: 通过堆叠设计的基本单元实现紧凑的神经网络
abstract: Unstructured pruning has the limitation of dealing with the sparse and irregular weights. By contrast, structured pruning can help eliminate this drawback but it requires complex criterion to determine which components to be pruned. To this end, this paper presents a new method termed TissueNet, which directly constructs compact neural networks with fewer weight parameters by independently stacking designed basic units, without requiring additional judgement criteria anymore. Given the basic units of various architectures, they are combined and stacked in a certain form to build up compact neural networks. We formulate TissueNet in diverse popular backbones for comparison with the state-of-the-art pruning methods on different benchmark datasets. Moreover, two new metrics are proposed to evaluate compression performance. Experiment results show that TissueNet can achieve comparable classification accuracy while saving up to around 80% FLOPs and 89.7% parameters. That is, stacking basic units provides a new promising way for network compression.
summary: Unstructured pruning has the limitation of dealing with the sparse and irregular weights. By contrast, structured pruning can help eliminate this drawback but it requires complex criterion to determine which components to be pruned. To this end, this paper presents a new method termed TissueNet, which directly constructs compact neural networks with fewer weight parameters by independently stacking designed basic units, without requiring additional judgement criteria anymore. Given the basic units of various architectures, they are combined and stacked in a certain form to build up compact neural networks. We formulate TissueNet in diverse popular backbones for comparison with the state-of-the-art pruning methods on different benchmark datasets. Moreover, two new metrics are proposed to evaluate compression performance. Experiment results show that TissueNet can achieve comparable classification accuracy while saving up to around 80% FLOPs and 89.7% parameters. That is, stacking basic units provides a new promising way for network compression.
abstract_zh: 非结构化剪枝在处理稀疏和不规则的权重方面存在局限性。相比之下，结构化剪枝可以帮助消除这个缺点，但它需要复杂的标准来确定要剪枝的组件。为此，本文提出了一种名为 TissueNet 的新方法，通过独立堆叠设计的基本单元，直接构建权重参数较少的紧凑神经网络，不再需要额外的判断标准。给定各种架构的基本单元，它们以一定的形式组合和堆叠以构建紧凑的神经网络。我们在不同的流行主干网络中制定了 TissueNet，以便与不同基准数据集上最先进的修剪方法进行比较。此外，提出了两个新的指标来评估压缩性能。实验结果表明，TissueNet 可以实现相当的分类精度，同时节省高达约 80% 的 FLOP 和 89.7% 的参数。也就是说，堆叠基本单元为网络压缩提供了一种新的有前途的方式。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TissueNet方法，通过堆叠设计的基本单元直接构建紧凑神经网络，无需复杂剪枝标准即可实现高效压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有结构化剪枝方法依赖复杂判断标准选择剪枝组件，而非结构化剪枝存在权重稀疏不规则问题，需寻找更高效的网络压缩方案。
AI.method: 设计多样化基本单元架构，通过独立堆叠组合构建紧凑网络，并提出两种新指标评估压缩性能，无需额外剪枝准则。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实现与最先进剪枝方法相当的分类精度，节省约80%计算量和89.7%参数。
AI.conclusion: 堆叠基本单元为网络压缩提供新思路，在保持性能的同时显著降低参数量和计算量。

authors_text: Nayla Escribano,Jon Ander González,Julen Orbegozo-Terradillos,Ainara Larrondo-Ureta,Simón Peña-Fernández,Olatz Perez-de-Viñaspre,Rodrigo Agerri
title: BasqueParl: A Bilingual Corpus of Basque Parliamentary Transcriptions
title_zh: BasqueParl：巴斯克议会转录双语语料库
comment: 9 pages, 14 figures, 4 tables. To be published in LREC 2022
comments: 9 pages, 14 figures, 4 tables. To be published in LREC 2022
abstract: Parliamentary transcripts provide a valuable resource to understand the reality and know about the most important facts that occur over time in our societies. Furthermore, the political debates captured in these transcripts facilitate research on political discourse from a computational social science perspective. In this paper we release the first version of a newly compiled corpus from Basque parliamentary transcripts. The corpus is characterized by heavy Basque-Spanish code-switching, and represents an interesting resource to study political discourse in contrasting languages such as Basque and Spanish. We enrich the corpus with metadata related to relevant attributes of the speakers and speeches (language, gender, party...) and process the text to obtain named entities and lemmas. The obtained metadata is then used to perform a detailed corpus analysis which provides interesting insights about the language use of the Basque political representatives across time, parties and gender.
summary: Parliamentary transcripts provide a valuable resource to understand the reality and know about the most important facts that occur over time in our societies. Furthermore, the political debates captured in these transcripts facilitate research on political discourse from a computational social science perspective. In this paper we release the first version of a newly compiled corpus from Basque parliamentary transcripts. The corpus is characterized by heavy Basque-Spanish code-switching, and represents an interesting resource to study political discourse in contrasting languages such as Basque and Spanish. We enrich the corpus with metadata related to relevant attributes of the speakers and speeches (language, gender, party...) and process the text to obtain named entities and lemmas. The obtained metadata is then used to perform a detailed corpus analysis which provides interesting insights about the language use of the Basque political representatives across time, parties and gender.
abstract_zh: 议会记录为了解现实和了解我们社会中随着时间推移发生的最重要事实提供了宝贵的资源。此外，这些记录中捕捉到的政治辩论促进了从计算社会科学角度对政治话语的研究。在本文中，我们发布了巴斯克议会笔录新编译的语料库的第一个版本。该语料库的特点是巴斯克语-西班牙语语码转换较多，是研究巴斯克语和西班牙语等对比语言的政治话语的有趣资源。我们使用与说话者和演讲的相关属性（语言、性别、政党……）相关的元数据来丰富语料库，并处理文本以获得命名实体和引理。然后使用获得的元数据进行详细的语料库分析，提供有关巴斯克政治代表在不同时间、政党和性别的语言使用情况的有趣见解。

AI.tldr: 构建并发布首个巴斯克语议会双语语料库BasqueParl，包含巴斯克语与西班牙语的代码切换数据，并通过元数据分析政治话语特征。
AI.motivation: 议会记录是研究社会动态和政治话语的重要资源，而巴斯克语与西班牙语的双语环境为对比语言使用模式提供了独特研究价值。
AI.method: 收集巴斯克议会记录并标注语言、性别、政党等元数据，通过自然语言处理提取命名实体和词形，结合统计分析探索语言使用模式。
AI.result: 揭示了巴斯克政治代表在不同政党、性别及时间维度下的语言使用差异，量化了双语代码切换的频率与场景特征。
AI.conclusion: BasqueParl为研究双语政治话语提供了高质量语料资源，未来可拓展至其他语言或结合话语分析方法深化研究。

method: 收集巴斯克议会记录并标注语言、性别、政党等元数据，通过自然语言处理提取命名实体和词形，结合统计分析探索语言使用模式。
result: 揭示了巴斯克政治代表在不同政党、性别及时间维度下的语言使用差异，量化了双语代码切换的频率与场景特征。
conclusion: BasqueParl为研究双语政治话语提供了高质量语料资源，未来可拓展至其他语言或结合话语分析方法深化研究。
search_text: BasqueParl: A Bilingual Corpus of Basque Parliamentary Transcriptions BasqueParl：巴斯克议会转录双语语料库 Parliamentary transcripts provide a valuable resource to understand the reality and know about the most important facts that occur over time in our societies. Furthermore, the political debates captured in these transcripts facilitate research on political discourse from a computational social science perspective. In this paper we release the first version of a newly compiled corpus from Basque parliamentary transcripts. The corpus is characterized by heavy Basque-Spanish code-switching, and represents an interesting resource to study political discourse in contrasting languages such as Basque and Spanish. We enrich the corpus with metadata related to relevant attributes of the speakers and speeches (language, gender, party...) and process the text to obtain named entities and lemmas. The obtained metadata is then used to perform a detailed corpus analysis which provides interesting insights about the language use of the Basque political representatives across time, parties and gender. 议会记录为了解现实和了解我们社会中随着时间推移发生的最重要事实提供了宝贵的资源。此外，这些记录中捕捉到的政治辩论促进了从计算社会科学角度对政治话语的研究。在本文中，我们发布了巴斯克议会笔录新编译的语料库的第一个版本。该语料库的特点是巴斯克语-西班牙语语码转换较多，是研究巴斯克语和西班牙语等对比语言的政治话语的有趣资源。我们使用与说话者和演讲的相关属性（语言、性别、政党……）相关的元数据来丰富语料库，并处理文本以获得命名实体和引理。然后使用获得的元数据进行详细的语料库分析，提供有关巴斯克政治代表在不同时间、政党和性别的语言使用情况的有趣见解。 构建并发布首个巴斯克语议会双语语料库BasqueParl，包含巴斯克语与西班牙语的代码切换数据，并通过元数据分析政治话语特征。 Nayla Escribano,Jon Ander González,Julen Orbegozo-Terradillos,Ainara Larrondo-Ureta,Simón Peña-Fernández,Olatz Perez-de-Viñaspre,Rodrigo Agerri cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Hung-yi Lee,Shang-Wen Li,Ngoc Thang Vu
title: Meta Learning for Natural Language Processing: A Survey
title_zh: 自然语言处理的元学习：一项调查
abstract: Deep learning has been the mainstream technique in natural language processing (NLP) area. However, the techniques require many labeled data and are less generalizable across domains. Meta-learning is an arising field in machine learning studying approaches to learn better learning algorithms. Approaches aim at improving algorithms in various aspects, including data efficiency and generalizability. Efficacy of approaches has been shown in many NLP tasks, but there is no systematic survey of these approaches in NLP, which hinders more researchers from joining the field. Our goal with this survey paper is to offer researchers pointers to relevant meta-learning works in NLP and attract more attention from the NLP community to drive future innovation. This paper first introduces the general concepts of meta-learning and the common approaches. Then we summarize task construction settings and application of meta-learning for various NLP problems and review the development of meta-learning in NLP community.
summary: Deep learning has been the mainstream technique in natural language processing (NLP) area. However, the techniques require many labeled data and are less generalizable across domains. Meta-learning is an arising field in machine learning studying approaches to learn better learning algorithms. Approaches aim at improving algorithms in various aspects, including data efficiency and generalizability. Efficacy of approaches has been shown in many NLP tasks, but there is no systematic survey of these approaches in NLP, which hinders more researchers from joining the field. Our goal with this survey paper is to offer researchers pointers to relevant meta-learning works in NLP and attract more attention from the NLP community to drive future innovation. This paper first introduces the general concepts of meta-learning and the common approaches. Then we summarize task construction settings and application of meta-learning for various NLP problems and review the development of meta-learning in NLP community.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已经成为自然语言处理（NLP）领域的主流技术。然而，这些技术需要许多标记数据，并且跨领域的通用性较差。元学习是机器学习领域的一个新兴领域，研究学习更好的学习算法的方法。这些方法旨在改进各个方面的算法，包括数据效率和泛化性。这些方法的有效性已经在许多 NLP 任务中得到了证明，但是 NLP 中这些方法还没有系统的调查，这阻碍了更多的研究人员加入该领域。我们这篇调查论文的目标是为研究人员提供 NLP 相关元学习工作的指导，并吸引 NLP 社区的更多关注以推动未来的创新。本文首先介绍了元学习的一般概念和常用方法。然后我们总结了元学习在各种 NLP 问题上的任务构建设置和应用，并回顾了元学习在 NLP 界的发展。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在对自然语言处理（NLP）领域中的元学习方法进行系统性综述，总结其应用与发展趋势。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在NLP中依赖大量标注数据且泛化能力不足，而元学习虽在数据效率和泛化性上表现优异，但缺乏针对NLP的系统性调研，阻碍了领域发展。
AI.method: 介绍元学习基本概念与常见方法，总结其在NLP任务中的构造设置与应用，并回顾该领域的发展历程。
AI.result: 梳理了元学习在NLP中的关键方法与应用场景，为研究者提供了方向指引，推动更多学者关注该领域。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过系统综述元学习在NLP中的研究进展，旨在激发社区创新，促进更高效、泛化的NLP模型开发。

authors_text: Thibaut Kulak,Anthony Fillion,François Blayo
title: A unified view on Self-Organizing Maps (SOMs) and Stochastic Neighbor Embedding (SNE)
title_zh: 自组织映射 (SOM) 和随机邻域嵌入 (SNE) 的统一视图
abstract: We propose a unified view on two widely used data visualization techniques: Self-Organizing Maps (SOMs) and Stochastic Neighbor Embedding (SNE). We show that they can both be derived from a common mathematical framework. Leveraging this formulation, we propose to compare SOM and SNE quantitatively on two datasets, and discuss possible avenues for future work to take advantage of both approaches.
summary: We propose a unified view on two widely used data visualization techniques: Self-Organizing Maps (SOMs) and Stochastic Neighbor Embedding (SNE). We show that they can both be derived from a common mathematical framework. Leveraging this formulation, we propose to compare SOM and SNE quantitatively on two datasets, and discuss possible avenues for future work to take advantage of both approaches.
abstract_zh: 我们对两种广泛使用的数据可视化技术提出了统一的观点：自组织映射（SOM）和随机邻域嵌入（SNE）。我们证明它们都可以从一个共同的数学框架中导出。利用这个公式，我们建议在两个数据集上定量比较 SOM 和 SNE，并讨论未来工作利用这两种方法的可能途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将自组织映射（SOM）和随机邻域嵌入（SNE）统一到共同数学框架的方法，并通过定量比较分析两者的特点。
AI.motivation: SOM和SNE作为常用的数据可视化技术，缺乏统一的理论联系，限制了其综合应用与改进方向，因此需要建立统一框架以促进深入比较与未来研究。
AI.method: 通过构建共同的数学框架，将SOM和SNE纳入同一理论体系，并在两个数据集上进行定量性能比较，分析其差异与潜在结合点。
AI.result: 在两个数据集的定量比较中，揭示了SOM和SNE在保持拓扑结构与局部邻域关系上的不同表现，为后续结合两者优势提供了依据。
AI.conclusion: 统一框架有助于理解SOM与SNE的内在联系，未来可探索融合两者特性的新方法，以兼顾全局结构与局部关系的可视化需求。

authors_text: Mingle Xu,Sook Yoon,Alvaro Fuentes,Dong Sun Park
title: A Comprehensive Survey of Image Augmentation Techniques for Deep Learning
title_zh: 深度学习图像增强技术的综合综述
abstract: Deep learning has been achieving decent performance in computer vision requiring a large volume of images, however, collecting images is expensive and difficult in many scenarios. To alleviate this issue, many image augmentation algorithms have been proposed as effective and efficient strategies. Understanding current algorithms is essential to find suitable methods or develop novel techniques for given tasks. In this paper, we perform a comprehensive survey on image augmentation for deep learning with a novel informative taxonomy. To get the basic idea why we need image augmentation, we introduce the challenges in computer vision tasks and vicinity distribution. Then, the algorithms are split into three categories; model-free, model-based, and optimizing policy-based. The model-free category employs image processing methods while the model-based method leverages trainable image generation models. In contrast, the optimizing policy-based approach aims to find the optimal operations or their combinations. Furthermore, we discuss the current trend of common applications with two more active topics, leveraging different ways to understand image augmentation, such as group and kernel theory, and deploying image augmentation for unsupervised learning. Based on the analysis, we believe that our survey gives a better understanding helpful to choose suitable methods or design novel algorithms for practical applications.
summary: Deep learning has been achieving decent performance in computer vision requiring a large volume of images, however, collecting images is expensive and difficult in many scenarios. To alleviate this issue, many image augmentation algorithms have been proposed as effective and efficient strategies. Understanding current algorithms is essential to find suitable methods or develop novel techniques for given tasks. In this paper, we perform a comprehensive survey on image augmentation for deep learning with a novel informative taxonomy. To get the basic idea why we need image augmentation, we introduce the challenges in computer vision tasks and vicinity distribution. Then, the algorithms are split into three categories; model-free, model-based, and optimizing policy-based. The model-free category employs image processing methods while the model-based method leverages trainable image generation models. In contrast, the optimizing policy-based approach aims to find the optimal operations or their combinations. Furthermore, we discuss the current trend of common applications with two more active topics, leveraging different ways to understand image augmentation, such as group and kernel theory, and deploying image augmentation for unsupervised learning. Based on the analysis, we believe that our survey gives a better understanding helpful to choose suitable methods or design novel algorithms for practical applications.
abstract_zh: 深度学习在需要大量图像的计算机视觉领域已经取得了不错的性能，但是在许多情况下收集图像既昂贵又困难。为了缓解这个问题，许多图像增强算法被提出作为有效且高效的策略。了解当前算法对于为给定任务找到合适的方法或开发新技术至关重要。在本文中，我们利用新颖的信息分类法对深度学习的图像增强进行了全面的调查。为了了解为什么我们需要图像增强的基本概念，我们介绍了计算机视觉任务和邻近分布中的挑战。然后，算法分为三类；无模型、基于模型和基于优化策略。无模型类别采用图像处理方法，而基于模型的方法则利用可训练的图像生成模型。相反，基于策略的优化方法旨在找到最优操作或其组合。此外，我们通过两个更活跃的主题讨论了常见应用程序的当前趋势，利用不同的方式来理解图像增强，例如群和核理论，并将图像增强部署用于无监督学习。基于分析，我们相信我们的调查提供了更好的理解，有助于选择合适的方法或为实际应用设计新颖的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文对用于深度学习的图像增强技术进行了全面的综述。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在计算机视觉任务中需要大量图像数据，但收集这些数据成本高且困难，因此需要有效的图像增强技术。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的信息分类法，将图像增强算法分为模型无关、模型相关和优化策略三类，并讨论了其在无监督学习中的应用。
AI.result: 本文提供了对当前图像增强技术的全面理解，有助于选择合适的方法或设计新算法。
AI.conclusion: 该综述为实际应用中选择或设计图像增强方法提供了更好的理解与指导。

ai_content.tldr: 本文对用于深度学习的图像增强技术进行了全面的综述。

search_text: A Comprehensive Survey of Image Augmentation Techniques for Deep Learning 深度学习图像增强技术的综合综述 Deep learning has been achieving decent performance in computer vision requiring a large volume of images, however, collecting images is expensive and difficult in many scenarios. To alleviate this issue, many image augmentation algorithms have been proposed as effective and efficient strategies. Understanding current algorithms is essential to find suitable methods or develop novel techniques for given tasks. In this paper, we perform a comprehensive survey on image augmentation for deep learning with a novel informative taxonomy. To get the basic idea why we need image augmentation, we introduce the challenges in computer vision tasks and vicinity distribution. Then, the algorithms are split into three categories; model-free, model-based, and optimizing policy-based. The model-free category employs image processing methods while the model-based method leverages trainable image generation models. In contrast, the optimizing policy-based approach aims to find the optimal operations or their combinations. Furthermore, we discuss the current trend of common applications with two more active topics, leveraging different ways to understand image augmentation, such as group and kernel theory, and deploying image augmentation for unsupervised learning. Based on the analysis, we believe that our survey gives a better understanding helpful to choose suitable methods or design novel algorithms for practical applications. 深度学习在需要大量图像的计算机视觉领域已经取得了不错的性能，但是在许多情况下收集图像既昂贵又困难。为了缓解这个问题，许多图像增强算法被提出作为有效且高效的策略。了解当前算法对于为给定任务找到合适的方法或开发新技术至关重要。在本文中，我们利用新颖的信息分类法对深度学习的图像增强进行了全面的调查。为了了解为什么我们需要图像增强的基本概念，我们介绍了计算机视觉任务和邻近分布中的挑战。然后，算法分为三类；无模型、基于模型和基于优化策略。无模型类别采用图像处理方法，而基于模型的方法则利用可训练的图像生成模型。相反，基于策略的优化方法旨在找到最优操作或其组合。此外，我们通过两个更活跃的主题讨论了常见应用程序的当前趋势，利用不同的方式来理解图像增强，例如群和核理论，并将图像增强部署用于无监督学习。基于分析，我们相信我们的调查提供了更好的理解，有助于选择合适的方法或为实际应用设计新颖的算法。 本文对用于深度学习的图像增强技术进行了全面的综述。 Mingle Xu,Sook Yoon,Alvaro Fuentes,Dong Sun Park cs.CV

authors_text: Bowen Jing,Gabriele Corso,Renato Berlinghieri,Tommi Jaakkola
title: Subspace Diffusion Generative Models
title_zh: 子空间扩散生成模型
abstract: Score-based models generate samples by mapping noise to data (and vice versa) via a high-dimensional diffusion process. We question whether it is necessary to run this entire process at high dimensionality and incur all the inconveniences thereof. Instead, we restrict the diffusion via projections onto subspaces as the data distribution evolves toward noise. When applied to state-of-the-art models, our framework simultaneously improves sample quality -- reaching an FID of 2.17 on unconditional CIFAR-10 -- and reduces the computational cost of inference for the same number of denoising steps. Our framework is fully compatible with continuous-time diffusion and retains its flexible capabilities, including exact log-likelihoods and controllable generation. Code is available at https://github.com/bjing2016/subspace-diffusion.
summary: Score-based models generate samples by mapping noise to data (and vice versa) via a high-dimensional diffusion process. We question whether it is necessary to run this entire process at high dimensionality and incur all the inconveniences thereof. Instead, we restrict the diffusion via projections onto subspaces as the data distribution evolves toward noise. When applied to state-of-the-art models, our framework simultaneously improves sample quality -- reaching an FID of 2.17 on unconditional CIFAR-10 -- and reduces the computational cost of inference for the same number of denoising steps. Our framework is fully compatible with continuous-time diffusion and retains its flexible capabilities, including exact log-likelihoods and controllable generation. Code is available at https://github.com/bjing2016/subspace-diffusion.
abstract_zh: 基于分数的模型通过高维扩散过程将噪声映射到数据（反之亦然）来生成样本。我们质疑是否有必要在高维度上运行整个过程并带来由此带来的所有不便。相反，当数据分布向噪声演化时，我们通过投影到子空间来限制扩散。当应用于最先进的模型时，我们的框架同时提高了样本质量——在无条件 CIFAR-10 上达到 2.17 的 FID——并降低了相同数量的去噪步骤的推理计算成本。我们的框架与连续时间扩散完全兼容，并保留其灵活的功能，包括精确的对数似然和可控生成。代码可在 https://github.com/bjing2016/subspace-diffusion 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种子空间扩散生成模型，通过在数据分布演化过程中限制扩散过程到子空间，以提高生成样本质量并降低计算成本。
AI.motivation: 传统高维扩散过程计算复杂且效率低下，作者认为无需全程保持高维扩散，通过子空间投影可简化过程并提升性能。
AI.method: 在扩散过程中引入子空间投影，将高维数据映射到低维子空间进行演化，同时保持与连续时间扩散模型的兼容性，支持精确似然计算和可控生成。
AI.result: 在无条件CIFAR-10数据集上达到FID 2.17，相比现有方法显著提升样本质量，且相同去噪步骤下计算成本降低。
AI.conclusion: 子空间扩散框架在保持生成模型灵活性的同时，有效提升了生成质量与推理效率，为高维扩散模型优化提供了新思路。

authors_text: Daniel A. Spielman,Peng Zhang
title: Hardness Results for Weaver's Discrepancy Problem
title_zh: 韦弗差异问题的硬度结果
abstract: Marcus, Spielman and Srivastava (Annals of Mathematics 2014) solved the Kadison--Singer Problem by proving a strong form of Weaver's conjecture: they showed that for all $α> 0$ and all lists of vectors of norm at most $\sqrtα$ whose outer products sum to the identity, there exists a signed sum of those outer products with operator norm at most $\sqrt{8 α} + 2 α.$ We prove that it is NP-hard to distinguish such a list of vectors for which there is a signed sum that equals the zero matrix from those in which every signed sum has operator norm at least $κ\sqrtα$, for some absolute constant $κ> 0.$ Thus, it is NP-hard to construct a signing that is a constant factor better than that guaranteed to exist. For $α= 1/4$, we prove that it is NP-hard to distinguish whether there is a signed sum that equals the zero matrix from the case in which every signed sum has operator norm at least $1/4$.
summary: Marcus, Spielman and Srivastava (Annals of Mathematics 2014) solved the Kadison--Singer Problem by proving a strong form of Weaver's conjecture: they showed that for all $α> 0$ and all lists of vectors of norm at most $\sqrtα$ whose outer products sum to the identity, there exists a signed sum of those outer products with operator norm at most $\sqrt{8 α} + 2 α.$ We prove that it is NP-hard to distinguish such a list of vectors for which there is a signed sum that equals the zero matrix from those in which every signed sum has operator norm at least $κ\sqrtα$, for some absolute constant $κ> 0.$ Thus, it is NP-hard to construct a signing that is a constant factor better than that guaranteed to exist. For $α= 1/4$, we prove that it is NP-hard to distinguish whether there is a signed sum that equals the zero matrix from the case in which every signed sum has operator norm at least $1/4$.
abstract_zh: Marcus、Spielman 和 Srivastava（数学年鉴 2014）通过证明 Weaver 猜想的强形式解决了 Kadison-Singer 问题：他们证明，对于所有 $α> 0$ 以及范数至多 $\sqrtα$ 且其外积之和等于恒等的所有向量列表，存在那些运算符范数至多 $\sqrt{8 α} + 2 α 的外积的有符号和。$我们证明，对于某些绝对常数 $κ> 0，区分这样一个有符号和等于零矩阵的向量列表与每个有符号和具有运算符范数至少 $κ\sqrtα$ 的向量列表是 NP 困难的。因此，构造一个比保证存在的常数因子更好的符号是 NP 困难的。对于 $α= 1/4$，我们证明在每个有符号和的运算符范数至少为 $1/4$ 的情况下区分是否存在等于零矩阵的有符号和是 NP 困难的。

AI.tldr: 本文证明了Weaver的差异问题在计算上是NP难的，即无法有效区分存在零矩阵签名和所有签名都有较高算子范数的情况。
AI.motivation: 在解决Kadison-Singer问题后，研究者希望确定是否存在更优的签名构造方法，以及该问题的计算复杂性边界。
AI.method: 通过归约法证明NP难性，利用计算复杂性理论分析向量列表的签名差异问题。
AI.result: 证明了对于特定参数α，区分存在零矩阵签名与所有签名范数≥κ√α是NP难的，且当α=1/4时下界为1/4。
AI.conclusion: 改进现有差异界在计算上不可行，揭示了该问题的固有计算复杂性限制。

Spielman,Peng Zhang cs.CC,cs.DS

authors_text: Wei Zhao,Shiqi Zhang,Bing Zhou,Bei Wang
title: Multi-Spatio-temporal Fusion Graph Recurrent Network for Traffic forecasting
title_zh: 用于流量预测的多时空融合图循环网络
abstract: Traffic forecasting is essential for the traffic construction of smart cities in the new era. However, traffic data's complex spatial and temporal dependencies make traffic forecasting extremely challenging. Most existing traffic forecasting methods rely on the predefined adjacency matrix to model the Spatio-temporal dependencies. Nevertheless, the road traffic state is highly real-time, so the adjacency matrix should change dynamically with time. This article presents a new Multi-Spatio-temporal Fusion Graph Recurrent Network (MSTFGRN) to address the issues above. The network proposes a data-driven weighted adjacency matrix generation method to compensate for real-time spatial dependencies not reflected by the predefined adjacency matrix. It also efficiently learns hidden Spatio-temporal dependencies by performing a new two-way Spatio-temporal fusion operation on parallel Spatio-temporal relations at different moments. Finally, global Spatio-temporal dependencies are captured simultaneously by integrating a global attention mechanism into the Spatio-temporal fusion module. Extensive trials on four large-scale, real-world traffic datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to alternative baselines.
summary: Traffic forecasting is essential for the traffic construction of smart cities in the new era. However, traffic data's complex spatial and temporal dependencies make traffic forecasting extremely challenging. Most existing traffic forecasting methods rely on the predefined adjacency matrix to model the Spatio-temporal dependencies. Nevertheless, the road traffic state is highly real-time, so the adjacency matrix should change dynamically with time. This article presents a new Multi-Spatio-temporal Fusion Graph Recurrent Network (MSTFGRN) to address the issues above. The network proposes a data-driven weighted adjacency matrix generation method to compensate for real-time spatial dependencies not reflected by the predefined adjacency matrix. It also efficiently learns hidden Spatio-temporal dependencies by performing a new two-way Spatio-temporal fusion operation on parallel Spatio-temporal relations at different moments. Finally, global Spatio-temporal dependencies are captured simultaneously by integrating a global attention mechanism into the Spatio-temporal fusion module. Extensive trials on four large-scale, real-world traffic datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to alternative baselines.
abstract_zh: 交通预测对于新时代智慧城市交通建设至关重要。然而，交通数据复杂的空间和时间依赖性使得交通预测极具挑战性。大多数现有的流量预测方法依赖于预定义的邻接矩阵来对时空依赖性进行建模。然而，道路交通状态实时性较高，因此邻接矩阵应随时间动态变化。本文提出了一种新的多时空融合图循环网络（MSTFGRN）来解决上述问题。该网络提出了一种数据驱动的加权邻接矩阵生成方法，以补偿预定义邻接矩阵未反映的实时空间依赖性。它还通过在不同时刻对并行时空关系执行新的双向时空融合操作，有效地学习隐藏的时空依赖性。最后，通过将全局注意力机制集成到时空融合模块中，同时捕获全局时空依赖性。对四个大规模真实交通数据集的广泛试验表明，与替代基线相比，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多时空融合图循环网络（MSTFGRN），用于解决交通预测中动态时空依赖建模的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有交通预测方法依赖静态邻接矩阵，无法反映实时变化的交通状态，导致时空依赖建模不足。
AI.method: 设计数据驱动的动态加权邻接矩阵生成方法，结合双向时空融合操作与全局注意力机制，同时捕捉局部与全局时空依赖。
AI.result: 在四个大规模真实交通数据集上，MSTFGRN相较基线方法达到最先进的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 动态邻接矩阵与多尺度时空融合机制有效提升了交通预测精度，方法可推广至其他时空序列预测场景。

search_text: Multi-Spatio-temporal Fusion Graph Recurrent Network for Traffic forecasting 用于流量预测的多时空融合图循环网络 Traffic forecasting is essential for the traffic construction of smart cities in the new era. However, traffic data's complex spatial and temporal dependencies make traffic forecasting extremely challenging. Most existing traffic forecasting methods rely on the predefined adjacency matrix to model the Spatio-temporal dependencies. Nevertheless, the road traffic state is highly real-time, so the adjacency matrix should change dynamically with time. This article presents a new Multi-Spatio-temporal Fusion Graph Recurrent Network (MSTFGRN) to address the issues above. The network proposes a data-driven weighted adjacency matrix generation method to compensate for real-time spatial dependencies not reflected by the predefined adjacency matrix. It also efficiently learns hidden Spatio-temporal dependencies by performing a new two-way Spatio-temporal fusion operation on parallel Spatio-temporal relations at different moments. Finally, global Spatio-temporal dependencies are captured simultaneously by integrating a global attention mechanism into the Spatio-temporal fusion module. Extensive trials on four large-scale, real-world traffic datasets demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance compared to alternative baselines. 交通预测对于新时代智慧城市交通建设至关重要。然而，交通数据复杂的空间和时间依赖性使得交通预测极具挑战性。大多数现有的流量预测方法依赖于预定义的邻接矩阵来对时空依赖性进行建模。然而，道路交通状态实时性较高，因此邻接矩阵应随时间动态变化。本文提出了一种新的多时空融合图循环网络（MSTFGRN）来解决上述问题。该网络提出了一种数据驱动的加权邻接矩阵生成方法，以补偿预定义邻接矩阵未反映的实时空间依赖性。它还通过在不同时刻对并行时空关系执行新的双向时空融合操作，有效地学习隐藏的时空依赖性。最后，通过将全局注意力机制集成到时空融合模块中，同时捕获全局时空依赖性。对四个大规模真实交通数据集的广泛试验表明，与替代基线相比，我们的方法实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种多时空融合图循环网络（MSTFGRN），用于解决交通预测中动态时空依赖建模的挑战。 Wei Zhao,Shiqi Zhang,Bing Zhou,Bei Wang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yurong Chen,Xiaotie Deng,Chenchen Li,David Mguni,Jun Wang,Xiang Yan,Yaodong Yang
title: On the Convergence of Fictitious Play: A Decomposition Approach
title_zh: 论虚构游戏的趋同：一种分解方法
abstract: Fictitious play (FP) is one of the most fundamental game-theoretical learning frameworks for computing Nash equilibrium in $n$-player games, which builds the foundation for modern multi-agent learning algorithms. Although FP has provable convergence guarantees on zero-sum games and potential games, many real-world problems are often a mixture of both and the convergence property of FP has not been fully studied yet. In this paper, we extend the convergence results of FP to the combinations of such games and beyond. Specifically, we derive new conditions for FP to converge by leveraging game decomposition techniques. We further develop a linear relationship unifying cooperation and competition in the sense that these two classes of games are mutually transferable. Finally, we analyze a non-convergent example of FP, the Shapley game, and develop sufficient conditions for FP to converge.
summary: Fictitious play (FP) is one of the most fundamental game-theoretical learning frameworks for computing Nash equilibrium in $n$-player games, which builds the foundation for modern multi-agent learning algorithms. Although FP has provable convergence guarantees on zero-sum games and potential games, many real-world problems are often a mixture of both and the convergence property of FP has not been fully studied yet. In this paper, we extend the convergence results of FP to the combinations of such games and beyond. Specifically, we derive new conditions for FP to converge by leveraging game decomposition techniques. We further develop a linear relationship unifying cooperation and competition in the sense that these two classes of games are mutually transferable. Finally, we analyze a non-convergent example of FP, the Shapley game, and develop sufficient conditions for FP to converge.
abstract_zh: 虚拟游戏（FP）是计算 n$ 玩家游戏中纳什均衡的最基本的博弈论学习框架之一，它为现代多智能体学习算法奠定了基础。尽管 FP 对零和博弈和潜在博弈具有可证明的收敛保证，但许多现实世界的问题往往是两者的混合体，并且 FP 的收敛性尚未得到充分研究。在本文中，我们将 FP 的收敛结果扩展到此类博弈及其他博弈的组合。具体来说，我们通过利用博弈分解技术推导出 FP 收敛的新条件。我们进一步发展了一种将合作与竞争统一起来的线性关系，因为这两类游戏是可以相互转移的。最后，我们分析了 FP 的非收敛示例——Shapley 博弈，并提出了 FP 收敛的充分条件。

AI.tldr: 本文研究拟态博弈在混合博弈中的收敛性问题，通过分解方法扩展其收敛条件。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已证明FP在零和博弈和潜在博弈中的收敛性，但现实问题常为两者的混合，需进一步研究FP在混合情况下的收敛性。
AI.method: 采用游戏分解技术，推导FP收敛的新条件，并建立合作与竞争的线性关系，分析非收敛案例。
AI.result: 扩展FP在混合博弈的收敛条件，统一合作与竞争关系，提出Shapley博弈的收敛充分条件。
AI.conclusion: 通过分解方法为FP在混合博弈中的收敛性提供理论支持，并指出需进一步研究更复杂场景。

authors_text: Patrick Hemmer,Max Schemmer,Niklas Kühl,Michael Vössing,Gerhard Satzger
title: On the Effect of Information Asymmetry in Human-AI Teams
title_zh: 信息不对称对人类-人工智能团队的影响
comment: CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), Workshop on Human-Centered Explainable AI (HCXAI)
comments: CHI Conference on Human Factors in Computing Systems (CHI '22), Workshop on Human-Centered Explainable AI (HCXAI)
abstract: Over the last years, the rising capabilities of artificial intelligence (AI) have improved human decision-making in many application areas. Teaming between AI and humans may even lead to complementary team performance (CTP), i.e., a level of performance beyond the ones that can be reached by AI or humans individually. Many researchers have proposed using explainable AI (XAI) to enable humans to rely on AI advice appropriately and thereby reach CTP. However, CTP is rarely demonstrated in previous work as often the focus is on the design of explainability, while a fundamental prerequisite -- the presence of complementarity potential between humans and AI -- is often neglected. Therefore, we focus on the existence of this potential for effective human-AI decision-making. Specifically, we identify information asymmetry as an essential source of complementarity potential, as in many real-world situations, humans have access to different contextual information. By conducting an online experiment, we demonstrate that humans can use such contextual information to adjust the AI's decision, finally resulting in CTP.
summary: Over the last years, the rising capabilities of artificial intelligence (AI) have improved human decision-making in many application areas. Teaming between AI and humans may even lead to complementary team performance (CTP), i.e., a level of performance beyond the ones that can be reached by AI or humans individually. Many researchers have proposed using explainable AI (XAI) to enable humans to rely on AI advice appropriately and thereby reach CTP. However, CTP is rarely demonstrated in previous work as often the focus is on the design of explainability, while a fundamental prerequisite -- the presence of complementarity potential between humans and AI -- is often neglected. Therefore, we focus on the existence of this potential for effective human-AI decision-making. Specifically, we identify information asymmetry as an essential source of complementarity potential, as in many real-world situations, humans have access to different contextual information. By conducting an online experiment, we demonstrate that humans can use such contextual information to adjust the AI's decision, finally resulting in CTP.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，人工智能（AI）能力的不断增强改善了人类在许多应用领域的决策。人工智能和人类之间的合作甚至可能会带来互补的团队绩效（CTP），即超出人工智能或人类单独可以达到的绩效水平。许多研究人员提出使用可解释的人工智能（XAI）来使人类能够适当地依赖人工智能建议，从而达到 CTP。然而，CTP 在之前的工作中很少得到证明，因为重点往往是可解释性的设计，而一个基本先决条件——人类和人工智能之间存在互补潜力——往往被忽视。因此，我们关注这种有效的人类人工智能决策潜力的存在。具体来说，我们将信息不对称视为互补潜力的重要来源，因为在许多现实世界的情况下，人类可以获得不同的上下文信息。通过进行在线实验，我们证明人类可以利用此类上下文信息来调整人工智能的决策，最终产生 CTP。

AI.tldr: 本文研究信息不对称在人机团队中的作用，通过实验验证人类如何利用上下文信息调整AI决策以实现互补性团队绩效（CTP）。
AI.motivation: 现有研究过度关注可解释AI（XAI）设计，却忽视了互补性团队绩效的前提条件——人类与AI间的信息不对称潜力。
AI.method: 通过在线实验，让人类参与者基于不同情境信息调整AI决策，观察团队绩效变化。
AI.result: 实验表明，人类能有效利用情境信息修正AI决策，使团队绩效超越个体表现，实现互补性团队绩效。
AI.conclusion: 信息不对称是人机互补性潜力的关键来源，为设计高效人机协作系统提供了理论依据。

Therefore, we focus on the existence of this potential for effective human-AI decision-making. Specifically, we identify information asymmetry as an essential source of complementarity potential, as in many real-world situations, humans have access to different contextual information. By conducting an online experiment, we demonstrate that humans can use such contextual information to adjust the AI's decision, finally resulting in CTP. 在过去的几年里，人工智能（AI）能力的不断增强改善了人类在许多应用领域的决策。人工智能和人类之间的合作甚至可能会带来互补的团队绩效（CTP），即超出人工智能或人类单独可以达到的绩效水平。许多研究人员提出使用可解释的人工智能（XAI）来使人类能够适当地依赖人工智能建议，从而达到 CTP。然而，CTP 在之前的工作中很少得到证明，因为重点往往是可解释性的设计，而一个基本先决条件——人类和人工智能之间存在互补潜力——往往被忽视。因此，我们关注这种有效的人类人工智能决策潜力的存在。具体来说，我们将信息不对称视为互补潜力的重要来源，因为在许多现实世界的情况下，人类可以获得不同的上下文信息。通过进行在线实验，我们证明人类可以利用此类上下文信息来调整人工智能的决策，最终产生 CTP。 本文研究信息不对称在人机团队中的作用，通过实验验证人类如何利用上下文信息调整AI决策以实现互补性团队绩效（CTP）。 Patrick Hemmer,Max Schemmer,Niklas Kühl,Michael Vössing,Gerhard Satzger cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Simon Bultmann,Sven Behnke
title: 3D Semantic Scene Perception using Distributed Smart Edge Sensors
title_zh: 使用分布式智能边缘传感器的 3D 语义场景感知
comment: 17th International Conference on Intelligent Autonomous Systems (IAS), Zagreb, Croatia, June 2022
comments: 17th International Conference on Intelligent Autonomous Systems (IAS), Zagreb, Croatia, June 2022
abstract: We present a system for 3D semantic scene perception consisting of a network of distributed smart edge sensors. The sensor nodes are based on an embedded CNN inference accelerator and RGB-D and thermal cameras. Efficient vision CNN models for object detection, semantic segmentation, and human pose estimation run on-device in real time. 2D human keypoint estimations, augmented with the RGB-D depth estimate, as well as semantically annotated point clouds are streamed from the sensors to a central backend, where multiple viewpoints are fused into an allocentric 3D semantic scene model. As the image interpretation is computed locally, only semantic information is sent over the network. The raw images remain on the sensor boards, significantly reducing the required bandwidth, and mitigating privacy risks for the observed persons. We evaluate the proposed system in challenging real-world multi-person scenes in our lab. The proposed perception system provides a complete scene view containing semantically annotated 3D geometry and estimates 3D poses of multiple persons in real time.
summary: We present a system for 3D semantic scene perception consisting of a network of distributed smart edge sensors. The sensor nodes are based on an embedded CNN inference accelerator and RGB-D and thermal cameras. Efficient vision CNN models for object detection, semantic segmentation, and human pose estimation run on-device in real time. 2D human keypoint estimations, augmented with the RGB-D depth estimate, as well as semantically annotated point clouds are streamed from the sensors to a central backend, where multiple viewpoints are fused into an allocentric 3D semantic scene model. As the image interpretation is computed locally, only semantic information is sent over the network. The raw images remain on the sensor boards, significantly reducing the required bandwidth, and mitigating privacy risks for the observed persons. We evaluate the proposed system in challenging real-world multi-person scenes in our lab. The proposed perception system provides a complete scene view containing semantically annotated 3D geometry and estimates 3D poses of multiple persons in real time.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个由分布式智能边缘传感器网络组成的 3D 语义场景感知系统。传感器节点基于嵌入式 CNN 推理加速器以及 RGB-D 和热像仪。用于对象检测、语义分割和人体姿势估计的高效视觉 CNN 模型在设备上实时运行。通过 RGB-D 深度估计增强的 2D 人体关键点估计以及语义注释的点云从传感器流式传输到中央后端，在中央后端将多个视点融合到非中心 3D 语义场景模型中。由于图像解释是在本地计算的，因此仅通过网络发送语义信息。原始图像保留在传感器板上，大大减少了所需的带宽，并减轻了被观察者的隐私风险。我们在实验室中通过具有挑战性的现实多人场景来评估所提出的系统。所提出的感知系统提供了包含语义注释的 3D 几何形状的完整场景视图，并实时估计多人的 3D 姿势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于分布式智能边缘传感器的3D语义场景感知系统，通过本地设备端实时处理并融合多视角数据生成语义化3D场景模型。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉系统存在带宽占用高和隐私泄露风险，本文旨在通过边缘计算减少数据传输量并保护隐私，同时实现精准的3D场景理解。
AI.method: 部署嵌入式CNN加速器的传感器网络，运行物体检测、语义分割和人体姿态估计模型，提取2D关键点与语义点云并传输至中央后端进行多视角融合。
AI.result: 在实验室多人群场景测试中，系统成功生成包含语义标注的3D几何模型并实时估计多人3D姿态，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过边缘智能处理显著降低网络负载与隐私风险，为实时3D语义场景感知提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Viktoria Heimann,Andreas Spruck,André Kaup
title: Frequency-Selective Geometry Upsampling of Point Clouds
title_zh: 点云的频率选择性几何上采样
comment: 5 pages, 3 figures, International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022
comments: 5 pages, 3 figures, International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022
abstract: The demand for high-resolution point clouds has increased throughout the last years. However, capturing high-resolution point clouds is expensive and thus, frequently replaced by upsampling of low-resolution data. Most state-of-the-art methods are either restricted to a rastered grid, incorporate normal vectors, or are trained for a single use case. We propose to use the frequency selectivity principle, where a frequency model is estimated locally that approximates the surface of the point cloud. Then, additional points are inserted into the approximated surface. Our novel frequency-selective geometry upsampling shows superior results in terms of subjective as well as objective quality compared to state-of-the-art methods for scaling factors of 2 and 4. On average, our proposed method shows a 4.4 times smaller point-to-point error than the second best state-of-the-art PU-Net for a scale factor of 4.
summary: The demand for high-resolution point clouds has increased throughout the last years. However, capturing high-resolution point clouds is expensive and thus, frequently replaced by upsampling of low-resolution data. Most state-of-the-art methods are either restricted to a rastered grid, incorporate normal vectors, or are trained for a single use case. We propose to use the frequency selectivity principle, where a frequency model is estimated locally that approximates the surface of the point cloud. Then, additional points are inserted into the approximated surface. Our novel frequency-selective geometry upsampling shows superior results in terms of subjective as well as objective quality compared to state-of-the-art methods for scaling factors of 2 and 4. On average, our proposed method shows a 4.4 times smaller point-to-point error than the second best state-of-the-art PU-Net for a scale factor of 4.
abstract_zh: 近年来，对高分辨率点云的需求不断增加。然而，捕获高分辨率点云的成本很高，因此经常被低分辨率数据的上采样所取代。大多数最先进的方法要么仅限于光栅网格，合并法向量，要么针对单个用例进行训练。我们建议使用频率选择性原理，其中频率模型是在局部估计的，该模型近似于点云的表面。然后，将附加点插入到近似曲面中。与缩放因子为 2 和 4 的最先进方法相比，我们新颖的频率选择性几何上采样在主观和客观质量方面都显示出优异的结果。平均而言，我们提出的方法在缩放因子为 4 时显示出比第二最佳最先进 PU-Net 小 4.4 倍的点对点误差。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于频率选择性的点云几何上采样方法，通过局部频率模型逼近点云表面并插入新点，以提高点云分辨率。
AI.motivation: 高分辨率点云需求增加但获取成本高昂，现有上采样方法受限于栅格网格、法向量依赖或单一场景训练，亟需更优解决方案。
AI.method: 利用频率选择性原理，局部估计频率模型逼近点云表面，根据模型在表面插入新点实现上采样。
AI.result: 在放大倍数2和4的测试中，主观和客观质量均优于现有方法，放大4倍时点对点误差仅为次优方法PU-Net的1/4.4。
AI.conclusion: 频率选择性上采样方法有效提升了点云分辨率质量，为多场景点云处理提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jakob Bæk Tejs Houen,Mikkel Thorup
title: Understanding the Moments of Tabulation Hashing via Chaoses
title_zh: 通过混沌理解表格散列的时刻
comment: 79 pages. Extended abstract to appear at ICALP'22
comments: 79 pages. Extended abstract to appear at ICALP'22
abstract: Simple tabulation hashing dates back to Zobrist in 1970 and is defined as follows: Each key is viewed as $c$ characters from some alphabet $Σ$, we have $c$ fully random hash functions $h_0, \ldots, h_{c - 1} \colon Σ\to \{0, \ldots, 2^l - 1\}$, and a key $x = (x_0, \ldots, x_{c - 1})$ is hashed to $h(x) = h_0(x_0) \oplus \ldots \oplus h_{c - 1}(x_{c - 1})$ where $\oplus$ is the bitwise XOR operation. The previous results on tabulation hashing by P{\v a}tra{\c s}cu and Thorup~[J.ACM'11] and by Aamand et al.~[STOC'20] focused on proving Chernoff-style tail bounds on hash-based sums, e.g., the number keys hashing to a given value, for simple tabulation hashing, but their bounds do not cover the entire tail. Chaoses are random variables of the form $\sum a_{i_0, \ldots, i_{c - 1}} X_{i_0} \cdot \ldots \cdot X_{i_{c - 1}}$ where $X_i$ are independent random variables. Chaoses are a well-studied concept from probability theory, and tight analysis has been proven in several instances, e.g., when the independent random variables are standard Gaussian variables and when the independent random variables have logarithmically convex tails. We notice that hash-based sums of simple tabulation hashing can be seen as a sum of chaoses that are not independent. This motivates us to use techniques from the theory of chaoses to analyze hash-based sums of simple tabulation hashing. In this paper, we obtain bounds for all the moments of hash-based sums for simple tabulation hashing which are tight up to constants depending only on $c$. In contrast with the previous attempts, our approach will mostly be analytical and does not employ intricate combinatorial arguments. The improved analysis of simple tabulation hashing allows us to obtain bounds for the moments of hash-based sums for the mixed tabulation hashing introduced by Dahlgaard et al.~[FOCS'15].

In this paper, we obtain bounds for all the moments of hash-based sums for simple tabulation hashing which are tight up to constants depending only on $c$. In contrast with the previous attempts, our approach will mostly be analytical and does not employ intricate combinatorial arguments. The improved analysis of simple tabulation hashing allows us to obtain bounds for the moments of hash-based sums for the mixed tabulation hashing introduced by Dahlgaard et al.~[FOCS'15].
abstract_zh: 简单的制表哈希可以追溯到 1970 年的 Zobrist，定义如下：每个键被视为来自某个字母表 $Σ$ 的 $c$ 个字符，我们有 $c$ 完全随机的哈希函数 $h_0, \ldots, h_{c - 1} \colon Σ\to \{0, \ldots, 2^l - 1\}$，以及一个键 $x = (x_0, \ldots, x_{c - 1})$ 被哈希为 $h(x) = h_0(x_0) \oplus \ldots \oplus h_{c - 1}(x_{c - 1})$，其中 $\oplus$ 是按位异或运算。 P{\v a}tra{\c s}cu 和 Thorup~[J.ACM'11] 以及 Aamand 等人~[STOC'20] 先前关于表格散列的结果侧重于证明基于散列的和的 Chernoff 式尾部边界，例如，对于简单的表格散列，数字键散列到给定值，但它们的边界不覆盖整个尾部。混沌是 $\sum a_{i_0, \ldots, i_{c - 1}} X_{i_0} \cdot \ldots \cdot X_{i_{c - 1}}$ 形式的随机变量，其中 $X_i$ 是独立随机变量。混沌是概率论中经过充分研究的概念，并且严格分析已在多种情况下得到证明，例如，当独立随机变量是标准高斯变量时以及当独立随机变量具有对数凸尾时。我们注意到，简单表格散列的基于散列的总和可以被视为不独立的混沌的总和。这促使我们使用混沌理论中的技术来分析简单列表哈希的基于哈希的和。在本文中，我们获得了简单列表散列的基于散列求和的所有矩的界限，这些矩严格限制于仅依赖于 $c$ 的常数。与之前的尝试相比，我们的方法主要是分析性的，不采用复杂的组合论证。对简单列表散列的改进分析使我们能够获得 Dahlgaard 等人引入的混合列表散列的基于散列求和的矩的界限。~[FOCS'15]。

AI.tldr: 本文通过引入混沌理论分析简单表征哈希的哈希求和矩，改进了传统分析方法。
AI.motivation: 传统Chernoff界分析无法覆盖完整尾部，而混沌理论能处理非独立变量的乘积求和，为哈希分析提供新视角。
AI.method: 将哈希求和视为非独立混沌变量，采用分析方法而非组合论证，推导矩的紧界。
AI.result: 获得简单表征哈希哈希求和的所有矩的紧界（常数依赖于c），并扩展至混合表征哈希。
AI.conclusion: 混沌理论为哈希分析提供有效工具，改进的矩界提升了相关哈希应用的理论保障。

search_text: Understanding the Moments of Tabulation Hashing via Chaoses 通过混沌理解表格散列的时刻 Simple tabulation hashing dates back to Zobrist in 1970 and is defined as follows: Each key is viewed as $c$ characters from some alphabet $Σ$, we have $c$ fully random hash functions $h_0, \ldots, h_{c - 1} \colon Σ\to \{0, \ldots, 2^l - 1\}$, and a key $x = (x_0, \ldots, x_{c - 1})$ is hashed to $h(x) = h_0(x_0) \oplus \ldots \oplus h_{c - 1}(x_{c - 1})$ where $\oplus$ is the bitwise XOR operation. The previous results on tabulation hashing by P{\v a}tra{\c s}cu and Thorup~[J.ACM'11] and by Aamand et al.~[STOC'20] focused on proving Chernoff-style tail bounds on hash-based sums, e.g., the number keys hashing to a given value, for simple tabulation hashing, but their bounds do not cover the entire tail. Chaoses are random variables of the form $\sum a_{i_0, \ldots, i_{c - 1}} X_{i_0} \cdot \ldots \cdot X_{i_{c - 1}}$ where $X_i$ are independent random variables. Chaoses are a well-studied concept from probability theory, and tight analysis has been proven in several instances, e.g., when the independent random variables are standard Gaussian variables and when the independent random variables have logarithmically convex tails. We notice that hash-based sums of simple tabulation hashing can be seen as a sum of chaoses that are not independent. This motivates us to use techniques from the theory of chaoses to analyze hash-based sums of simple tabulation hashing. In this paper, we obtain bounds for all the moments of hash-based sums for simple tabulation hashing which are tight up to constants depending only on $c$. In contrast with the previous attempts, our approach will mostly be analytical and does not employ intricate combinatorial arguments. The improved analysis of simple tabulation hashing allows us to obtain bounds for the moments of hash-based sums for the mixed tabulation hashing introduced by Dahlgaard et al.~[FOCS'15]. 简单的制表哈希可以追溯到 1970 年的 Zobrist，定义如下：每个键被视为来自某个字母表 $Σ$ 的 $c$ 个字符，我们有 $c$ 完全随机的哈希函数 $h_0, \ldots, h_{c - 1} \colon Σ\to \{0, \ldots, 2^l - 1\}$，以及一个键 $x = (x_0, \ldots, x_{c - 1})$ 被哈希为 $h(x) = h_0(x_0) \oplus \ldots \oplus h_{c - 1}(x_{c - 1})$，其中 $\oplus$ 是按位异或运算。 P{\v a}tra{\c s}cu 和 Thorup~[J.ACM'11] 以及 Aamand 等人~[STOC'20] 先前关于表格散列的结果侧重于证明基于散列的和的 Chernoff 式尾部边界，例如，对于简单的表格散列，数字键散列到给定值，但它们的边界不覆盖整个尾部。混沌是 $\sum a_{i_0, \ldots, i_{c - 1}} X_{i_0} \cdot \ldots \cdot X_{i_{c - 1}}$ 形式的随机变量，其中 $X_i$ 是独立随机变量。混沌是概率论中经过充分研究的概念，并且严格分析已在多种情况下得到证明，例如，当独立随机变量是标准高斯变量时以及当独立随机变量具有对数凸尾时。我们注意到，简单表格散列的基于散列的总和可以被视为不独立的混沌的总和。这促使我们使用混沌理论中的技术来分析简单列表哈希的基于哈希的和。在本文中，我们获得了简单列表散列的基于散列求和的所有矩的界限，这些矩严格限制于仅依赖于 $c$ 的常数。与之前的尝试相比，我们的方法主要是分析性的，不采用复杂的组合论证。对简单列表散列的改进分析使我们能够获得 Dahlgaard 等人引入的混合列表散列的基于散列求和的矩的界限。~[FOCS'15]。 本文通过引入混沌理论分析简单表征哈希的哈希求和矩，改进了传统分析方法。 Jakob Bæk Tejs Houen,Mikkel Thorup cs.DS

authors_text: Shengyu Huang,Chih-Hung Liu,Daniel Rutschman
title: Approximate Selection with Unreliable Comparisons in Optimal Expected Time
title_zh: 最佳预期时间中不可靠比较的近似选择
abstract: Given $n$ elements, an integer $k$ and a parameter $\varepsilon$, we study to select an element with rank in $(k-n\varepsilon,k+n\varepsilon]$ using unreliable comparisons where the outcome of each comparison is incorrect independently with a constant error probability, and multiple comparisons between the same pair of elements are independent. In this fault model, the fundamental problems of finding the minimum, selecting the $k$-th smallest element and sorting have been shown to require $Θ\big(n \log \frac{1}{Q}\big)$, $Θ\big(n\log \frac{\min\{k,n-k\}}{Q}\big)$ and $Θ\big(n\log \frac{n}{Q}\big)$ comparisons, respectively, to achieve success probability $1-Q$. Recently, Leucci and Liu proved that the approximate minimum selection problem ($k=0$) requires expected $Θ(\varepsilon^{-1}\log \frac{1}{Q})$ comparisons. We develop a randomized algorithm that performs expected $O(\frac{k}{n}\varepsilon^{-2} \log \frac{1}{Q})$ comparisons to achieve success probability at least $1-Q$. We also prove that any randomized algorithm with success probability at least $1-Q$ performs expected $Ω(\frac{k}{n}\varepsilon^{-2}\log \frac{1}{Q})$ comparisons. Our results indicate a clear distinction between approximating the minimum and approximating the $k$-th smallest element, which holds even for the high probability guarantee, e.g., if $k=\frac{n}{2}$ and $Q=\frac{1}{n}$, $Θ(\varepsilon^{-1}\log n)$ versus $Θ(\varepsilon^{-2}\log n)$. Moreover, if $\varepsilon=n^{-α}$ for $α\in (0,\frac{1}{2})$, the asymptotic difference is almost quadratic, i.e., $\tildeΘ(n^α)$ versus $\tildeΘ(n^{2α})$.

In this fault model, the fundamental problems of finding the minimum, selecting the $k$-th smallest element and sorting have been shown to require $Θ\big(n \log \frac{1}{Q}\big)$, $Θ\big(n\log \frac{\min\{k,n-k\}}{Q}\big)$ and $Θ\big(n\log \frac{n}{Q}\big)$ comparisons, respectively, to achieve success probability $1-Q$. Recently, Leucci and Liu proved that the approximate minimum selection problem ($k=0$) requires expected $Θ(\varepsilon^{-1}\log \frac{1}{Q})$ comparisons. We develop a randomized algorithm that performs expected $O(\frac{k}{n}\varepsilon^{-2} \log \frac{1}{Q})$ comparisons to achieve success probability at least $1-Q$. We also prove that any randomized algorithm with success probability at least $1-Q$ performs expected $Ω(\frac{k}{n}\varepsilon^{-2}\log \frac{1}{Q})$ comparisons. Our results indicate a clear distinction between approximating the minimum and approximating the $k$-th smallest element, which holds even for the high probability guarantee, e.g., if $k=\frac{n}{2}$ and $Q=\frac{1}{n}$, $Θ(\varepsilon^{-1}\log n)$ versus $Θ(\varepsilon^{-2}\log n)$. Moreover, if $\varepsilon=n^{-α}$ for $α\in (0,\frac{1}{2})$, the asymptotic difference is almost quadratic, i.e., $\tildeΘ(n^α)$ versus $\tildeΘ(n^{2α})$.
abstract_zh: 给定$n$个元素、一个整数$k$和一个参数$\varepsilon$，我们研究使用不可靠的比较来选择一个在$(k-n\varepsilon,k+n\varepsilon]$中排名的元素，其中每次比较的结果都是独立错误的，具有恒定的错误概率，并且同一对元素之间的多次比较是独立的。在这个故障模型中，找到最小值、选择第$k$个最小元素和排序的基本问题已被证明需要最近，Leucci 和 Liu 证明了近似最小选择问题 ($k=0$) 需要期望的成功概率。我们开发了一种随机算法，可以执行预期的 $O(\frac{k}{n}\varepsilon^{-2} \log \frac{1}{Q})$ 比较，以实现至少 $1-Q$ 的成功概率。我们还证明，任何成功概率至少为 $1-Q$ 的随机算法都可以执行预期的操作。 $Ω(\frac{k}{n}\varepsilon^{-2}\log \frac{1}{Q})$ 比较表明，近似最小值和近似第 $k$ 个最小元素之间存在明显区别，即使对于高概率保证也成立，例如，如果 $k=\frac{n}{2}$ 和 $Q=\frac{1}{n}$，则 $θ(\varepsilon^{-1}\log n)$ 与$θ(\varepsilon^{-2}\log n)$。此外，如果 $\varepsilon=n^{-α}$ 对于 $α\in (0,\frac{1}{2})$，渐近差异几乎是二次方，即 $\tildeθ(n^α)$ 与 $\tildeθ(n^{2α})$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在不可靠比较的情况下，如何以最优预期时间近似选择第k小元素。
AI.motivation: 在实际场景中，比较操作可能存在错误，传统算法假设比较准确，但面对不可靠比较时需重新设计算法并分析复杂度。
AI.method: 提出随机化算法，通过概率分析设计比较策略，并证明其预期比较次数的上界与下界。
AI.result: 算法预期比较次数为O((k/n)ε⁻² log(1/Q))，且证明任何算法需至少Ω((k/n)ε⁻² log(1/Q))次比较，揭示近似选择第k小元素与近似最小值的复杂度差异。
AI.conclusion: 近似选择第k小元素的复杂度显著高于近似最小值，尤其当k接近n/2时，差异呈二次关系，凸显问题本质区别。

authors_text: Chris Lu,Timon Willi,Christian Schroeder de Witt,Jakob Foerster
title: Model-Free Opponent Shaping
title_zh: 无模型对手塑造
abstract: In general-sum games, the interaction of self-interested learning agents commonly leads to collectively worst-case outcomes, such as defect-defect in the iterated prisoner's dilemma (IPD). To overcome this, some methods, such as Learning with Opponent-Learning Awareness (LOLA), shape their opponents' learning process. However, these methods are myopic since only a small number of steps can be anticipated, are asymmetric since they treat other agents as naive learners, and require the use of higher-order derivatives, which are calculated through white-box access to an opponent's differentiable learning algorithm. To address these issues, we propose Model-Free Opponent Shaping (M-FOS). M-FOS learns in a meta-game in which each meta-step is an episode of the underlying inner game. The meta-state consists of the inner policies, and the meta-policy produces a new inner policy to be used in the next episode. M-FOS then uses generic model-free optimisation methods to learn meta-policies that accomplish long-horizon opponent shaping. Empirically, M-FOS near-optimally exploits naive learners and other, more sophisticated algorithms from the literature. For example, to the best of our knowledge, it is the first method to learn the well-known Zero-Determinant (ZD) extortion strategy in the IPD. In the same settings, M-FOS leads to socially optimal outcomes under meta-self-play. Finally, we show that M-FOS can be scaled to high-dimensional settings.
summary: In general-sum games, the interaction of self-interested learning agents commonly leads to collectively worst-case outcomes, such as defect-defect in the iterated prisoner's dilemma (IPD). To overcome this, some methods, such as Learning with Opponent-Learning Awareness (LOLA), shape their opponents' learning process. However, these methods are myopic since only a small number of steps can be anticipated, are asymmetric since they treat other agents as naive learners, and require the use of higher-order derivatives, which are calculated through white-box access to an opponent's differentiable learning algorithm. To address these issues, we propose Model-Free Opponent Shaping (M-FOS). M-FOS learns in a meta-game in which each meta-step is an episode of the underlying inner game. The meta-state consists of the inner policies, and the meta-policy produces a new inner policy to be used in the next episode. M-FOS then uses generic model-free optimisation methods to learn meta-policies that accomplish long-horizon opponent shaping. Empirically, M-FOS near-optimally exploits naive learners and other, more sophisticated algorithms from the literature. For example, to the best of our knowledge, it is the first method to learn the well-known Zero-Determinant (ZD) extortion strategy in the IPD. In the same settings, M-FOS leads to socially optimal outcomes under meta-self-play. Finally, we show that M-FOS can be scaled to high-dimensional settings.
abstract_zh: 在一般和博弈中，自利学习主体的相互作用通常会导致集体最坏情况的结果，例如迭代囚徒困境（IPD）中的缺陷-缺陷。为了克服这个问题，一些方法，例如利用对手学习意识进行学习（LOLA），可以塑造对手的学习过程。然而，这些方法是短视的，因为只能预期少量的步骤，是不对称的，因为它们将其他代理视为朴素学习者，并且需要使用高阶导数，这些导数是通过白盒访问对手的可微学习算法来计算的。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了无模型对手塑造（M-FOS）。 M-FOS 在元游戏中学习，其中每个元步骤都是底层内部游戏的一个片段。元状态由内部策略组成，元策略产生一个新的内部策略以在下一阶段使用。然后，M-FOS 使用通用的无模型优化方法来学习实现长期对手塑造的元策略。根据经验，M-FOS 近乎最佳地利用了朴素学习器和文献中其他更复杂的算法。例如，据我们所知，这是第一个学习 IPD 中著名的零判定（ZD）勒索策略的方法。在相同的环境中，M-FOS 在元自我博弈下会带来社会最优结果。最后，我们证明 M-FOS 可以扩展到高维设置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无模型对手塑造方法（M-FOS），通过元学习框架在一般和博弈中实现长期对手策略塑造，以克服现有方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 现有对手塑造方法存在短视、不对称及依赖高阶导数等缺陷，难以在复杂博弈中实现长期最优合作。
AI.method: 构建元游戏框架，将内部博弈的策略作为元状态，通过无模型优化学习元策略，生成跨回合的长期对手塑造策略。
AI.result: 实验表明M-FOS可近似最优地对抗简单学习者和复杂算法，在重复囚徒困境中首次学习到ZD策略，并在元自博弈中达成社会最优解，且适用于高维场景。
AI.conclusion: M-FOS通过元学习框架有效解决了对手塑造的长期性、对称性和可扩展性问题，为博弈学习提供了新范式。

search_text: Model-Free Opponent Shaping 无模型对手塑造 In general-sum games, the interaction of self-interested learning agents commonly leads to collectively worst-case outcomes, such as defect-defect in the iterated prisoner's dilemma (IPD). To overcome this, some methods, such as Learning with Opponent-Learning Awareness (LOLA), shape their opponents' learning process. However, these methods are myopic since only a small number of steps can be anticipated, are asymmetric since they treat other agents as naive learners, and require the use of higher-order derivatives, which are calculated through white-box access to an opponent's differentiable learning algorithm. To address these issues, we propose Model-Free Opponent Shaping (M-FOS). M-FOS learns in a meta-game in which each meta-step is an episode of the underlying inner game. The meta-state consists of the inner policies, and the meta-policy produces a new inner policy to be used in the next episode. M-FOS then uses generic model-free optimisation methods to learn meta-policies that accomplish long-horizon opponent shaping. Empirically, M-FOS near-optimally exploits naive learners and other, more sophisticated algorithms from the literature. For example, to the best of our knowledge, it is the first method to learn the well-known Zero-Determinant (ZD) extortion strategy in the IPD. In the same settings, M-FOS leads to socially optimal outcomes under meta-self-play. Finally, we show that M-FOS can be scaled to high-dimensional settings. 在一般和博弈中，自利学习主体的相互作用通常会导致集体最坏情况的结果，例如迭代囚徒困境（IPD）中的缺陷-缺陷。为了克服这个问题，一些方法，例如利用对手学习意识进行学习（LOLA），可以塑造对手的学习过程。然而，这些方法是短视的，因为只能预期少量的步骤，是不对称的，因为它们将其他代理视为朴素学习者，并且需要使用高阶导数，这些导数是通过白盒访问对手的可微学习算法来计算的。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了无模型对手塑造（M-FOS）。 M-FOS 在元游戏中学习，其中每个元步骤都是底层内部游戏的一个片段。元状态由内部策略组成，元策略产生一个新的内部策略以在下一阶段使用。然后，M-FOS 使用通用的无模型优化方法来学习实现长期对手塑造的元策略。根据经验，M-FOS 近乎最佳地利用了朴素学习器和文献中其他更复杂的算法。例如，据我们所知，这是第一个学习 IPD 中著名的零判定（ZD）勒索策略的方法。在相同的环境中，M-FOS 在元自我博弈下会带来社会最优结果。最后，我们证明 M-FOS 可以扩展到高维设置。 本文提出一种无模型对手塑造方法（M-FOS），通过元学习框架在一般和博弈中实现长期对手策略塑造，以克服现有方法的局限性。 Chris Lu,Timon Willi,Christian Schroeder de Witt,Jakob Foerster cs.AI,cs.MA

authors_text: Henna Kokkonen,Lauri Lovén,Naser Hossein Motlagh,Abhishek Kumar,Juha Partala,Tri Nguyen,Víctor Casamayor Pujol,Panos Kostakos,Teemu Leppänen,Alfonso González-Gil,Ester Sola,Iñigo Angulo,Madhusanka Liyanage,Mehdi Bennis,Sasu Tarkoma,Schahram Dustdar,Susanna Pirttikangas,Jukka Riekki
title: Autonomy and Intelligence in the Computing Continuum: Challenges, Enablers, and Future Directions for Orchestration
title_zh: 计算连续体中的自主性和智能：编排的挑战、推动因素和未来方向
abstract: Future AI applications require performance, reliability and privacy that the existing, cloud-dependant system architectures cannot provide. In this article, we study orchestration in the device-edge-cloud continuum, and focus on edge AI for resource orchestration. We claim that to support the constantly growing requirements of intelligent applications in the device-edge-cloud computing continuum, resource orchestration needs to embrace edge AI and emphasize local autonomy and intelligence. To justify the claim, we provide a general definition for continuum orchestration, and look at how current and emerging orchestration paradigms are suitable for the computing continuum. We describe certain major emerging research themes that may affect future orchestration, and provide an early vision of an orchestration paradigm that embraces those research themes. Finally, we survey current key edge AI methods and look at how they may contribute into fulfilling the vision of future continuum orchestration.
summary: Future AI applications require performance, reliability and privacy that the existing, cloud-dependant system architectures cannot provide. In this article, we study orchestration in the device-edge-cloud continuum, and focus on edge AI for resource orchestration. We claim that to support the constantly growing requirements of intelligent applications in the device-edge-cloud computing continuum, resource orchestration needs to embrace edge AI and emphasize local autonomy and intelligence. To justify the claim, we provide a general definition for continuum orchestration, and look at how current and emerging orchestration paradigms are suitable for the computing continuum. We describe certain major emerging research themes that may affect future orchestration, and provide an early vision of an orchestration paradigm that embraces those research themes. Finally, we survey current key edge AI methods and look at how they may contribute into fulfilling the vision of future continuum orchestration.
abstract_zh: 未来的人工智能应用程序需要现有的、依赖于云的系统架构无法提供的性能、可靠性和隐私性。在本文中，我们研究设备-边缘-云连续体中的编排，并重点关注用于资源编排的边缘 AI。我们认为，为了支持端-边-云计算​​连续体中智能应用不断增长的需求，资源编排需要拥抱边缘AI，强调本地自治和智能。为了证明这一说法的合理性，我们提供了连续体编排的一般定义，并研究了当前和新兴的编排范例如何适合计算连续体。我们描述了可能影响未来编排的某些主要新兴研究主题，并提供了包含这些研究主题的编排范式的早期愿景。最后，我们调查了当前关键的人工智能方法，并研究它们如何有助于实现未来连续编排的愿景。

AI.tldr: 本文研究设备-边缘-云连续体中的资源编排，主张通过边缘AI实现本地自主性与智能以满足未来AI应用需求。
AI.motivation: 现有云依赖架构无法满足未来AI应用对性能、可靠性和隐私的要求，需探索更高效的资源编排方案。
AI.method: 定义连续体编排框架，分析现有/新兴编排范式，识别关键研究主题，提出融合边缘AI的未来编排范式并调研相关技术方法。
AI.result: 提出结合边缘AI的编排范式，强调本地自主决策能力，并探讨边缘AI技术如何支撑未来连续体编排目标。
AI.conclusion: 未来资源编排需深度整合边缘AI技术，通过增强本地智能与自主性，构建适应智能应用需求的新架构体系。

authors_text: Oliver Buchholz,Eric Raidl
title: A Falsificationist Account of Artificial Neural Networks
title_zh: 人工神经网络的证伪主义解释
abstract: Machine learning operates at the intersection of statistics and computer science. This raises the question as to its underlying methodology. While much emphasis has been put on the close link between the process of learning from data and induction, the falsificationist component of machine learning has received minor attention. In this paper, we argue that the idea of falsification is central to the methodology of machine learning. It is commonly thought that machine learning algorithms infer general prediction rules from past observations. This is akin to a statistical procedure by which estimates are obtained from a sample of data. But machine learning algorithms can also be described as choosing one prediction rule from an entire class of functions. In particular, the algorithm that determines the weights of an artificial neural network operates by empirical risk minimization and rejects prediction rules that lack empirical adequacy. It also exhibits a behavior of implicit regularization that pushes hypothesis choice toward simpler prediction rules. We argue that taking both aspects together gives rise to a falsificationist account of artificial neural networks.
summary: Machine learning operates at the intersection of statistics and computer science. This raises the question as to its underlying methodology. While much emphasis has been put on the close link between the process of learning from data and induction, the falsificationist component of machine learning has received minor attention. In this paper, we argue that the idea of falsification is central to the methodology of machine learning. It is commonly thought that machine learning algorithms infer general prediction rules from past observations. This is akin to a statistical procedure by which estimates are obtained from a sample of data. But machine learning algorithms can also be described as choosing one prediction rule from an entire class of functions. In particular, the algorithm that determines the weights of an artificial neural network operates by empirical risk minimization and rejects prediction rules that lack empirical adequacy. It also exhibits a behavior of implicit regularization that pushes hypothesis choice toward simpler prediction rules. We argue that taking both aspects together gives rise to a falsificationist account of artificial neural networks.
abstract_zh: 机器学习是统计学和计算机科学的交叉点。这就提出了其基本方法论的问题。虽然人们非常重视从数据中学习的过程与归纳之间的密切联系，但机器学习的证伪成分却很少受到关注。在本文中，我们认为证伪思想是机器学习方法论的核心。人们普遍认为机器学习算法从过去的观察中推断出一般的预测规则。这类似于从数据样本中获得估计值的统计过程。但机器学习算法也可以描述为从一整类函数中选择一个预测规则。特别是，确定人工神经网络权重的算法通过经验风险最小化来运行，并拒绝缺乏经验充分性的预测规则。它还表现出隐式正则化行为，将假设选择推向更简单的预测规则。我们认为，将这两个方面结合在一起会产生对人工神经网络的证伪主义解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于证伪主义的人工神经网络方法论，强调机器学习中通过经验风险最小化和隐式正则化机制拒绝无效预测规则的过程。
AI.motivation: 尽管机器学习常被视为归纳过程，但其证伪主义特征长期被忽视。作者旨在揭示神经网络算法中隐含的证伪机制，为机器学习方法论提供新视角。
AI.method: 通过分析神经网络权重确定过程中的经验风险最小化策略，结合隐式正则化对假设选择的约束，构建证伪主义框架解释模型训练行为。
AI.result: 证明神经网络同时具备归纳（从数据中学习规律）和证伪（淘汰不充分假设）双重特性，形成独特的证伪主义方法论体系。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习本质是证伪过程，神经网络通过动态淘汰无效假设实现模型优化，这一发现为理解AI决策机制提供哲学基础。
