search_text: A Falsificationist Account of Artificial Neural Networks 人工神经网络的证伪主义解释 Machine learning operates at the intersection of statistics and computer science. This raises the question as to its underlying methodology. While much emphasis has been put on the close link between the process of learning from data and induction, the falsificationist component of machine learning has received minor attention. In this paper, we argue that the idea of falsification is central to the methodology of machine learning. It is commonly thought that machine learning algorithms infer general prediction rules from past observations. This is akin to a statistical procedure by which estimates are obtained from a sample of data. But machine learning algorithms can also be described as choosing one prediction rule from an entire class of functions. In particular, the algorithm that determines the weights of an artificial neural network operates by empirical risk minimization and rejects prediction rules that lack empirical adequacy. It also exhibits a behavior of implicit regularization that pushes hypothesis choice toward simpler prediction rules. We argue that taking both aspects together gives rise to a falsificationist account of artificial neural networks. 机器学习是统计学和计算机科学的交叉点。这就提出了其基本方法论的问题。虽然人们非常重视从数据中学习的过程与归纳之间的密切联系，但机器学习的证伪成分却很少受到关注。在本文中，我们认为证伪思想是机器学习方法论的核心。人们普遍认为机器学习算法从过去的观察中推断出一般的预测规则。这类似于从数据样本中获得估计值的统计过程。但机器学习算法也可以描述为从一整类函数中选择一个预测规则。特别是，确定人工神经网络权重的算法通过经验风险最小化来运行，并拒绝缺乏经验充分性的预测规则。它还表现出隐式正则化行为，将假设选择推向更简单的预测规则。我们认为，将这两个方面结合在一起会产生对人工神经网络的证伪主义解释。 本文提出了一种基于证伪主义的人工神经网络方法论，强调机器学习中通过经验风险最小化和隐式正则化机制拒绝无效预测规则的过程。 Oliver Buchholz,Eric Raidl cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

authors_text: Patrick Musau,Nathaniel Hamilton,Diego Manzanas Lopez,Preston Robinette,Taylor T. Johnson
title: An Empirical Analysis of the Use of Real-Time Reachability for the Safety Assurance of Autonomous Vehicles
title_zh: 利用实时可达性保障自动驾驶汽车安全的实证分析
comment: 30 pages, 12 Figures, Submitted to Artificial Intelligence's Special Issue on "Risk-Aware Autonomous Systems: Theory and Practice."
comments: 30 pages, 12 Figures, Submitted to Artificial Intelligence's Special Issue on "Risk-Aware Autonomous Systems: Theory and Practice."
abstract: Recent advances in machine learning technologies and sensing have paved the way for the belief that safe, accessible, and convenient autonomous vehicles may be realized in the near future. Despite tremendous advances within this context, fundamental challenges around safety and reliability are limiting their arrival and comprehensive adoption. Autonomous vehicles are often tasked with operating in dynamic and uncertain environments. As a result, they often make use of highly complex components, such as machine learning approaches, to handle the nuances of sensing, actuation, and control. While these methods are highly effective, they are notoriously difficult to assure. Moreover, within uncertain and dynamic environments, design time assurance analyses may not be sufficient to guarantee safety. Thus, it is critical to monitor the correctness of these systems at runtime. One approach for providing runtime assurance of systems with components that may not be amenable to formal analysis is the simplex architecture, where an unverified component is wrapped with a safety controller and a switching logic designed to prevent dangerous behavior. In this paper, we propose using a real-time reachability algorithm for the implementation of the simplex architecture to assure the safety of a 1/10 scale open source autonomous vehicle platform known as F1/10. The reachability algorithm that we leverage (a) provides provable guarantees of safety, and (b) is used to detect potentially unsafe scenarios. In our approach, the need to analyze an underlying controller is abstracted away, instead focusing on the effects of the controller's decisions on the system's future states. We demonstrate the efficacy of our architecture through a vast set of experiments conducted both in simulation and on an embedded hardware platform.

In this paper, we propose using a real-time reachability algorithm for the implementation of the simplex architecture to assure the safety of a 1/10 scale open source autonomous vehicle platform known as F1/10. The reachability algorithm that we leverage (a) provides provable guarantees of safety, and (b) is used to detect potentially unsafe scenarios. abstract_zh: 机器学习技术和传感技术的最新进展为人们相信在不久的将来可以实现安全、便捷且方便的自动驾驶汽车铺平了道路。尽管在这方面取得了巨大进步，但安全性和可靠性方面的根本挑战限制了它们的到来和全面采用。自动驾驶车辆通常需要在动态和不确定的环境中运行。因此，他们经常利用高度复杂的组件（例如机器学习方法）来处理传感、驱动和控制的细微差别。虽然这些方法非常有效，但众所周知，它们很难保证。此外，在不确定和动态的环境中，设计时保证分析可能不足以保证安全。因此，在运行时监控这些系统的正确性至关重要。为具有可能不适合形式分析的组件的系统提供运行时保证的一种方法是单纯形架构，其中未经验证的组件被安全控制器和旨在防止危险行为的切换逻辑包裹。在本文中，我们建议使用实时可达性算法来实现单纯形架构，以确保称为 F1/10 的 1/10 比例开源自动驾驶车辆平台的安全性。我们利用的可达性算法（a）提供了可证明的安全保证，（b）用于检测潜在的不安全场景。在我们的方法中，分析底层控制器的需要被抽象出来，而是关注控制器的决策对系统未来状态的影响。我们通过在模拟和嵌入式硬件平台上进行的大量实验来证明我们的架构的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一种基于实时可达性算法的简单架构，用于确保自动驾驶车辆的安全性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在动态环境中依赖复杂组件，传统设计时的安全分析不足，需在运行时动态监控以确保安全。
AI.method: 采用实时可达性算法实现简单架构，通过安全控制器和切换逻辑检测潜在危险场景，无需直接分析底层控制器。
AI.result: 在仿真和嵌入式硬件平台上通过大量实验验证了该架构的有效性，证明其能提供安全保证。
AI.conclusion: 实时可达性算法有效提升了自动驾驶车辆的安全保障能力，且方法具有扩展性，可应用于其他复杂系统。

authors_text: Simo Linkola,Christian Guckelsberger,Tomi Männistö,Anna Kantosalo
title: How Does Embodiment Affect the Human Perception of Computational Creativity? An Experimental Study Framework
title_zh: 体现如何影响人类对计算创造力的感知？实验研究框架
comment: 8 pages, 1 figure. Published in the CEUR Proceedings of the Workshop "The Role of Embodiment in the Perception of Human & Artificial Creativity" at the International Conference on Computational Creativity (ICCC), June 27-28, 2022, Bozen, Italy. Simo Linkola and Christian Guckelsberger share first authorship
comments: 8 pages, 1 figure. Published in the CEUR Proceedings of the Workshop "The Role of Embodiment in the Perception of Human & Artificial Creativity" at the International Conference on Computational Creativity (ICCC), June 27-28, 2022, Bozen, Italy. Simo Linkola and Christian Guckelsberger share first authorship
abstract: Which factors influence the human assessment of creativity exhibited by a computational system is a core question of computational creativity (CC) research. Recently, the system's embodiment has been put forward as such a factor, but empirical studies of its effect are lacking. To this end, we propose an experimental framework which isolates the effect of embodiment on the perception of creativity from its effect on creativity per se. We not only manipulate the system's embodiment, but also the perceptual evidence as the basis for the human creativity assessment. We motivate the core framework with embodiment and perceptual evidence as independent and the creative process as controlled variable, and we provide recommendations on measuring the assessment of creativity as dependent variable. We hope the framework will inspire others to study the human perception of embodied CC in a principled manner.
summary: Which factors influence the human assessment of creativity exhibited by a computational system is a core question of computational creativity (CC) research. Recently, the system's embodiment has been put forward as such a factor, but empirical studies of its effect are lacking. To this end, we propose an experimental framework which isolates the effect of embodiment on the perception of creativity from its effect on creativity per se. We not only manipulate the system's embodiment, but also the perceptual evidence as the basis for the human creativity assessment. We motivate the core framework with embodiment and perceptual evidence as independent and the creative process as controlled variable, and we provide recommendations on measuring the assessment of creativity as dependent variable. We hope the framework will inspire others to study the human perception of embodied CC in a principled manner.
abstract_zh: 哪些因素影响人类对计算系统所表现出的创造力的评估是计算创造力（CC）研究的核心问题。最近，系统的体现被提出作为这样的因素，但缺乏对其效果的实证研究。为此，我们提出了一个实验框架，它将体现对创造力感知的影响与其对创造力本身的影响分开。我们不仅操纵系统的体现，而且还操纵感知证据作为人类创造力评估的基础。我们以体现和感知证据作为独立变量，以创意过程作为受控变量来激发核心框架，并提供衡量创造力评估作为因变量的建议。我们希望该框架能够激励其他人以原则性的方式研究人类对具体 CC 的感知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个实验框架，用于研究具身性对人类感知计算创造力的影响，并分离具身性与创造力本身的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管具身性被提出为影响人类评估计算系统创造力的因素，但缺乏实证研究，需建立系统化研究框架。
AI.method: 通过操控系统的具身性及感知证据作为独立变量，控制创造过程，提供测量创造力评估的标准化方法。
AI.result: 构建了可分离具身性与创造力影响的实验框架，为后续研究提供方法论基础。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有望推动学界以系统化方式研究具身化计算创造力的人类感知机制。

tldr: 本文提出一个实验框架，用于研究具身性对人类感知计算创造力的影响，并分离具身性与创造力本身的影响。
motivation: 尽管具身性被提出为影响人类评估计算系统创造力的因素，但缺乏实证研究，需建立系统化研究框架。
method: 通过操控系统的具身性及感知证据作为独立变量，控制创造过程，提供测量创造力评估的标准化方法。
result: 构建了可分离具身性与创造力影响的实验框架，为后续研究提供方法论基础。
conclusion: 该框架有望推动学界以系统化方式研究具身化计算创造力的人类感知机制。
search_text: How Does Embodiment Affect the Human Perception of Computational Creativity? An Experimental Study Framework 体现如何影响人类对计算创造力的感知？实验研究框架 Which factors influence the human assessment of creativity exhibited by a computational system is a core question of computational creativity (CC) research. Recently, the system's embodiment has been put forward as such a factor, but empirical studies of its effect are lacking. To this end, we propose an experimental framework which isolates the effect of embodiment on the perception of creativity from its effect on creativity per se. We not only manipulate the system's embodiment, but also the perceptual evidence as the basis for the human creativity assessment. We motivate the core framework with embodiment and perceptual evidence as independent and the creative process as controlled variable, and we provide recommendations on measuring the assessment of creativity as dependent variable. We hope the framework will inspire others to study the human perception of embodied CC in a principled manner. 哪些因素影响人类对计算系统所表现出的创造力的评估是计算创造力（CC）研究的核心问题。最近，系统的体现被提出作为这样的因素，但缺乏对其效果的实证研究。为此，我们提出了一个实验框架，它将体现对创造力感知的影响与其对创造力本身的影响分开。我们不仅操纵系统的体现，而且还操纵感知证据作为人类创造力评估的基础。我们以体现和感知证据作为独立变量，以创意过程作为受控变量来激发核心框架，并提供衡量创造力评估作为因变量的建议。我们希望该框架能够激励其他人以原则性的方式研究人类对具体 CC 的感知。 本文提出一个实验框架，用于研究具身性对人类感知计算创造力的影响，并分离具身性与创造力本身的影响。 Simo Linkola,Christian Guckelsberger,Tomi Männistö,Anna Kantosalo cs.HC,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Anna Arutyunova,Heiko Röglin
title: The Price of Hierarchical Clustering
title_zh: 层次聚类的代价
abstract: Hierarchical Clustering is a popular tool for understanding the hereditary properties of a data set. Such a clustering is actually a sequence of clusterings that starts with the trivial clustering in which every data point forms its own cluster and then successively merges two existing clusters until all points are in the same cluster. A hierarchical clustering achieves an approximation factor of $α$ if the costs of each $k$-clustering in the hierarchy are at most $α$ times the costs of an optimal $k$-clustering. We study as cost functions the maximum (discrete) radius of any cluster ($k$-center problem) and the maximum diameter of any cluster ($k$-diameter problem). In general, the optimal clusterings do not form a hierarchy and hence an approximation factor of $1$ cannot be achieved. We call the smallest approximation factor that can be achieved for any instance the price of hierarchy. For the $k$-diameter problem we improve the upper bound on the price of hierarchy to $3+2\sqrt{2}\approx 5.83$. Moreover we significantly improve the lower bounds for $k$-center and $k$-diameter, proving a price of hierarchy of exactly $4$ and $3+2\sqrt{2}$, respectively.
summary: Hierarchical Clustering is a popular tool for understanding the hereditary properties of a data set. Such a clustering is actually a sequence of clusterings that starts with the trivial clustering in which every data point forms its own cluster and then successively merges two existing clusters until all points are in the same cluster. A hierarchical clustering achieves an approximation factor of $α$ if the costs of each $k$-clustering in the hierarchy are at most $α$ times the costs of an optimal $k$-clustering. We study as cost functions the maximum (discrete) radius of any cluster ($k$-center problem) and the maximum diameter of any cluster ($k$-diameter problem). In general, the optimal clusterings do not form a hierarchy and hence an approximation factor of $1$ cannot be achieved. We call the smallest approximation factor that can be achieved for any instance the price of hierarchy. For the $k$-diameter problem we improve the upper bound on the price of hierarchy to $3+2\sqrt{2}\approx 5.83$. Moreover we significantly improve the lower bounds for $k$-center and $k$-diameter, proving a price of hierarchy of exactly $4$ and $3+2\sqrt{2}$, respectively.
abstract_zh: 层次聚类是一种用于理解数据集遗传属性的流行工具。这样的聚类实际上是一系列聚类，从平凡聚类开始，其中每个数据点形成自己的聚类，然后连续合并两个现有聚类，直到所有点都在同一聚类中。如果层次结构中每个 $k$ 聚类的成本至多为 $α$ 乘以最优 $k$ 聚类的成本，则层次聚类可实现 $α$ 的近似因子。我们研究任何簇的最大（离散）半径（$k$-中心问题）和任何簇的最大直径（$k$-直径问题）作为成本函数。一般来说，最佳聚类不形成层次结构，因此无法实现 $1$ 的近似因子。我们将任何实例可以实现的最小近似因子称为层次结构的价格。对于 $k$ 直径问题，我们将层次结构价格的上限提高到 $3+2\sqrt{2}\approx 5.83$。此外，我们显着提高了 $k$-center 和 $k$-diameter 的下界，证明层次结构的价格分别为 $4$ 和 $3+2\sqrt{2}$。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了层次聚类在k-center和k-diameter问题中的近似因子，分析了层次结构带来的性能损失（即'层次价格'）。
AI.motivation: 层次聚类无法直接达到最优聚类的近似因子1，需量化其性能下限（层次价格），以指导算法设计与理论分析。
AI.method: 通过数学证明与构造性实例，改进k-diameter问题的上界并严格证明k-center和k-diameter问题的层次价格下界。
AI.result: 将k-diameter的层次价格上界提升至3+2√2（约5.83），并证明k-center和k-diameter的层次价格分别为4和3+2√2。
AI.conclusion: 层次聚类在特定成本函数下的性能损失已取得理论最优界，为相关算法设计提供了理论支撑与改进方向。

authors_text: Chao Bian,Yawen Zhou,Chao Qian
title: Robust Subset Selection by Greedy and Evolutionary Pareto Optimization
title_zh: 通过贪婪和进化帕累托优化进行鲁棒子集选择
abstract: Subset selection, which aims to select a subset from a ground set to maximize some objective function, arises in various applications such as influence maximization and sensor placement. In real-world scenarios, however, one often needs to find a subset which is robust against (i.e., is good over) a number of possible objective functions due to uncertainty, resulting in the problem of robust subset selection. This paper considers robust subset selection with monotone objective functions, relaxing the submodular property required by previous studies. We first show that the greedy algorithm can obtain an approximation ratio of $1-e^{-βγ}$, where $β$ and $γ$ are the correlation and submodularity ratios of the objective functions, respectively; and then propose EPORSS, an evolutionary Pareto optimization algorithm that can utilize more time to find better subsets. We prove that EPORSS can also be theoretically grounded, achieving a similar approximation guarantee to the greedy algorithm. In addition, we derive the lower bound of $β$ for the application of robust influence maximization, and further conduct experiments to validate the performance of the greedy algorithm and EPORSS.
summary: Subset selection, which aims to select a subset from a ground set to maximize some objective function, arises in various applications such as influence maximization and sensor placement. In real-world scenarios, however, one often needs to find a subset which is robust against (i.e., is good over) a number of possible objective functions due to uncertainty, resulting in the problem of robust subset selection. This paper considers robust subset selection with monotone objective functions, relaxing the submodular property required by previous studies. We first show that the greedy algorithm can obtain an approximation ratio of $1-e^{-βγ}$, where $β$ and $γ$ are the correlation and submodularity ratios of the objective functions, respectively; and then propose EPORSS, an evolutionary Pareto optimization algorithm that can utilize more time to find better subsets. We prove that EPORSS can also be theoretically grounded, achieving a similar approximation guarantee to the greedy algorithm. In addition, we derive the lower bound of $β$ for the application of robust influence maximization, and further conduct experiments to validate the performance of the greedy algorithm and EPORSS.
abstract_zh: 子集选择旨在从地面集中选择一个子集以最大化某些目标函数，出现在各种应用中，例如影响最大化和传感器放置。然而，在现实场景中，由于不确定性，人们常常需要找到一个对多个可能的目标函数具有鲁棒性（即优于）的子集，从而导致鲁棒子集选择的问题。本文考虑了具有单调目标函数的鲁棒子集选择，放宽了先前研究所需的子模属性。我们首先证明贪心算法可以获得$1-e^{-βγ}$的近似率，其中$β$和$γ$分别是目标函数的相关性和子模率；然后提出EPORSS，一种进化帕累托优化算法，可以利用更多时间找到更好的子集。我们证明EPORSS也可以在理论上扎根，实现与贪心算法类似的近似保证。此外，我们推导了鲁棒影响最大化应用的$β$下界，并进一步进行实验来验证贪心算法和EPORSS的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在存在不确定性的情况下，如何通过贪心算法和进化帕累托优化算法进行鲁棒子集选择问题。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中目标函数可能存在不确定性，传统子集选择方法依赖子模性假设，但实际应用中需放宽该限制以提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出基于贪心算法的近似比分析（依赖相关性比和子模性比参数），并设计进化帕累托优化算法EPORSS，通过多目标优化提升解的质量。
AI.result: 理论证明两种方法均具有相似近似保证，实验验证了算法在鲁棒影响最大化等任务中的有效性，并推导了β参数的下界。
AI.conclusion: 本文突破子模性限制，为鲁棒子集选择提供了理论支撑与高效算法，证明了非子模场景下贪心与进化算法的可行性。

authors_text: Daniel Bogdoll,Enrico Eisen,Maximilian Nitsche,Christin Scheib,J. Marius Zöllner
title: Multimodal Detection of Unknown Objects on Roads for Autonomous Driving
title_zh: 自动驾驶道路上未知物体的多模态检测
comment: Daniel Bogdoll, Enrico Eisen, Maximilian Nitsche, and Christin Scheib contributed equally. Accepted for publication at SMC 2022
comments: Daniel Bogdoll, Enrico Eisen, Maximilian Nitsche, and Christin Scheib contributed equally. Accepted for publication at SMC 2022
abstract: Tremendous progress in deep learning over the last years has led towards a future with autonomous vehicles on our roads. Nevertheless, the performance of their perception systems is strongly dependent on the quality of the utilized training data. As these usually only cover a fraction of all object classes an autonomous driving system will face, such systems struggle with handling the unexpected. In order to safely operate on public roads, the identification of objects from unknown classes remains a crucial task. In this paper, we propose a novel pipeline to detect unknown objects. Instead of focusing on a single sensor modality, we make use of lidar and camera data by combining state-of-the art detection models in a sequential manner. We evaluate our approach on the Waymo Open Perception Dataset and point out current research gaps in anomaly detection.
summary: Tremendous progress in deep learning over the last years has led towards a future with autonomous vehicles on our roads. Nevertheless, the performance of their perception systems is strongly dependent on the quality of the utilized training data. As these usually only cover a fraction of all object classes an autonomous driving system will face, such systems struggle with handling the unexpected. In order to safely operate on public roads, the identification of objects from unknown classes remains a crucial task. In this paper, we propose a novel pipeline to detect unknown objects. Instead of focusing on a single sensor modality, we make use of lidar and camera data by combining state-of-the art detection models in a sequential manner. We evaluate our approach on the Waymo Open Perception Dataset and point out current research gaps in anomaly detection.
abstract_zh: 过去几年，深度学习取得了巨大进步，为我们的道路带来了自动驾驶汽车的未来。然而，他们的感知系统的性能很大程度上取决于所使用的训练数据的质量。由于这些通常只涵盖自动驾驶系统将面临的所有对象类别的一小部分，因此此类系统难以处理意外情况。为了在公共道路上安全运行，识别未知类别的物体仍然是一项至关重要的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的管道来检测未知物体。我们没有专注于单一传感器模式，而是通过按顺序组合最先进的检测模型来利用激光雷达和相机数据。我们在 Waymo 开放感知数据集上评估我们的方法，并指出当前异常检测方面的研究差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态方法，结合激光雷达和摄像头数据检测道路上的未知物体，以提高自动驾驶系统的安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有自动驾驶感知系统依赖有限的训练数据，难以处理未知物体，可能导致安全隐患，因此需要有效检测未知物体的方法。
AI.method: 融合激光雷达和摄像头数据，通过级联的检测模型进行多模态信息处理，利用先进检测算法分步识别已知与未知物体。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Perception数据集上验证了方法有效性，同时指出现有异常检测研究在鲁棒性和泛化能力方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 多模态融合方法可提升未知物体检测能力，但当前异常检测技术仍需在复杂场景适应性和实时性方面进一步突破。

search_text: Multimodal Detection of Unknown Objects on Roads for Autonomous Driving 自动驾驶道路上未知物体的多模态检测 Tremendous progress in deep learning over the last years has led towards a future with autonomous vehicles on our roads. Nevertheless, the performance of their perception systems is strongly dependent on the quality of the utilized training data. As these usually only cover a fraction of all object classes an autonomous driving system will face, such systems struggle with handling the unexpected. In order to safely operate on public roads, the identification of objects from unknown classes remains a crucial task. In this paper, we propose a novel pipeline to detect unknown objects. Instead of focusing on a single sensor modality, we make use of lidar and camera data by combining state-of-the art detection models in a sequential manner. We evaluate our approach on the Waymo Open Perception Dataset and point out current research gaps in anomaly detection. 过去几年，深度学习取得了巨大进步，为我们的道路带来了自动驾驶汽车的未来。然而，他们的感知系统的性能很大程度上取决于所使用的训练数据的质量。由于这些通常只涵盖自动驾驶系统将面临的所有对象类别的一小部分，因此此类系统难以处理意外情况。为了在公共道路上安全运行，识别未知类别的物体仍然是一项至关重要的任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的管道来检测未知物体。我们没有专注于单一传感器模式，而是通过按顺序组合最先进的检测模型来利用激光雷达和相机数据。我们在 Waymo 开放感知数据集上评估我们的方法，并指出当前异常检测方面的研究差距。 本文提出一种多模态方法，结合激光雷达和摄像头数据检测道路上的未知物体，以提高自动驾驶系统的安全性。 Daniel Bogdoll,Enrico Eisen,Maximilian Nitsche,Christin Scheib,J. Marius Zöllner cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Varun Babbar,Umang Bhatt,Adrian Weller
title: On the Utility of Prediction Sets in Human-AI Teams
title_zh: 论预测集在人类-人工智能团队中的效用
abstract: Research on human-AI teams usually provides experts with a single label, which ignores the uncertainty in a model's recommendation. Conformal prediction (CP) is a well established line of research that focuses on building a theoretically grounded, calibrated prediction set, which may contain multiple labels. We explore how such prediction sets impact expert decision-making in human-AI teams. Our evaluation on human subjects finds that set valued predictions positively impact experts. However, we notice that the predictive sets provided by CP can be very large, which leads to unhelpful AI assistants. To mitigate this, we introduce D-CP, a method to perform CP on some examples and defer to experts. We prove that D-CP can reduce the prediction set size of non-deferred examples. We show how D-CP performs in quantitative and in human subject experiments ($n=120$). Our results suggest that CP prediction sets improve human-AI team performance over showing the top-1 prediction alone, and that experts find D-CP prediction sets are more useful than CP prediction sets.
summary: Research on human-AI teams usually provides experts with a single label, which ignores the uncertainty in a model's recommendation. Conformal prediction (CP) is a well established line of research that focuses on building a theoretically grounded, calibrated prediction set, which may contain multiple labels. We explore how such prediction sets impact expert decision-making in human-AI teams. Our evaluation on human subjects finds that set valued predictions positively impact experts. However, we notice that the predictive sets provided by CP can be very large, which leads to unhelpful AI assistants. To mitigate this, we introduce D-CP, a method to perform CP on some examples and defer to experts. We prove that D-CP can reduce the prediction set size of non-deferred examples. We show how D-CP performs in quantitative and in human subject experiments ($n=120$). Our results suggest that CP prediction sets improve human-AI team performance over showing the top-1 prediction alone, and that experts find D-CP prediction sets are more useful than CP prediction sets.
abstract_zh: 对人类人工智能团队的研究通常为专家提供单一标签，而忽略了模型推荐的不确定性。保形预测 (CP) 是一项完善的研究方向，专注于构建有理论依据的校准预测集，其中可能包含多个标签。我们探索此类预测集如何影响人类人工智能团队中的专家决策。我们对人类受试者的评估发现，设定有价值的预测会对专家产生积极影响。然而，我们注意到 CP 提供的预测集可能非常大，这会导致 AI 助手无用。为了缓解这个问题，我们引入了 D-CP，一种在某些示例上执行 CP 并听取专家意见的方法。我们证明D-CP可以减少非延迟示例的预测集大小。我们展示了 D-CP 在定量和人体实验中的表现 ($n=120$)。我们的结果表明，与单独显示 top-1 预测相比，CP 预测集可以提高人类 AI 团队的表现，并且专家发现 D-CP 预测集比 CP 预测集更有用。

AI.tldr: 本文研究预测集在人机团队中的应用，提出改进方法D-CP以减少预测集大小并提升专家决策效果。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅提供单一标签忽略模型不确定性，而符合预测（CP）生成的预测集可能过大导致实用性下降，需改进以平衡不确定性表达与实用性。
AI.method: 提出D-CP方法，在部分样本上执行CP并委派给专家，证明其可缩小非委派样本的预测集规模，并通过120人实验验证效果。
AI.result: 预测集提升人机团队表现，D-CP预测集较CP更受专家认可，且有效减少预测集大小。
AI.conclusion: 预测集优于单一预测，D-CP通过委派机制优化预测集实用性，增强人机协作效率与专家满意度。

authors_text: Subba Reddy Oota,Jashn Arora,Veeral Agarwal,Mounika Marreddy,Manish Gupta,Bapi Raju Surampudi
title: Neural Language Taskonomy: Which NLP Tasks are the most Predictive of fMRI Brain Activity?
title_zh: 神经语言任务学：哪些 NLP 任务最能预测 fMRI 大脑活动？
abstract: Several popular Transformer based language models have been found to be successful for text-driven brain encoding. However, existing literature leverages only pretrained text Transformer models and has not explored the efficacy of task-specific learned Transformer representations. In this work, we explore transfer learning from representations learned for ten popular natural language processing tasks (two syntactic and eight semantic) for predicting brain responses from two diverse datasets: Pereira (subjects reading sentences from paragraphs) and Narratives (subjects listening to the spoken stories). Encoding models based on task features are used to predict activity in different regions across the whole brain. Features from coreference resolution, NER, and shallow syntax parsing explain greater variance for the reading activity. On the other hand, for the listening activity, tasks such as paraphrase generation, summarization, and natural language inference show better encoding performance. Experiments across all 10 task representations provide the following cognitive insights: (i) language left hemisphere has higher predictive brain activity versus language right hemisphere, (ii) posterior medial cortex, temporo-parieto-occipital junction, dorsal frontal lobe have higher correlation versus early auditory and auditory association cortex, (iii) syntactic and semantic tasks display a good predictive performance across brain regions for reading and listening stimuli resp.
summary: Several popular Transformer based language models have been found to be successful for text-driven brain encoding. However, existing literature leverages only pretrained text Transformer models and has not explored the efficacy of task-specific learned Transformer representations. In this work, we explore transfer learning from representations learned for ten popular natural language processing tasks (two syntactic and eight semantic) for predicting brain responses from two diverse datasets: Pereira (subjects reading sentences from paragraphs) and Narratives (subjects listening to the spoken stories). Encoding models based on task features are used to predict activity in different regions across the whole brain. Features from coreference resolution, NER, and shallow syntax parsing explain greater variance for the reading activity. On the other hand, for the listening activity, tasks such as paraphrase generation, summarization, and natural language inference show better encoding performance. Experiments across all 10 task representations provide the following cognitive insights: (i) language left hemisphere has higher predictive brain activity versus language right hemisphere, (ii) posterior medial cortex, temporo-parieto-occipital junction, dorsal frontal lobe have higher correlation versus early auditory and auditory association cortex, (iii) syntactic and semantic tasks display a good predictive performance across brain regions for reading and listening stimuli resp.
abstract_zh: 人们发现几种流行的基于 Transformer 的语言模型对于文本驱动的大脑编码来说是成功的。然而，现有文献仅利用预训练的文本 Transformer 模型，并没有探索特定于任务的学习 Transformer 表示的功效。在这项工作中，我们探索了从十种流行的自然语言处理任务（两种语法和八种语义）中学习到的表示的迁移学习，以预测来自两个不同数据集的大脑反应：佩雷拉（受试者从段落中阅读句子）和叙述（受试者听口语故事）。基于任务特征的编码模型用于预测整个大脑不同区域的活动。共指解析、NER 和浅层语法分析的特征解释了阅读活动的更大差异。另一方面，对于听力活动，释义生成、摘要和自然语言推理等任务显示出更好的编码性能。所有 10 项任务表征的实验提供了以下认知见解：(i) 语言左半球与语言右半球相比，具有更高的预测性大脑活动；(ii) 后内侧皮层、颞顶枕交界处、背侧额叶与早期听觉和听觉关联皮层相比具有更高的相关性；(iii) 句法和语义任务在阅读和听力刺激方面在整个大脑区域显示出良好的预测性能。

AI.tldr: 该论文探索了不同自然语言处理任务的Transformer表示对fMRI脑活动预测的效果，分析了哪些NLP任务最能预测大脑反应。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要依赖预训练文本模型，未充分评估任务特定表示的效能。本文旨在通过跨任务表示学习揭示语言处理与大脑活动的关系，为神经科学提供认知洞察。
AI.method: 采用迁移学习，基于10个NLP任务（2个句法、8个语义）的表示，结合Pereira（阅读）和Narratives（听故事）两个数据集，使用编码模型预测全脑不同区域的活动。
AI.result: 阅读任务中，共指解析、命名实体识别和浅层句法分析解释更多方差；听故事任务中，释义生成、摘要和自然语言推理表现更优。左半球语言区、后扣带回等区域预测能力显著高于听觉相关皮层。
AI.conclusion: 句法和语义任务分别对阅读和听觉刺激有良好预测性，任务特定表示可提升脑编码效果，揭示了大脑语言处理的半球分工与区域特异性关联。

ai_content_json.method: 采用迁移学习，基于10个NLP任务（2个句法、8个语义）的表示，结合Pereira（阅读）和Narratives（听故事）两个数据集，使用编码模型预测全脑不同区域的活动。
ai_content_json.result: 阅读任务中，共指解析、命名实体识别和浅层句法分析解释更多方差；听故事任务中，释义生成、摘要和自然语言推理表现更优。左半球语言区、后扣带回等区域预测能力显著高于听觉相关皮层。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 句法和语义任务分别对阅读和听觉刺激有良好预测性，任务特定表示可提升脑编码效果，揭示了大脑语言处理的半球分工与区域特异性关联。

search_text: Neural Language Taskonomy: Which NLP Tasks are the most Predictive of fMRI Brain Activity? 神经语言任务学：哪些 NLP 任务最能预测 fMRI 大脑活动？ Several popular Transformer based language models have been found to be successful for text-driven brain encoding. However, existing literature leverages only pretrained text Transformer models and has not explored the efficacy of task-specific learned Transformer representations. In this work, we explore transfer learning from representations learned for ten popular natural language processing tasks (two syntactic and eight semantic) for predicting brain responses from two diverse datasets: Pereira (subjects reading sentences from paragraphs) and Narratives (subjects listening to the spoken stories). Encoding models based on task features are used to predict activity in different regions across the whole brain. Features from coreference resolution, NER, and shallow syntax parsing explain greater variance for the reading activity. On the other hand, for the listening activity, tasks such as paraphrase generation, summarization, and natural language inference show better encoding performance. Experiments across all 10 task representations provide the following cognitive insights: (i) language left hemisphere has higher predictive brain activity versus language right hemisphere, (ii) posterior medial cortex, temporo-parieto-occipital junction, dorsal frontal lobe have higher correlation versus early auditory and auditory association cortex, (iii) syntactic and semantic tasks display a good predictive performance across brain regions for reading and listening stimuli resp. 人们发现几种流行的基于 Transformer 的语言模型对于文本驱动的大脑编码来说是成功的。然而，现有文献仅利用预训练的文本 Transformer 模型，并没有探索特定于任务的学习 Transformer 表示的功效。在这项工作中，我们探索了从十种流行的自然语言处理任务（两种语法和八种语义）中学习到的表示的迁移学习，以预测来自两个不同数据集的大脑反应：佩雷拉（受试者从段落中阅读句子）和叙述（受试者听口语故事）。基于任务特征的编码模型用于预测整个大脑不同区域的活动。共指解析、NER 和浅层语法分析的特征解释了阅读活动的更大差异。另一方面，对于听力活动，释义生成、摘要和自然语言推理等任务显示出更好的编码性能。所有 10 项任务表征的实验提供了以下认知见解：(i) 语言左半球与语言右半球相比，具有更高的预测性大脑活动；(ii) 后内侧皮层、颞顶枕交界处、背侧额叶与早期听觉和听觉关联皮层相比具有更高的相关性；(iii) 句法和语义任务在阅读和听力刺激方面在整个大脑区域显示出良好的预测性能。 该论文探索了不同自然语言处理任务的Transformer表示对fMRI脑活动预测的效果，分析了哪些NLP任务最能预测大脑反应。 Subba Reddy Oota,Jashn Arora,Veeral Agarwal,Mounika Marreddy,Manish Gupta,Bapi Raju Surampudi cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Pulkit Vyas,Chirag Saxena,Anwesh Badapanda,Anurag Goswami
title: Outdoor Monocular Depth Estimation: A Research Review
title_zh: 室外单目深度估计：研究综述
abstract: Depth estimation is an important task, applied in various methods and applications of computer vision. While the traditional methods of estimating depth are based on depth cues and require specific equipment such as stereo cameras and configuring input according to the approach being used, the focus at the current time is on a single source, or monocular, depth estimation. The recent developments in Convolution Neural Networks along with the integration of classical methods in these deep learning approaches have led to a lot of advancements in the depth estimation problem. The problem of outdoor depth estimation, or depth estimation in wild, is a very scarcely researched field of study. In this paper, we give an overview of the available datasets, depth estimation methods, research work, trends, challenges, and opportunities that exist for open research. To our knowledge, no openly available survey work provides a comprehensive collection of outdoor depth estimation techniques and research scope, making our work an essential contribution for people looking to enter this field of study.
summary: Depth estimation is an important task, applied in various methods and applications of computer vision. While the traditional methods of estimating depth are based on depth cues and require specific equipment such as stereo cameras and configuring input according to the approach being used, the focus at the current time is on a single source, or monocular, depth estimation. The recent developments in Convolution Neural Networks along with the integration of classical methods in these deep learning approaches have led to a lot of advancements in the depth estimation problem. The problem of outdoor depth estimation, or depth estimation in wild, is a very scarcely researched field of study. In this paper, we give an overview of the available datasets, depth estimation methods, research work, trends, challenges, and opportunities that exist for open research. To our knowledge, no openly available survey work provides a comprehensive collection of outdoor depth estimation techniques and research scope, making our work an essential contribution for people looking to enter this field of study.
abstract_zh: 深度估计是一项重要的任务，应用于计算机视觉的各种方法和应用中。虽然估计深度的传统方法基于深度线索，并且需要特定设备（例如立体相机）并根据所使用的方法配置输入，但当前的焦点是单源或单目深度估计。卷积神经网络的最新发展以及这些深度学习方法中经典方法的集成导致了深度估计问题的许多进步。室外深度估计或野外深度估计问题是一个很少被研究的领域。在本文中，我们概述了开放研究的可用数据集、深度估计方法、研究工作、趋势、挑战和机遇。据我们所知，还没有公开的调查工作提供全面的户外深度估计技术和研究范围，这使得我们的工作对希望进入这一研究领域的人们做出了重要贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了户外单目深度估计领域的研究现状，包括数据集、方法、趋势及挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统深度估计依赖双目相机等设备，而单目方法在户外复杂场景中研究不足，缺乏系统性综述。
AI.method: 通过收集现有数据集和算法，分类总结技术路线，并分析研究趋势与未解决问题。
AI.result: 整理了户外深度估计的主流方法、公开数据集及研究空白，指出现有技术在动态场景和大尺度环境中的局限性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为首个系统性户外单目深度估计研究综述，为后续算法优化和跨领域应用提供了方向指引。

authors_text: Alex Fang,Gabriel Ilharco,Mitchell Wortsman,Yuhao Wan,Vaishaal Shankar,Achal Dave,Ludwig Schmidt
title: Data Determines Distributional Robustness in Contrastive Language Image Pre-training (CLIP)
title_zh: 数据决定对比语言图像预训练 (CLIP) 中的分布稳健性
abstract: Contrastively trained language-image models such as CLIP, ALIGN, and BASIC have demonstrated unprecedented robustness to multiple challenging natural distribution shifts. Since these language-image models differ from previous training approaches in several ways, an important question is what causes the large robustness gains. We answer this question via a systematic experimental investigation. Concretely, we study five different possible causes for the robustness gains: (i) the training set size, (ii) the training distribution, (iii) language supervision at training time, (iv) language supervision at test time, and (v) the contrastive loss function. Our experiments show that the more diverse training distribution is the main cause for the robustness gains, with the other factors contributing little to no robustness. Beyond our experimental results, we also introduce ImageNet-Captions, a version of ImageNet with original text annotations from Flickr, to enable further controlled experiments of language-image training.
summary: Contrastively trained language-image models such as CLIP, ALIGN, and BASIC have demonstrated unprecedented robustness to multiple challenging natural distribution shifts. Since these language-image models differ from previous training approaches in several ways, an important question is what causes the large robustness gains. We answer this question via a systematic experimental investigation. Concretely, we study five different possible causes for the robustness gains: (i) the training set size, (ii) the training distribution, (iii) language supervision at training time, (iv) language supervision at test time, and (v) the contrastive loss function. Our experiments show that the more diverse training distribution is the main cause for the robustness gains, with the other factors contributing little to no robustness. Beyond our experimental results, we also introduce ImageNet-Captions, a version of ImageNet with original text annotations from Flickr, to enable further controlled experiments of language-image training.
abstract_zh: 对比训练的语言图像模型（例如 CLIP、ALIGN 和 BASIC）对多种具有挑战性的自然分布变化表现出了前所未有的鲁棒性。由于这些语言图像模型在几个方面与以前的训练方法不同，因此一个重要的问题是是什么导致了巨大的鲁棒性增益。我们通过系统的实验研究来回答这个问题。具体来说，我们研究了鲁棒性增益的五个不同可能原因：（i）训练集大小，（ii）训练分布，（iii）训练时的语言监督，（iv）测试时的语言监督，以及（v）对比损失函数。我们的实验表明，更加多样化的训练分布是鲁棒性增益的主要原因，其他因素对鲁棒性的贡献很小甚至没有。除了我们的实验结果之外，我们还引入了 ImageNet-Captions，这是带有来自 Flickr 的原始文本注释的 ImageNet 版本，以实现语言图像训练的进一步受控实验。

AI.tldr: 本文分析对比语言-图像预训练模型（如CLIP）在分布外场景下鲁棒性的来源，通过实验确定关键因素。
AI.motivation: 对比训练语言-图像模型表现出显著分布鲁棒性，但其背后原因尚未明确，需系统探究不同因素的贡献。
AI.method: 设计对照实验，系统分析训练集规模、训练分布、语言监督（训练/测试阶段）及对比损失函数对鲁棒性的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明训练分布多样性是鲁棒性提升的主因，其他因素贡献有限；同时构建ImageNet-Captions数据集支持后续研究。
AI.conclusion: 训练数据分布的多样性是决定分布鲁棒性的核心因素，而其他设计要素影响较小，新数据集为可控实验提供基础。

authors_text: Michael Pantic,Cesar Cadena,Roland Siegwart,Lionel Ott
title: Sampling-free obstacle gradients and reactive planning in Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF)

comment: Accepted to the "Motion Planning with Implicit Neural Representations of Geometry" Workshop at ICRA 2022
comments: Accepted to the "Motion Planning with Implicit Neural Representations of Geometry" Workshop at ICRA 2022
abstract: This work investigates the use of Neural implicit representations, specifically Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF), for geometrical queries and motion planning. We show that by adding the capacity to infer occupancy in a radius to a pre-trained NeRF, we are effectively learning an approximation to a Euclidean Signed Distance Field (ESDF). Using backward differentiation of the augmented network, we obtain an obstacle gradient that is integrated into an obstacle avoidance policy based on the Riemannian Motion Policies (RMP) framework. Thus, our findings allow for very fast sampling-free obstacle avoidance planning in the implicit representation.
summary: This work investigates the use of Neural implicit representations, specifically Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF), for geometrical queries and motion planning. We show that by adding the capacity to infer occupancy in a radius to a pre-trained NeRF, we are effectively learning an approximation to a Euclidean Signed Distance Field (ESDF). Using backward differentiation of the augmented network, we obtain an obstacle gradient that is integrated into an obstacle avoidance policy based on the Riemannian Motion Policies (RMP) framework. Thus, our findings allow for very fast sampling-free obstacle avoidance planning in the implicit representation.
abstract_zh: 这项工作研究了神经隐式表示（特别是神经辐射场 (NeRF)）在几何查询和运动规划中的使用。我们证明，通过将推断半径内占用的能力添加到预先训练的 NeRF 中，我们可以有效地学习欧几里德符号距离场 (ESDF) 的近似值。利用增强网络的后向微分，我们获得了障碍物梯度，该梯度被集成到基于黎曼运动策略（RMP）框架的避障策略中。因此，我们的研究结果允许在隐式表示中进行非常快速的无采样避障规划。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究利用神经辐射场（NeRF）进行几何查询和运动规划，通过学习欧几里得符号距离场（ESDF）近似，实现无需采样的快速避障规划。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖显式网格或采样进行障碍物建模，计算成本高，而NeRF作为隐式表示能更高效地提供几何信息，但如何直接用于避障规划仍需解决。
AI.method: 通过向预训练NeRF添加半径内占用推断能力，学习ESDF近似；利用增强网络的反向微分计算障碍物梯度，并将其整合到RMP框架的避障策略中，实现无需采样的实时规划。
AI.result: 成功实现基于NeRF的快速采样-free避障规划，有效避免障碍物，且无需传统采样方法。
AI.conclusion: 本研究展示了NeRF在隐式几何表示中的潜力，为实时避障规划提供了高效方法，无需显式采样，具有实际应用价值。

We show that by adding the capacity to infer occupancy in a radius to a pre-trained NeRF, we are effectively learning an approximation to a Euclidean Signed Distance Field (ESDF). Using backward differentiation of the augmented network, we obtain an obstacle gradient that is integrated into an obstacle avoidance policy based on the Riemannian Motion Policies (RMP) framework. Thus, our findings allow for very fast sampling-free obstacle avoidance planning in the implicit representation. 这项工作研究了神经隐式表示（特别是神经辐射场 (NeRF)）在几何查询和运动规划中的使用。我们证明，通过将推断半径内占用的能力添加到预先训练的 NeRF 中，我们可以有效地学习欧几里德符号距离场 (ESDF) 的近似值。利用增强网络的后向微分，我们获得了障碍物梯度，该梯度被集成到基于黎曼运动策略（RMP）框架的避障策略中。因此，我们的研究结果允许在隐式表示中进行非常快速的无采样避障规划。 本论文研究利用神经辐射场（NeRF）进行几何查询和运动规划，通过学习欧几里得符号距离场（ESDF）近似，实现无需采样的快速避障规划。 Michael Pantic,Cesar Cadena,Roland Siegwart,Lionel Ott cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Jiaxin Li,Danfeng Hong,Lianru Gao,Jing Yao,Ke Zheng,Bing Zhang,Jocelyn Chanussot
title: Deep Learning in Multimodal Remote Sensing Data Fusion: A Comprehensive Review
title_zh: 多模态遥感数据融合中的深度学习：综合综述
abstract: With the extremely rapid advances in remote sensing (RS) technology, a great quantity of Earth observation (EO) data featuring considerable and complicated heterogeneity is readily available nowadays, which renders researchers an opportunity to tackle current geoscience applications in a fresh way. With the joint utilization of EO data, much research on multimodal RS data fusion has made tremendous progress in recent years, yet these developed traditional algorithms inevitably meet the performance bottleneck due to the lack of the ability to comprehensively analyse and interpret these strongly heterogeneous data. Hence, this non-negligible limitation further arouses an intense demand for an alternative tool with powerful processing competence. Deep learning (DL), as a cutting-edge technology, has witnessed remarkable breakthroughs in numerous computer vision tasks owing to its impressive ability in data representation and reconstruction. Naturally, it has been successfully applied to the field of multimodal RS data fusion, yielding great improvement compared with traditional methods. This survey aims to present a systematic overview in DL-based multimodal RS data fusion. More specifically, some essential knowledge about this topic is first given. Subsequently, a literature survey is conducted to analyse the trends of this field. Some prevalent sub-fields in the multimodal RS data fusion are then reviewed in terms of the to-be-fused data modalities, i.e., spatiospectral, spatiotemporal, light detection and ranging-optical, synthetic aperture radar-optical, and RS-Geospatial Big Data fusion. Furthermore, We collect and summarize some valuable resources for the sake of the development in multimodal RS data fusion. Finally, the remaining challenges and potential future directions are highlighted.
summary: With the extremely rapid advances in remote sensing (RS) technology, a great quantity of Earth observation (EO) data featuring considerable and complicated heterogeneity is readily available nowadays, which renders researchers an opportunity to tackle current geoscience applications in a fresh way. With the joint utilization of EO data, much research on multimodal RS data fusion has made tremendous progress in recent years, yet these developed traditional algorithms inevitably meet the performance bottleneck due to the lack of the ability to comprehensively analyse and interpret these strongly heterogeneous data. Hence, this non-negligible limitation further arouses an intense demand for an alternative tool with powerful processing competence. Deep learning (DL), as a cutting-edge technology, has witnessed remarkable breakthroughs in numerous computer vision tasks owing to its impressive ability in data representation and reconstruction. Naturally, it has been successfully applied to the field of multimodal RS data fusion, yielding great improvement compared with traditional methods. This survey aims to present a systematic overview in DL-based multimodal RS data fusion. More specifically, some essential knowledge about this topic is first given. Subsequently, a literature survey is conducted to analyse the trends of this field. Some prevalent sub-fields in the multimodal RS data fusion are then reviewed in terms of the to-be-fused data modalities, i.e., spatiospectral, spatiotemporal, light detection and ranging-optical, synthetic aperture radar-optical, and RS-Geospatial Big Data fusion. Furthermore, We collect and summarize some valuable resources for the sake of the development in multimodal RS data fusion. Finally, the remaining challenges and potential future directions are highlighted.
abstract_zh: 随着遥感（RS）技术的飞速发展，如今可以获得大量具有相当大且复杂的异质性的地球观测（EO）数据，这为研究人员提供了以新的方式解决当前地球科学应用的机会。近年来，随着对电光数据的联合利用，多模态遥感数据融合的研究取得了巨大进展，但这些发展起来的传统算法由于缺乏对这些强异构数据的综合分析和解释的能力，不可避免地遇到性能瓶颈。因此，这种不可忽视的限制进一步引起了对具有强大处理能力的替代工具的强烈需求。深度学习（DL）作为一项前沿技术，凭借其令人印象深刻的数据表示和重构能力，在众多计算机视觉任务中取得了显着的突破。当然，它已成功应用于多模态遥感数据融合领域，与传统方法相比取得了很大的进步。本次调查旨在对基于深度学习的多模态遥感数据融合进行系统概述。更具体地说，首先给出有关该主题的一些基本知识。随后，进行文献调查来分析该领域的趋势。然后，根据待融合的数据模态，即时空、光探测和测距光学、合成孔径雷达光学和遥感地理空间大数据融合，回顾了多模态遥感数据融合中的一些流行子领域。此外，我们还收集和总结了一些有价值的资源，以促进多模态遥感数据融合的发展。最后，强调了剩余的挑战和潜在的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了基于深度学习的多模态遥感数据融合方法，分析其发展趋势、子领域及未来挑战。
AI.motivation: 传统算法因难以处理遥感数据的异构性而面临性能瓶颈，需借助深度学习的强大数据处理能力解决多模态数据融合问题。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析多模态遥感数据融合趋势，按数据类型（如时谱、时空、光探测-光学等）分类梳理子领域，并总结资源与挑战。
AI.result: 总结了多模态遥感数据融合的主流方向、关键技术及现存问题，为后续研究提供资源与参考。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升了多模态遥感数据融合效果，但数据异质性、算法可解释性及计算效率等仍是未来需突破的方向。

Furthermore, We collect and summarize some valuable resources for the sake of the development in multimodal RS data fusion. authors_text: Zhenguang Liu,Sifan Wu,Chejian Xu,Xiang Wang,Lei Zhu,Shuang Wu,Fuli Feng
title: Copy Motion From One to Another: Fake Motion Video Generation
title_zh: 将运动从一个复制到另一个：假运动视频生成
abstract: One compelling application of artificial intelligence is to generate a video of a target person performing arbitrary desired motion (from a source person). While the state-of-the-art methods are able to synthesize a video demonstrating similar broad stroke motion details, they are generally lacking in texture details. A pertinent manifestation appears as distorted face, feet, and hands, and such flaws are very sensitively perceived by human observers. Furthermore, current methods typically employ GANs with a L2 loss to assess the authenticity of the generated videos, inherently requiring a large amount of training samples to learn the texture details for adequate video generation. In this work, we tackle these challenges from three aspects: 1) We disentangle each video frame into foreground (the person) and background, focusing on generating the foreground to reduce the underlying dimension of the network output. 2) We propose a theoretically motivated Gromov-Wasserstein loss that facilitates learning the mapping from a pose to a foreground image. 3) To enhance texture details, we encode facial features with geometric guidance and employ local GANs to refine the face, feet, and hands. Extensive experiments show that our method is able to generate realistic target person videos, faithfully copying complex motions from a source person.
summary: One compelling application of artificial intelligence is to generate a video of a target person performing arbitrary desired motion (from a source person). While the state-of-the-art methods are able to synthesize a video demonstrating similar broad stroke motion details, they are generally lacking in texture details. A pertinent manifestation appears as distorted face, feet, and hands, and such flaws are very sensitively perceived by human observers. Furthermore, current methods typically employ GANs with a L2 loss to assess the authenticity of the generated videos, inherently requiring a large amount of training samples to learn the texture details for adequate video generation. In this work, we tackle these challenges from three aspects: 1) We disentangle each video frame into foreground (the person) and background, focusing on generating the foreground to reduce the underlying dimension of the network output. 2) We propose a theoretically motivated Gromov-Wasserstein loss that facilitates learning the mapping from a pose to a foreground image. 3) To enhance texture details, we encode facial features with geometric guidance and employ local GANs to refine the face, feet, and hands. Extensive experiments show that our method is able to generate realistic target person videos, faithfully copying complex motions from a source person.
abstract_zh: 人工智能的一项引人注目的应用是生成目标人（来自源人）执行任意所需动作的视频。虽然最先进的方法能够合成展示类似的广泛笔画运动细节的视频，但它们通常缺乏纹理细节。相关的表现形式是扭曲的脸、脚和手，人类观察者可以非常敏感地察觉到这些缺陷。此外，当前的方法通常采用具有 L2 损失的 GAN 来评估生成的视频的真实性，本质上需要大量的训练样本来学习纹理细节，以生成足够的视频。在这项工作中，我们从三个方面应对这些挑战：1）我们将每个视频帧分解为前景（人）和背景，重点是生成前景以减少网络输出的底层维度。 2）我们提出了一种理论上有启发的 Gromov-Wasserstein 损失，它有助于学习从姿势到前景图像的映射。 3）为了增强纹理细节，我们使用几何引导对面部特征进行编码，并使用局部 GAN 来细化面部、脚和手。大量的实验表明，我们的方法能够生成逼真的目标人物视频，忠实地复制源人物的复杂动作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成伪造运动视频的方法，通过将源人物的运动复制到目标人物身上，生成逼真的视频内容。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成视频时缺乏纹理细节，导致面部、手部等部位出现扭曲，且依赖大量训练样本和L2损失函数，难以高效学习纹理细节。
AI.method: 1) 将视频帧分离为前景（人物）和背景以降低输出维度；2) 提出基于格罗莫夫-瓦舍斯特伦损失的映射学习方法；3) 采用几何引导的面部特征编码和局部GAN优化细节区域。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能生成具有真实纹理和复杂运动复制能力的目标人物视频，显著优于现有技术。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦结构、理论损失函数和局部优化策略，本文有效解决了运动复制中的纹理细节问题，实现了高质量的伪造运动视频生成。

search_text: Copy Motion From One to Another: Fake Motion Video Generation 将运动从一个复制到另一个：假运动视频生成 One compelling application of artificial intelligence is to generate a video of a target person performing arbitrary desired motion (from a source person). While the state-of-the-art methods are able to synthesize a video demonstrating similar broad stroke motion details, they are generally lacking in texture details. A pertinent manifestation appears as distorted face, feet, and hands, and such flaws are very sensitively perceived by human observers. Furthermore, current methods typically employ GANs with a L2 loss to assess the authenticity of the generated videos, inherently requiring a large amount of training samples to learn the texture details for adequate video generation. In this work, we tackle these challenges from three aspects: 1) We disentangle each video frame into foreground (the person) and background, focusing on generating the foreground to reduce the underlying dimension of the network output. 2) We propose a theoretically motivated Gromov-Wasserstein loss that facilitates learning the mapping from a pose to a foreground image. 3) To enhance texture details, we encode facial features with geometric guidance and employ local GANs to refine the face, feet, and hands. Extensive experiments show that our method is able to generate realistic target person videos, faithfully copying complex motions from a source person. 人工智能的一项引人注目的应用是生成目标人（来自源人）执行任意所需动作的视频。虽然最先进的方法能够合成展示类似的广泛笔画运动细节的视频，但它们通常缺乏纹理细节。相关的表现形式是扭曲的脸、脚和手，人类观察者可以非常敏感地察觉到这些缺陷。此外，当前的方法通常采用具有 L2 损失的 GAN 来评估生成的视频的真实性，本质上需要大量的训练样本来学习纹理细节，以生成足够的视频。在这项工作中，我们从三个方面应对这些挑战：1）我们将每个视频帧分解为前景（人）和背景，重点是生成前景以减少网络输出的底层维度。 2）我们提出了一种理论上有启发的 Gromov-Wasserstein 损失，它有助于学习从姿势到前景图像的映射。 3）为了增强纹理细节，我们使用几何引导对面部特征进行编码，并使用局部 GAN 来细化面部、脚和手。大量的实验表明，我们的方法能够生成逼真的目标人物视频，忠实地复制源人物的复杂动作。 本文提出一种生成伪造运动视频的方法，通过将源人物的运动复制到目标人物身上，生成逼真的视频内容。 Zhenguang Liu,Sifan Wu,Chejian Xu,Xiang Wang,Lei Zhu,Shuang Wu,Fuli Feng cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Karina Ruzaeva,Katharina Nöh,Benjamin Berkels
title: A hybrid multi-object segmentation framework with model-based B-splines for microbial single cell analysis
title_zh: 用于微生物单细胞分析的具有基于模型的 B 样条的混合多对象分割框架
comment: ef:2022 IEEE 19th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)
comments: ef:2022 IEEE 19th International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)
abstract: In this paper, we propose a hybrid approach for multi-object microbial cell segmentation. The approach combines an ML-based detection with a geometry-aware variational-based segmentation using B-splines that are parametrized based on a geometric model of the cell shape. The detection is done first using YOLOv5. In a second step, each detected cell is segmented individually. Thus, the segmentation only needs to be done on a per-cell basis, which makes it amenable to a variational approach that incorporates prior knowledge on the geometry. Here, the contour of the segmentation is modelled as closed uniform cubic B-spline, whose control points are parametrized using the known cell geometry. Compared to purely ML-based segmentation approaches, which need accurate segmentation maps as training data that are very laborious to produce, our method just needs bounding boxes as training data. Still, the proposed method performs on par with ML-based segmentation approaches usually used in this context. We study the performance of the proposed method on time-lapse microscopy data of Corynebacterium glutamicum.
summary: In this paper, we propose a hybrid approach for multi-object microbial cell segmentation. The approach combines an ML-based detection with a geometry-aware variational-based segmentation using B-splines that are parametrized based on a geometric model of the cell shape. The detection is done first using YOLOv5. In a second step, each detected cell is segmented individually. Thus, the segmentation only needs to be done on a per-cell basis, which makes it amenable to a variational approach that incorporates prior knowledge on the geometry. Here, the contour of the segmentation is modelled as closed uniform cubic B-spline, whose control points are parametrized using the known cell geometry. Compared to purely ML-based segmentation approaches, which need accurate segmentation maps as training data that are very laborious to produce, our method just needs bounding boxes as training data. Still, the proposed method performs on par with ML-based segmentation approaches usually used in this context. We study the performance of the proposed method on time-lapse microscopy data of Corynebacterium glutamicum.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种用于多目标微生物细胞分割的混合方法。该方法将基于 ML 的检测与使用 B 样条的几何感知变分分割相结合，B 样条基于细胞形状的几何模型进行参数化。首先使用 YOLOv5 完成检测。在第二步中，每个检测到的细胞被单独分割。因此，分割只需要在每个单元的基础上完成，这使得它适合于结合几何先验知识的变分方法。这里，分割的轮廓被建模为闭合均匀三次 B 样条，其控制点使用已知的单元几何形状进行参数化。与纯粹基于机器学习的分割方法相比，需要精确的分割图作为训练数据，而生成起来非常费力，而我们的方法只需要边界框作为训练数据。尽管如此，所提出的方法的性能与通常在这种情况下使用的基于机器学习的分割方法相当。我们研究了所提出的方法在谷氨酸棒杆菌延时显微镜数据上的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合YOLOv5检测与几何模型B样条分割的混合方法，用于微生物单细胞的多目标分割。
AI.motivation: 传统分割方法依赖大量人工标注的精确分割图，而本文方法仅需简单边界框标注，降低数据准备难度且保持性能。
AI.method: 首先用YOLOv5检测细胞，再基于几何模型参数化B样条控制点，通过变分法结合先验几何知识实现单细胞分割。
AI.result: 在Corynebacterium glutamicum时序显微镜数据集上，分割效果与传统ML方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合检测与几何先验，在减少训练数据需求的同时保持分割精度，适用于微生物细胞分析。

authors_text: Xinwei Wang,Zirui Li,Javier Alonso-Mora,Meng Wang
title: Prediction-Based Reachability Analysis for Collision Risk Assessment on Highways
title_zh: 基于预测的高速公路碰撞风险评估可达性分析
abstract: Real-time safety systems are crucial components of intelligent vehicles. This paper introduces a prediction-based collision risk assessment approach on highways. Given a point mass vehicle dynamics system, a stochastic forward reachable set considering two-dimensional motion with vehicle state probability distributions is firstly established. We then develop an acceleration prediction model, which provides multi-modal probabilistic acceleration distributions to propagate vehicle states. The collision probability is calculated by summing up the probabilities of the states where two vehicles spatially overlap. Simulation results show that the prediction model has superior performance in terms of vehicle motion position errors, and the proposed collision detection approach is agile and effective to identify the collision in cut-in crash events.
summary: Real-time safety systems are crucial components of intelligent vehicles. This paper introduces a prediction-based collision risk assessment approach on highways. Given a point mass vehicle dynamics system, a stochastic forward reachable set considering two-dimensional motion with vehicle state probability distributions is firstly established. We then develop an acceleration prediction model, which provides multi-modal probabilistic acceleration distributions to propagate vehicle states. The collision probability is calculated by summing up the probabilities of the states where two vehicles spatially overlap. Simulation results show that the prediction model has superior performance in terms of vehicle motion position errors, and the proposed collision detection approach is agile and effective to identify the collision in cut-in crash events.
abstract_zh: 实时安全系统是智能汽车的重要组成部分。本文介绍了一种基于预测的高速公路碰撞风险评估方法。给定点质量车辆动力学系统，首先建立考虑车辆状态概率分布的二维运动的随机前向可达集。然后，我们开发了一个加速度预测模型，该模型提供多模态概率加速度分布来传播车辆状态。碰撞概率是通过对两辆车空间重叠状态的概率求和来计算的。仿真结果表明，该预测模型在车辆运动位置误差方面具有优越的性能，并且所提出的碰撞检测方法能够灵活有效地识别切入碰撞事件中的碰撞。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于预测的高速公路碰撞风险评估方法，通过建立车辆状态概率分布和加速度预测模型来计算碰撞概率。
AI.motivation: 实时安全系统对智能车辆至关重要，现有方法在动态环境下的碰撞检测存在不足，需更精确的预测模型以提高安全性。
AI.method: 建立考虑二维运动的随机前向可达集，开发多模态加速度预测模型以传播车辆状态，并通过计算车辆状态重叠概率来评估碰撞风险。
AI.result: 仿真结果表明，该模型在车辆运动位置误差和切入碰撞事件的检测敏捷性方面表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的碰撞检测方法在准确性和敏捷性上表现良好，为智能车辆的实时安全系统提供了有效解决方案。

motivation: 实时安全系统对智能车辆至关重要，现有方法在动态环境下的碰撞检测存在不足，需更精确的预测模型以提高安全性。
method: 建立考虑二维运动的随机前向可达集，开发多模态加速度预测模型以传播车辆状态，并通过计算车辆状态重叠概率来评估碰撞风险。
result: 仿真结果表明，该模型在车辆运动位置误差和切入碰撞事件的检测敏捷性方面表现优异。
conclusion: 提出的碰撞检测方法在准确性和敏捷性上表现良好，为智能车辆的实时安全系统提供了有效解决方案。
search_text: Prediction-Based Reachability Analysis for Collision Risk Assessment on Highways 基于预测的高速公路碰撞风险评估可达性分析 Real-time safety systems are crucial components of intelligent vehicles. This paper introduces a prediction-based collision risk assessment approach on highways. Given a point mass vehicle dynamics system, a stochastic forward reachable set considering two-dimensional motion with vehicle state probability distributions is firstly established. We then develop an acceleration prediction model, which provides multi-modal probabilistic acceleration distributions to propagate vehicle states. The collision probability is calculated by summing up the probabilities of the states where two vehicles spatially overlap. Simulation results show that the prediction model has superior performance in terms of vehicle motion position errors, and the proposed collision detection approach is agile and effective to identify the collision in cut-in crash events. 实时安全系统是智能汽车的重要组成部分。本文介绍了一种基于预测的高速公路碰撞风险评估方法。给定点质量车辆动力学系统，首先建立考虑车辆状态概率分布的二维运动的随机前向可达集。然后，我们开发了一个加速度预测模型，该模型提供多模态概率加速度分布来传播车辆状态。碰撞概率是通过对两辆车空间重叠状态的概率求和来计算的。仿真结果表明，该预测模型在车辆运动位置误差方面具有优越的性能，并且所提出的碰撞检测方法能够灵活有效地识别切入碰撞事件中的碰撞。 提出一种基于预测的高速公路碰撞风险评估方法，通过建立车辆状态概率分布和加速度预测模型来计算碰撞概率。 Xinwei Wang,Zirui Li,Javier Alonso-Mora,Meng Wang eess.SY,cs.AI

authors_text: Andoni I. Garmendia,Josu Ceberio,Alexander Mendiburu
title: Neural Combinatorial Optimization: a New Player in the Field
title_zh: 神经组合优化：该领域的新参与者
abstract: Neural Combinatorial Optimization attempts to learn good heuristics for solving a set of problems using Neural Network models and Reinforcement Learning. Recently, its good performance has encouraged many practitioners to develop neural architectures for a wide variety of combinatorial problems. However, the incorporation of such algorithms in the conventional optimization framework has raised many questions related to their performance and the experimental comparison with other methods such as exact algorithms, heuristics and metaheuristics. This paper presents a critical analysis on the incorporation of algorithms based on neural networks into the classical combinatorial optimization framework. Subsequently, a comprehensive study is carried out to analyse the fundamental aspects of such algorithms, including performance, transferability, computational cost and generalization to larger-sized instances. To that end, we select the Linear Ordering Problem as a case of study, an NP-hard problem, and develop a Neural Combinatorial Optimization model to optimize it. Finally, we discuss how the analysed aspects apply to a general learning framework, and suggest new directions for future work in the area of Neural Combinatorial Optimization algorithms.
summary: Neural Combinatorial Optimization attempts to learn good heuristics for solving a set of problems using Neural Network models and Reinforcement Learning. Recently, its good performance has encouraged many practitioners to develop neural architectures for a wide variety of combinatorial problems. However, the incorporation of such algorithms in the conventional optimization framework has raised many questions related to their performance and the experimental comparison with other methods such as exact algorithms, heuristics and metaheuristics. This paper presents a critical analysis on the incorporation of algorithms based on neural networks into the classical combinatorial optimization framework. Subsequently, a comprehensive study is carried out to analyse the fundamental aspects of such algorithms, including performance, transferability, computational cost and generalization to larger-sized instances. To that end, we select the Linear Ordering Problem as a case of study, an NP-hard problem, and develop a Neural Combinatorial Optimization model to optimize it. Finally, we discuss how the analysed aspects apply to a general learning framework, and suggest new directions for future work in the area of Neural Combinatorial Optimization algorithms.
abstract_zh: 神经组合优化尝试学习良好的启发式方法，以使用神经网络模型和强化学习解决一组问题。最近，它的良好性能鼓励许多从业者开发神经架构来解决各种组合问题。然而，将此类算法纳入传统优化框架引发了许多与其性能以及与其他方法（例如精确算法、启发式和元启发式）的实验比较相关的问题。本文对基于神经网络的算法纳入经典组合优化框架进行了批判性分析。随后，进行了全面的研究来分析此类算法的基本方面，包括性能、可转移性、计算成本和对更大尺寸实例的泛化。为此，我们选择线性排序问题作为研究案例，这是一个 NP 难题，并开发了神经组合优化模型来优化它。最后，我们讨论分析的方面如何应用于通用学习框架，并为神经组合优化算法领域的未来工作提出新方向。

AI.tldr: 本文分析神经组合优化算法在传统框架中的整合，并以线性排序问题为案例进行研究。
AI.motivation: 神经组合优化算法虽表现优异，但其在传统优化框架中的性能、可转移性及与其他方法的对比尚不明确。
AI.method: 选取NP难的线性排序问题作为案例，开发神经组合优化模型，并从性能、可转移性、计算成本等维度进行综合分析。
AI.result: 模型在特定问题上展示了可行性，但存在计算成本高、泛化能力受限等问题。
AI.conclusion: 需进一步优化算法框架以提升通用性，并探索与传统方法的结合路径。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Pan,Jiaming Mai,Xinwei Jiang,Dongxue Tang,Jingxiang Li,Tianjia Shao,Kun Zhou,Xiaogang Jin,Dinesh Manocha
title: Predicting Loose-Fitting Garment Deformations Using Bone-Driven Motion Networks
title_zh: 使用骨骼驱动运动网络预测宽松服装变形
abstract: We present a learning algorithm that uses bone-driven motion networks to predict the deformation of loose-fitting garment meshes at interactive rates. Given a garment, we generate a simulation database and extract virtual bones from simulated mesh sequences using skin decomposition. At runtime, we separately compute low- and high-frequency deformations in a sequential manner. The low-frequency deformations are predicted by transferring body motions to virtual bones' motions, and the high-frequency deformations are estimated leveraging the global information of virtual bones' motions and local information extracted from low-frequency meshes. In addition, our method can estimate garment deformations caused by variations of the simulation parameters (e.g., fabric's bending stiffness) using an RBF kernel ensembling trained networks for different sets of simulation parameters. Through extensive comparisons, we show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of prediction accuracy of mesh deformations by about 20% in RMSE and 10% in Hausdorff distance and STED. The code and data are available at https://github.com/non-void/VirtualBones.
summary: We present a learning algorithm that uses bone-driven motion networks to predict the deformation of loose-fitting garment meshes at interactive rates. Given a garment, we generate a simulation database and extract virtual bones from simulated mesh sequences using skin decomposition. At runtime, we separately compute low- and high-frequency deformations in a sequential manner. The low-frequency deformations are predicted by transferring body motions to virtual bones' motions, and the high-frequency deformations are estimated leveraging the global information of virtual bones' motions and local information extracted from low-frequency meshes. In addition, our method can estimate garment deformations caused by variations of the simulation parameters (e.g., fabric's bending stiffness) using an RBF kernel ensembling trained networks for different sets of simulation parameters. Through extensive comparisons, we show that our method outperforms state-of-the-art methods in terms of prediction accuracy of mesh deformations by about 20% in RMSE and 10% in Hausdorff distance and STED. The code and data are available at https://github.com/non-void/VirtualBones.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种学习算法，该算法使用骨骼驱动的运动网络以交互速率预测宽松服装网格的变形。给定一件服装，我们生成一个模拟数据库，并使用皮肤分解从模拟网格序列中提取虚拟骨骼。在运行时，我们以顺序方式分别计算低频和高频变形。通过将身体运动转换为虚拟骨骼的运动来预测低频变形，并利用虚拟骨骼运动的全局信息和从低频网格提取的局部信息来估计高频变形。此外，我们的方法可以使用针对不同模拟参数集的 RBF 核集成训练网络来估计由模拟参数（例如织物的弯曲刚度）变化引起的服装变形。通过广泛的比较，我们表明，我们的方法在网格变形的预测精度方面优于最先进的方法，RMSE 约为 20%，Hausdorff 距离和 STED 约为 10%。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/non-void/VirtualBones 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于骨骼驱动运动网络的学习算法，用于实时预测宽松衣物网格的变形。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在预测衣物变形时存在计算效率低、精度不足的问题，尤其难以处理不同仿真参数（如布料弯曲刚度）带来的变形变化。
AI.method: 通过生成仿真数据库并提取虚拟骨骼，利用皮肤分解技术分离低频（骨骼运动驱动）和高频（局部细节）变形，结合RBF核集成不同参数下的训练网络实现参数自适应预测。
AI.result: 在RMSE指标上比现有方法提升20%，在Hausdorff距离和STED指标上提升10%，且支持实时交互式预测。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过骨骼驱动与参数自适应机制显著提升了衣物变形预测的精度与效率，代码和数据已开源。

authors_text: Ruben Tolosana,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Julian Fierrez
title: BioTouchPass: Handwritten Passwords for Touchscreen Biometrics
title_zh: BioTouchPass：用于触摸屏生物识别的手写密码
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2001.10223
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2001.10223
abstract: This work enhances traditional authentication systems based on Personal Identification Numbers (PIN) and One-Time Passwords (OTP) through the incorporation of biometric information as a second level of user authentication. In our proposed approach, users draw each digit of the password on the touchscreen of the device instead of typing them as usual. A complete analysis of our proposed biometric system is carried out regarding the discriminative power of each handwritten digit and the robustness when increasing the length of the password and the number of enrolment samples. The new e-BioDigit database, which comprises on-line handwritten digits from 0 to 9, has been acquired using the finger as input on a mobile device. This database is used in the experiments reported in this work and it is available together with benchmark results in GitHub. Finally, we discuss specific details for the deployment of our proposed approach on current PIN and OTP systems, achieving results with Equal Error Rates (EERs) ca. 4.0% when the attacker knows the password. These results encourage the deployment of our proposed approach in comparison to traditional PIN and OTP systems where the attack would have 100% success rate under the same impostor scenario.
summary: This work enhances traditional authentication systems based on Personal Identification Numbers (PIN) and One-Time Passwords (OTP) through the incorporation of biometric information as a second level of user authentication. In our proposed approach, users draw each digit of the password on the touchscreen of the device instead of typing them as usual. The new e-BioDigit database, which comprises on-line handwritten digits from 0 to 9, has been acquired using the finger as input on a mobile device. This database is used in the experiments reported in this work and it is available together with benchmark results in GitHub. Finally, we discuss specific details for the deployment of our proposed approach on current PIN and OTP systems, achieving results with Equal Error Rates (EERs) ca. 4.0% when the attacker knows the password. These results encourage the deployment of our proposed approach in comparison to traditional PIN and OTP systems where the attack would have 100% success rate under the same impostor scenario.
abstract_zh: 这项工作通过将生物识别信息纳入第二级用户身份验证，增强了基于个人识别码 (PIN) 和一次性密码 (OTP) 的传统身份验证系统。在我们提出的方法中，用户在设备的触摸屏上绘制密码的每个数字，而不是像往常一样键入它们。对我们提出的生物识别系统进行了完整的分析，包括每个手写数字的辨别能力以及增加密码长度和注册样本数量时的鲁棒性。新的 e-BioDigit 数据库包含从 0 到 9 的在线手写数字，是通过手指在移动设备上输入而获得的。该数据库用于本工作中报告的实验，并且可与 GitHub 中的基准测试结果一起使用。最后，我们讨论在当前 PIN 和 OTP 系统上部署我们提出的方法的具体细节，以达到等错误率 (EER) 约的结果。 4.0% 当攻击者知道密码时。与传统的 PIN 和 OTP 系统相比，这些结果鼓励部署我们提出的方法，在传统的 PIN 和 OTP 系统中，在相同的冒充者场景下，攻击将具有 100% 的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于触摸屏手写密码的生物识别认证方法，用于增强传统的PIN和OTP认证系统。
AI.motivation: 传统的PIN和OTP认证系统在面对已知密码的攻击时存在100%的成功率，因此需要一种更安全的多因素认证方式。
AI.method: 用户在触摸屏上用手写方式输入密码的每个数字，通过分析手写数字的辨别力和系统鲁棒性，并构建了新的e-BioDigit数据库用于实验。
AI.result: 在攻击者知道密码的情况下，系统实现了约4.0%的等错误率（EER），显著优于传统系统的100%攻击成功率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在安全性和鲁棒性方面优于传统PIN和OTP系统，值得在现有系统中部署。

search_text: BioTouchPass: Handwritten Passwords for Touchscreen Biometrics BioTouchPass：用于触摸屏生物识别的手写密码 This work enhances traditional authentication systems based on Personal Identification Numbers (PIN) and One-Time Passwords (OTP) through the incorporation of biometric information as a second level of user authentication. In our proposed approach, users draw each digit of the password on the touchscreen of the device instead of typing them as usual. A complete analysis of our proposed biometric system is carried out regarding the discriminative power of each handwritten digit and the robustness when increasing the length of the password and the number of enrolment samples. The new e-BioDigit database, which comprises on-line handwritten digits from 0 to 9, has been acquired using the finger as input on a mobile device. This database is used in the experiments reported in this work and it is available together with benchmark results in GitHub. Finally, we discuss specific details for the deployment of our proposed approach on current PIN and OTP systems, achieving results with Equal Error Rates (EERs) ca. 4.0% when the attacker knows the password. These results encourage the deployment of our proposed approach in comparison to traditional PIN and OTP systems where the attack would have 100% success rate under the same impostor scenario. 这项工作通过将生物识别信息纳入第二级用户身份验证，增强了基于个人识别码 (PIN) 和一次性密码 (OTP) 的传统身份验证系统。在我们提出的方法中，用户在设备的触摸屏上绘制密码的每个数字，而不是像往常一样键入它们。对我们提出的生物识别系统进行了完整的分析，包括每个手写数字的辨别能力以及增加密码长度和注册样本数量时的鲁棒性。新的 e-BioDigit 数据库包含从 0 到 9 的在线手写数字，是通过手指在移动设备上输入而获得的。该数据库用于本工作中报告的实验，并且可与 GitHub 中的基准测试结果一起使用。最后，我们讨论在当前 PIN 和 OTP 系统上部署我们提出的方法的具体细节，以达到等错误率 (EER) 约的结果。 4.0% 当攻击者知道密码时。与传统的 PIN 和 OTP 系统相比，这些结果鼓励部署我们提出的方法，在传统的 PIN 和 OTP 系统中，在相同的冒充者场景下，攻击将具有 100% 的成功率。 本文提出了一种基于触摸屏手写密码的生物识别认证方法，用于增强传统的PIN和OTP认证系统。 Ruben Tolosana,Ruben Vera-Rodriguez,Julian Fierrez cs.CR,cs.CV,cs.HC

authors_text: Marco Winckler,Philippe Palanque,Jean-Luc Hak,Eric Barboni,Olivier Nicolas,Laurent Goncalves
title: Engineering Annotations: A Generic Framework For Gluing Design Artefacts in Models of Interactive Systems
title_zh: 工程注释：在交互系统模型中粘合设计工件的通用框架
comment: ef:Proceedings of the ACM on Human-Computer Interaction , Association for Computing Machinery (ACM), 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the ACM on Human-Computer Interaction , Association for Computing Machinery (ACM), 2022
abstract: Along the design process of interactive system many intermediate artefacts (such as user interface prototypes, task models describing user work and activities, dialog models specifying system behavior, interaction models describing user interactions {\ldots}) are created, tested, revised and improved until the development team produces a validated version of the full-fledged system. Indeed, to build interactive systems there is a need to use multiple artefacts/models (as they provide a complementary view). However, relevant information for describing the design solution and/or supporting design decisions (such as rational about the design, decisions made, recommendations, etc.) is not explicitly capturable in the models/artefacts, hence the need for annotations. Multi-artefacts approaches usually argue that a given information should only be present in one artefact to avoid duplication and increase maintainability of the artefacts. Nonetheless, annotations created on one artefact are usually relevant to other artefacts/models. So that, there is a need for tools and techniques to coordinate annotations across artefacts/models which is the contribution of the present work. In this paper, we propose a model-based approach that was conceived to handle annotations in a systematic way along the development process of interactive systems. As part of the solution, we propose an annotation model built upon the W3C's Web Annotation Data Model. The feasibility of the approach is demonstrated by means of a tool suite featuring a plugin, which has been deployed and tested over the multi-artefacts. The overall approach is illustrated on the design of an interactive cockpit application performing two design iterations. The contribution brings two main benefits for interactive systems engineering: i) it presents a generic pattern for integrating information in multiple usually heterogenous artefacts throughout the design process of interactive systems; and ii) it highlights the need for tools helping to rationalize and to document the various artefacts and the related decisions made during interactive systems design. CCS CONCEPTS $\bullet$ Human-centered computing $\bullet$ Human computer interaction (HCI)

The contribution brings two main benefits for interactive systems engineering: i) it presents a generic pattern for integrating information in multiple usually heterogenous artefacts throughout the design process of interactive systems; and ii) it highlights the need for tools helping to rationalize and to document the various artefacts and the related decisions made during interactive systems design. CCS CONCEPTS $\bullet$ Human-centered computing $\bullet$ Human computer interaction (HCI)
abstract_zh: 在交互系统的设计过程中，会创建、测试、修改和改进许多中间制品（例如用户界面原型、描述用户工作和活动的任务模型、指定系统行为的对话模型、描述用户交互的交互模型{\ldots}），直到开发团队生成成熟系统的经过验证的版本。事实上，要构建交互式系统，需要使用多个人工制品/模型（因为它们提供了互补的视图）。然而，用于描述设计解决方案和/或支持设计决策的相关信息（例如设计的合理性、做出的决策、建议等）在模型/制品中无法明确捕获，因此需要注释。多工件方法通常认为给定的信息应该只存在于一个工件中，以避免重复并提高工件的可维护性。尽管如此，在一件人工制品上创建的注释通常与其他人工制品/模型相关。因此，需要工具和技术来协调跨人工制品/模型的注释，这是当前工作的贡献。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于模型的方法，旨在在交互式系统的开发过程中以系统的方式处理注释。作为解决方案的一部分，我们提出了一个基于 W3C 的 Web 注释数据模型构建的注释模型。该方法的可行性通过具有插件的工具套件得到了证明，该插件已在多工件上进行了部署和测试。整个方法通过执行两次设计迭代的交互式驾驶舱应用程序的设计进行了说明。这一贡献为交互式系统工程带来了两个主要好处：i）它提供了一种通用模式，用于在整个交互式系统的设计过程中将信息集成到多个通常异构的制品中； ii) 它强调了对有助于合理化和记录交互式系统设计过程中做出的各种制品和相关决策的工具的需求。 CCS 概念 $\bullet$ 以人为本的计算 $\bullet$ 人机交互 (HCI)

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于W3C网络注释数据模型的框架，用于在交互系统设计过程中系统化管理跨多个设计工件的注释。
AI.motivation: 交互系统设计过程中产生的多个异构工件（如原型、任务模型等）缺乏对设计决策和理据的显式记录，且现有方法难以协调跨工件的注释，导致信息重复和维护困难。
AI.method: 基于W3C注释模型构建注释框架，开发包含插件的工具套件，并通过交互式驾驶舱应用的两次设计迭代验证可行性。
AI.result: 实现了跨异构工件的注释集成，提供了通用整合模式，并突显了设计文档化工具的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为交互系统工程提供了系统化注释管理方案，提升了设计工件间信息整合与决策文档化的效率。

authors_text: Renaud Fabre,Otmane Azeroual,Patrice Bellot,Joachim Schöpfel,Daniel Egret
title: GRAPHYP: A Scientific Knowledge Graph with Manifold Subnetworks of Communities. Detection of Scholarly Disputes in Adversarial Information Routes
title_zh: GRAPHYP：具有多种社区子网络的科学知识图。对抗性信息路径中学术争议的检测
abstract: The cognitive manifold of published content is currently expanding in all areas of science. However, Scientific Knowledge Graphs (SKGs) only provide poor pictures of the adversarial directions and scientific controversies that feed the production of knowledge. In this Article, we tackle the understanding of the design of the information space of a cognitive representation of research activities, and of related bottlenecks that affect search interfaces, in the mapping of structured objects into graphs. We propose, with SKG GRAPHYP, a novel graph designed geometric architecture which optimizes both the detection of the knowledge manifold of "cognitive communities", and the representation of alternative paths to adversarial answers to a research question, for instance in the context of academic disputes. With a methodology for designing "Manifold Subnetworks of Cognitive Communities", GRAPHYP provides a classification of distinct search paths in a research field. Users are detected from the variety of their search practices and classified in "Cognitive communities" from the analysis of the search history of their logs of scientific documentation. The manifold of practices is expressed from metrics of differentiated uses by triplets of nodes shaped into symmetrical graph subnetworks, with the following three parameters: Mass, Intensity, and Variety.

Users are detected from the variety of their search practices and classified in "Cognitive communities" from the analysis of the search history of their logs of scientific documentation. The manifold of practices is expressed from metrics of differentiated uses by triplets of nodes shaped into symmetrical graph subnetworks, with the following three parameters: Mass, Intensity, and Variety.
abstract_zh: 目前，已发表内容的认知多样性正在所有科学领域中扩展。然而，科学知识图（SKG）仅提供了对知识生产的对抗性方向和科学争议的糟糕描述。在本文中，我们将解决对研究活动认知表示的信息空间设计的理解，以及在将结构化对象映射到图形时影响搜索界面的相关瓶颈。我们通过 SKG GRAPHYP 提出了一种新颖的图设计几何架构，它可以优化“认知社区”知识流形的检测，以及研究问题的对抗性答案的替代路径的表示，例如在学术争议的背景下。通过设计“认知社区的流形子网络”的方法，GRAPHYP 提供了研究领域中不同搜索路径的分类。通过各种搜索实践检测用户，并通过分析其科学文献日志的搜索历史将其分类到“认知社区”中。实践的多样性是通过形成对称图子网络的三元组节点的不同用途的度量来表达的，具有以下三个参数：质量、强度和多样性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GRAPHYP科学知识图谱，通过构建认知社区的流形子网络，优化检测科学争议与对抗性信息路径的表示。
AI.motivation: 现有科学知识图谱（SKGs）难以有效表征科学争议和对抗性信息路径，限制了对知识生成过程中争议方向的分析。
AI.method: 设计基于几何架构的GRAPHYP图谱，通过分析用户搜索日志中的实践差异，利用质量、强度和多样性三个参数构建对称子网络，分类认知社区及争议路径。
AI.result: 成功实现对研究领域中对抗性答案路径的分类与检测，通过流形子网络揭示学术争议的动态结构。
AI.conclusion: GRAPHYP通过认知社区的流形子网络设计，为科学知识图谱提供了更精细的对抗性信息路径分析工具，提升了对学术争议的表征能力。
