search_text: GRAPHYP: A Scientific Knowledge Graph with Manifold Subnetworks of Communities. Detection of Scholarly Disputes in Adversarial Information Routes GRAPHYP：具有多种社区子网络的科学知识图。对抗性信息路径中学术争议的检测 The cognitive manifold of published content is currently expanding in all areas of science. However, Scientific Knowledge Graphs (SKGs) only provide poor pictures of the adversarial directions and scientific controversies that feed the production of knowledge. In this Article, we tackle the understanding of the design of the information space of a cognitive representation of research activities, and of related bottlenecks that affect search interfaces, in the mapping of structured objects into graphs. We propose, with SKG GRAPHYP, a novel graph designed geometric architecture which optimizes both the detection of the knowledge manifold of "cognitive communities", and the representation of alternative paths to adversarial answers to a research question, for instance in the context of academic disputes. With a methodology for designing "Manifold Subnetworks of Cognitive Communities", GRAPHYP provides a classification of distinct search paths in a research field. Users are detected from the variety of their search practices and classified in "Cognitive communities" from the analysis of the search history of their logs of scientific documentation. The manifold of practices is expressed from metrics of differentiated uses by triplets of nodes shaped into symmetrical graph subnetworks, with the following three parameters: Mass, Intensity, and Variety. 目前，已发表内容的认知多样性正在所有科学领域中扩展。然而，科学知识图（SKG）仅提供了对知识生产的对抗性方向和科学争议的糟糕描述。在本文中，我们将解决对研究活动认知表示的信息空间设计的理解，以及在将结构化对象映射到图形时影响搜索界面的相关瓶颈。我们通过 SKG GRAPHYP 提出了一种新颖的图设计几何架构，它可以优化“认知社区”知识流形的检测，以及研究问题的对抗性答案的替代路径的表示，例如在学术争议的背景下。通过设计“认知社区的流形子网络”的方法，GRAPHYP 提供了研究领域中不同搜索路径的分类。通过各种搜索实践检测用户，并通过分析其科学文献日志的搜索历史将其分类到“认知社区”中。实践的多样性是通过形成对称图子网络的三元组节点的不同用途的度量来表达的，具有以下三个参数：质量、强度和多样性。 本文提出GRAPHYP科学知识图谱，通过构建认知社区的流形子网络，优化检测科学争议与对抗性信息路径的表示。 Renaud Fabre,Otmane Azeroual,Patrice Bellot,Joachim Schöpfel,Daniel Egret cs.AI

authors_text: Alon Berliner,Guy Rotman,Yossi Adi,Roi Reichart,Tamir Hazan
title: Learning Discrete Structured Variational Auto-Encoder using Natural Evolution Strategies
title_zh: 使用自然进化策略学习离散结构化变分自动编码器
comment: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2022
comments: Published as a conference paper at ICLR 2022
abstract: Discrete variational auto-encoders (VAEs) are able to represent semantic latent spaces in generative learning. In many real-life settings, the discrete latent space consists of high-dimensional structures, and propagating gradients through the relevant structures often requires enumerating over an exponentially large latent space. Recently, various approaches were devised to propagate approximated gradients without enumerating over the space of possible structures. In this work, we use Natural Evolution Strategies (NES), a class of gradient-free black-box optimization algorithms, to learn discrete structured VAEs. The NES algorithms are computationally appealing as they estimate gradients with forward pass evaluations only, thus they do not require to propagate gradients through their discrete structures. We demonstrate empirically that optimizing discrete structured VAEs using NES is as effective as gradient-based approximations. Lastly, we prove NES converges for non-Lipschitz functions as appear in discrete structured VAEs.
summary: Discrete variational auto-encoders (VAEs) are able to represent semantic latent spaces in generative learning. In many real-life settings, the discrete latent space consists of high-dimensional structures, and propagating gradients through the relevant structures often requires enumerating over an exponentially large latent space. Recently, various approaches were devised to propagate approximated gradients without enumerating over the space of possible structures. In this work, we use Natural Evolution Strategies (NES), a class of gradient-free black-box optimization algorithms, to learn discrete structured VAEs. The NES algorithms are computationally appealing as they estimate gradients with forward pass evaluations only, thus they do not require to propagate gradients through their discrete structures. We demonstrate empirically that optimizing discrete structured VAEs using NES is as effective as gradient-based approximations. Lastly, we prove NES converges for non-Lipschitz functions as appear in discrete structured VAEs.
abstract_zh: 离散变分自动编码器（VAE）能够表示生成学习中的语义潜在空间。在许多现实生活中，离散潜在空间由高维结构组成，通过相关结构传播梯度通常需要枚举指数级大的潜在空间。最近，设计了各种方法来传播近似梯度，而无需枚举可能结构的空间。在这项工作中，我们使用自然进化策略（NES）（一类无梯度黑盒优化算法）来学习离散结构化 VAE。 NES 算法在计算上很有吸引力，因为它们仅通过前向传递评估来估计梯度，因此它们不需要通过其离散结构传播梯度。我们凭经验证明，使用 NES 优化离散结构化 VAE 与基于梯度的近似一样有效。最后，我们证明 NES 对于离散结构化 VAE 中出现的非 Lipschitz 函数是收敛的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用自然进化策略（NES）优化离散结构化变分自编码器（VAE），以解决传统梯度传播在高维离散空间中的计算难题。
AI.motivation: 离散结构化VAE的梯度传播需枚举指数级潜在空间，计算成本高且难以处理非利普希茨函数，现有近似方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 采用无梯度优化算法NES，仅通过前向传播估计梯度，避免反向传播通过离散结构，实现高效参数更新。
AI.result: 实验验证NES优化离散结构化VAE的效果与梯度近似方法相当，并理论上证明NES在非利普希茨函数中的收敛性。
AI.conclusion: NES为离散结构化VAE提供了有效且理论可靠的优化方案，克服了传统梯度传播的计算瓶颈。

search_text: Learning Discrete Structured Variational Auto-Encoder using Natural Evolution Strategies 使用自然进化策略学习离散结构化变分自动编码器 Discrete variational auto-encoders (VAEs) are able to represent semantic latent spaces in generative learning. In many real-life settings, the discrete latent space consists of high-dimensional structures, and propagating gradients through the relevant structures often requires enumerating over an exponentially large latent space. Recently, various approaches were devised to propagate approximated gradients without enumerating over the space of possible structures. In this work, we use Natural Evolution Strategies (NES), a class of gradient-free black-box optimization algorithms, to learn discrete structured VAEs. The NES algorithms are computationally appealing as they estimate gradients with forward pass evaluations only, thus they do not require to propagate gradients through their discrete structures. We demonstrate empirically that optimizing discrete structured VAEs using NES is as effective as gradient-based approximations. Lastly, we prove NES converges for non-Lipschitz functions as appear in discrete structured VAEs. 离散变分自动编码器（VAE）能够表示生成学习中的语义潜在空间。在许多现实生活中，离散潜在空间由高维结构组成，通过相关结构传播梯度通常需要枚举指数级大的潜在空间。最近，设计了各种方法来传播近似梯度，而无需枚举可能结构的空间。在这项工作中，我们使用自然进化策略（NES）（一类无梯度黑盒优化算法）来学习离散结构化 VAE。 NES 算法在计算上很有吸引力，因为它们仅通过前向传递评估来估计梯度，因此它们不需要通过其离散结构传播梯度。我们凭经验证明，使用 NES 优化离散结构化 VAE 与基于梯度的近似一样有效。最后，我们证明 NES 对于离散结构化 VAE 中出现的非 Lipschitz 函数是收敛的。 本文提出使用自然进化策略（NES）优化离散结构化变分自编码器（VAE），以解决传统梯度传播在高维离散空间中的计算难题。 Alon Berliner,Guy Rotman,Yossi Adi,Roi Reichart,Tamir Hazan cs.LG,cs.NE,stat.ML

authors_text: Xin Lin,Changxing Ding,Yibing Zhan,Zijian Li,Dacheng Tao
title: HL-Net: Heterophily Learning Network for Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: HL-Net：用于场景图生成的异质学习网络
abstract: Scene graph generation (SGG) aims to detect objects and predict their pairwise relationships within an image. Current SGG methods typically utilize graph neural networks (GNNs) to acquire context information between objects/relationships. Despite their effectiveness, however, current SGG methods only assume scene graph homophily while ignoring heterophily. Accordingly, in this paper, we propose a novel Heterophily Learning Network (HL-Net) to comprehensively explore the homophily and heterophily between objects/relationships in scene graphs. More specifically, HL-Net comprises the following 1) an adaptive reweighting transformer module, which adaptively integrates the information from different layers to exploit both the heterophily and homophily in objects; 2) a relationship feature propagation module that efficiently explores the connections between relationships by considering heterophily in order to refine the relationship representation; 3) a heterophily-aware message-passing scheme to further distinguish the heterophily and homophily between objects/relationships, thereby facilitating improved message passing in graphs. We conducted extensive experiments on two public datasets: Visual Genome (VG) and Open Images (OI). The experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed HL-Net over existing state-of-the-art approaches. In more detail, HL-Net outperforms the second-best competitors by 2.1$\%$ on the VG dataset for scene graph classification and 1.2$\%$ on the IO dataset for the final score. Code is available at https://github.com/siml3/HL-Net.
summary: Scene graph generation (SGG) aims to detect objects and predict their pairwise relationships within an image. Current SGG methods typically utilize graph neural networks (GNNs) to acquire context information between objects/relationships. Despite their effectiveness, however, current SGG methods only assume scene graph homophily while ignoring heterophily. Accordingly, in this paper, we propose a novel Heterophily Learning Network (HL-Net) to comprehensively explore the homophily and heterophily between objects/relationships in scene graphs. More specifically, HL-Net comprises the following 1) an adaptive reweighting transformer module, which adaptively integrates the information from different layers to exploit both the heterophily and homophily in objects; 2) a relationship feature propagation module that efficiently explores the connections between relationships by considering heterophily in order to refine the relationship representation; 3) a heterophily-aware message-passing scheme to further distinguish the heterophily and homophily between objects/relationships, thereby facilitating improved message passing in graphs. We conducted extensive experiments on two public datasets: Visual Genome (VG) and Open Images (OI). The experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed HL-Net over existing state-of-the-art approaches. In more detail, HL-Net outperforms the second-best competitors by 2.1$\%$ on the VG dataset for scene graph classification and 1.2$\%$ on the IO dataset for the final score. Code is available at https://github.com/siml3/HL-Net.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成（SGG）旨在检测图像中的对象并预测它们的成对关系。当前的 SGG 方法通常利用图神经网络 (GNN) 来获取对象/关系之间的上下文信息。然而，尽管它们很有效，但当前的 SGG 方法仅假设场景图同质性，而忽略了异质性。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的异质学习网络（HL-Net）来全面探索场景图中对象/关系之间的同质性和异质性。更具体地说，HL-Net包括以下部分：1）自适应重加权变换器模块，自适应地集成来自不同层的信息以利用对象中的异质性和同质性； 2）关系特征传播模块，通过考虑异性来有效地探索关系之间的联系，以细化关系表示； 3）异质感知消息传递方案，进一步区分对象/关系之间的异质和同质，从而促进改进图中的消息传递。我们对两个公共数据集进行了广泛的实验：视觉基因组（VG）和开放图像（OI）。实验结果证明了我们提出的 HL-Net 相对于现有最先进方法的优越性。更详细地说，HL-Net 在场景图分类的 VG 数据集上比第二好的竞争对手高出 2.1$\%$，在 IO 数据集上的最终得分高出 1.2$\%$。代码可在 https://github.com/siml3/HL-Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HL-Net，一种用于场景图生成的异质性学习网络，旨在通过同时考虑同质性和异质性来提升场景图生成的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图生成方法仅假设场景图的同质性，忽略了异质性，导致无法全面捕捉对象和关系间的复杂交互。
AI.method: HL-Net包含三个模块：自适应重加权Transformer模块、关系特征传播模块和异质性感知消息传递方案，以整合多层信息、优化关系表示并区分异质性与同质性。
AI.result: 在Visual Genome和Open Images数据集上，HL-Net分别比第二名方法在场景图分类和最终得分上提升2.1%和1.2%。
AI.conclusion: HL-Net通过综合建模同质性与异质性，有效提升了场景图生成的准确性，验证了异质性学习在该任务中的重要性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出HL-Net，一种用于场景图生成的异质性学习网络，旨在通过同时考虑同质性和异质性来提升场景图生成的性能。

search_text: HL-Net: Heterophily Learning Network for Scene Graph Generation HL-Net：用于场景图生成的异质学习网络 Scene graph generation (SGG) aims to detect objects and predict their pairwise relationships within an image. Current SGG methods typically utilize graph neural networks (GNNs) to acquire context information between objects/relationships. Despite their effectiveness, however, current SGG methods only assume scene graph homophily while ignoring heterophily. Accordingly, in this paper, we propose a novel Heterophily Learning Network (HL-Net) to comprehensively explore the homophily and heterophily between objects/relationships in scene graphs. More specifically, HL-Net comprises the following 1) an adaptive reweighting transformer module, which adaptively integrates the information from different layers to exploit both the heterophily and homophily in objects; 2) a relationship feature propagation module that efficiently explores the connections between relationships by considering heterophily in order to refine the relationship representation; 3) a heterophily-aware message-passing scheme to further distinguish the heterophily and homophily between objects/relationships, thereby facilitating improved message passing in graphs. We conducted extensive experiments on two public datasets: Visual Genome (VG) and Open Images (OI). The experimental results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed HL-Net over existing state-of-the-art approaches. In more detail, HL-Net outperforms the second-best competitors by 2.1$\%$ on the VG dataset for scene graph classification and 1.2$\%$ on the IO dataset for the final score. Code is available at https://github.com/siml3/HL-Net. 场景图生成（SGG）旨在检测图像中的对象并预测它们的成对关系。当前的 SGG 方法通常利用图神经网络 (GNN) 来获取对象/关系之间的上下文信息。然而，尽管它们很有效，但当前的 SGG 方法仅假设场景图同质性，而忽略了异质性。因此，在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的异质学习网络（HL-Net）来全面探索场景图中对象/关系之间的同质性和异质性。更具体地说，HL-Net包括以下部分：1）自适应重加权变换器模块，自适应地集成来自不同层的信息以利用对象中的异质性和同质性； 2）关系特征传播模块，通过考虑异性来有效地探索关系之间的联系，以细化关系表示； 3）异质感知消息传递方案，进一步区分对象/关系之间的异质和同质，从而促进改进图中的消息传递。我们对两个公共数据集进行了广泛的实验：视觉基因组（VG）和开放图像（OI）。实验结果证明了我们提出的 HL-Net 相对于现有最先进方法的优越性。更详细地说，HL-Net 在场景图分类的 VG 数据集上比第二好的竞争对手高出 2.1$\%$，在 IO 数据集上的最终得分高出 1.2$\%$。代码可在 https://github.com/siml3/HL-Net 获取。 本文提出HL-Net，一种用于场景图生成的异质性学习网络，旨在通过同时考虑同质性和异质性来提升场景图生成的性能。 Xin Lin,Changxing Ding,Yibing Zhan,Zijian Li,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Lele Luan,Yang Liu,Hao Sun
title: Distilling Governing Laws and Source Input for Dynamical Systems from Videos
title_zh: 从视频中提取动力系统的控制定律和源输入
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, IJCAI-2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.04776
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, IJCAI-2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.04776
abstract: Distilling interpretable physical laws from videos has led to expanded interest in the computer vision community recently thanks to the advances in deep learning, but still remains a great challenge. This paper introduces an end-to-end unsupervised deep learning framework to uncover the explicit governing equations of dynamics presented by moving object(s), based on recorded videos. Instead in the pixel (spatial) coordinate system of image space, the physical law is modeled in a regressed underlying physical coordinate system where the physical states follow potential explicit governing equations. A numerical integrator-based sparse regression module is designed and serves as a physical constraint to the autoencoder and coordinate system regression, and, in the meanwhile, uncover the parsimonious closed-form governing equations from the learned physical states. Experiments on simulated dynamical scenes show that the proposed method is able to distill closed-form governing equations and simultaneously identify unknown excitation input for several dynamical systems recorded by videos, which fills in the gap in literature where no existing methods are available and applicable for solving this type of problem.
summary: Distilling interpretable physical laws from videos has led to expanded interest in the computer vision community recently thanks to the advances in deep learning, but still remains a great challenge. This paper introduces an end-to-end unsupervised deep learning framework to uncover the explicit governing equations of dynamics presented by moving object(s), based on recorded videos. Instead in the pixel (spatial) coordinate system of image space, the physical law is modeled in a regressed underlying physical coordinate system where the physical states follow potential explicit governing equations. A numerical integrator-based sparse regression module is designed and serves as a physical constraint to the autoencoder and coordinate system regression, and, in the meanwhile, uncover the parsimonious closed-form governing equations from the learned physical states. Experiments on simulated dynamical scenes show that the proposed method is able to distill closed-form governing equations and simultaneously identify unknown excitation input for several dynamical systems recorded by videos, which fills in the gap in literature where no existing methods are available and applicable for solving this type of problem.
abstract_zh: 由于深度学习的进步，从视频中提取可解释的物理定律最近引起了计算机视觉界的兴趣扩大，但仍然是一个巨大的挑战。本文介绍了一种端到端的无监督深度学习框架，用于根据录制的视频揭示运动物体所呈现的显式动力学控制方程。相反，在图像空间的像素（空间）坐标系中，物理定律是在回归的基础物理坐标系中建模的，其中物理状态遵循潜在的显式控制方程。设计了基于数值积分器的稀疏回归模块，作为自动编码器和坐标系回归的物理约束，同时从学习的物理状态中揭示简约的封闭式控制方程。模拟动态场景实验表明，该方法能够提取闭式控制方程，同时识别视频记录的多个动态系统的未知激励输入，填补了文献中没有可用且适用于解决此类问题的空白。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从视频中提取动态系统控制规律和源输入的端到端无监督深度学习框架。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习推动了从视频中提取物理定律的研究，但现有方法难以同时识别动态系统的显式控制方程和未知激励输入。
AI.method: 构建基于数值积分器的稀疏回归模块，通过回归物理坐标系建模动态规律，并约束自动编码器学习物理状态与方程。
AI.result: 实验验证方法能从视频中提取闭式控制方程并识别未知激励输入，填补了该领域方法空白。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了动态系统建模与激励识别难题，为物理规律从视频中学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yiren Jian,Chongyang Gao,Soroush Vosoughi
title: Contrastive Learning for Prompt-Based Few-Shot Language Learners
title_zh: 基于提示的少样本语言学习者的对比学习
abstract: The impressive performance of GPT-3 using natural language prompts and in-context learning has inspired work on better fine-tuning of moderately-sized models under this paradigm. Following this line of work, we present a contrastive learning framework that clusters inputs from the same class for better generality of models trained with only limited examples. Specifically, we propose a supervised contrastive framework that clusters inputs from the same class under different augmented "views" and repel the ones from different classes. We create different "views" of an example by appending it with different language prompts and contextual demonstrations. Combining a contrastive loss with the standard masked language modeling (MLM) loss in prompt-based few-shot learners, the experimental results show that our method can improve over the state-of-the-art methods in a diverse set of 15 language tasks. Our framework makes minimal assumptions on the task or the base model, and can be applied to many recent methods with little modification. The code will be made available at: https://github.com/yiren-jian/LM-SupCon.
summary: The impressive performance of GPT-3 using natural language prompts and in-context learning has inspired work on better fine-tuning of moderately-sized models under this paradigm. Following this line of work, we present a contrastive learning framework that clusters inputs from the same class for better generality of models trained with only limited examples. Specifically, we propose a supervised contrastive framework that clusters inputs from the same class under different augmented "views" and repel the ones from different classes. We create different "views" of an example by appending it with different language prompts and contextual demonstrations. Combining a contrastive loss with the standard masked language modeling (MLM) loss in prompt-based few-shot learners, the experimental results show that our method can improve over the state-of-the-art methods in a diverse set of 15 language tasks. Our framework makes minimal assumptions on the task or the base model, and can be applied to many recent methods with little modification. The code will be made available at: https://github.com/yiren-jian/LM-SupCon.
abstract_zh: GPT-3 使用自然语言提示和上下文学习的令人印象深刻的性能激发了在这种范式下更好地微调中等大小模型的工作。按照这一工作思路，我们提出了一个对比学习框架，该框架对来自同一类别的输入进行聚类，以便仅使用有限的示例训练模型具有更好的通用性。具体来说，我们提出了一个有监督的对比框架，该框架将来自同一类别的输入聚集在不同的增强“视图”下，并排斥来自不同类别的输入。我们通过附加不同的语言提示和上下文演示来创建示例的不同“视图”。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以在 15 种不同的语言任务中比最先进的方法有所改进。我们的框架对任务或基本模型做出了最少的假设，并且只需很少的修改就可以应用于许多最新的方法。代码将在以下网址提供：https://github.com/yiren-jian/LM-SupCon。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对比学习的框架，通过聚类同类输入增强基于提示的少样本语言学习模型的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 受GPT-3提示学习启发，针对少样本场景下模型泛化能力不足的问题，提出利用对比学习提升模型对同类样本的聚集性和跨类样本的区分性。
AI.method: 设计监督对比框架，通过添加不同语言提示和上下文示例生成样本的多视角表示，结合对比损失与掩码语言建模损失进行联合优化。
AI.result: 在15种语言任务中超越现有最优方法，框架对任务类型和基础模型具有强适应性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 对比学习有效提升少样本语言学习性能，其通用框架可广泛适配不同任务和模型架构。

GPT-3 使用自然语言提示和上下文学习的令人印象深刻的性能激发了在这种范式下更好地微调中等大小模型的工作。按照这一工作思路，我们提出了一个对比学习框架，该框架对来自同一类别的输入进行聚类，以便仅使用有限的示例训练模型具有更好的通用性。具体来说，我们提出了一个有监督的对比框架，该框架将来自同一类别的输入聚集在不同的增强“视图”下，并排斥来自不同类别的输入。我们通过附加不同的语言提示和上下文演示来创建示例的不同“视图”。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以在 15 种不同的语言任务中比最先进的方法有所改进。我们的框架对任务或基本模型做出了最少的假设，并且只需很少的修改就可以应用于许多最新的方法。代码将在以下网址提供：https://github.com/yiren-jian/LM-SupCon。 本文提出一种基于对比学习的框架，通过聚类同类输入增强基于提示的少样本语言学习模型的泛化能力。 Yiren Jian,Chongyang Gao,Soroush Vosoughi cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Yiren Jian,Chongyang Gao,Soroush Vosoughi
title: Embedding Hallucination for Few-Shot Language Fine-tuning
title_zh: 嵌入幻觉以进行少样本语言微调
abstract: Few-shot language learners adapt knowledge from a pre-trained model to recognize novel classes from a few-labeled sentences. In such settings, fine-tuning a pre-trained language model can cause severe over-fitting. In this paper, we propose an Embedding Hallucination (EmbedHalluc) method, which generates auxiliary embedding-label pairs to expand the fine-tuning dataset. The hallucinator is trained by playing an adversarial game with the discriminator, such that the hallucinated embedding is indiscriminative to the real ones in the fine-tuning dataset. By training with the extended dataset, the language learner effectively learns from the diverse hallucinated embeddings to overcome the over-fitting issue. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed method is effective in a wide range of language tasks, outperforming current fine-tuning methods. Further, we show that EmbedHalluc outperforms other methods that address this over-fitting problem, such as common data augmentation, semi-supervised pseudo-labeling, and regularization. The code will be made available at: https://github.com/yiren-jian/EmbedHalluc.
summary: Few-shot language learners adapt knowledge from a pre-trained model to recognize novel classes from a few-labeled sentences. In such settings, fine-tuning a pre-trained language model can cause severe over-fitting. In this paper, we propose an Embedding Hallucination (EmbedHalluc) method, which generates auxiliary embedding-label pairs to expand the fine-tuning dataset. The hallucinator is trained by playing an adversarial game with the discriminator, such that the hallucinated embedding is indiscriminative to the real ones in the fine-tuning dataset. By training with the extended dataset, the language learner effectively learns from the diverse hallucinated embeddings to overcome the over-fitting issue. Experiments demonstrate that our proposed method is effective in a wide range of language tasks, outperforming current fine-tuning methods. Further, we show that EmbedHalluc outperforms other methods that address this over-fitting problem, such as common data augmentation, semi-supervised pseudo-labeling, and regularization. The code will be made available at: https://github.com/yiren-jian/EmbedHalluc.
abstract_zh: 小样本语言学习者利用预先训练的模型中的知识来从几个标记的句子中识别新的类别。在这种情况下，微调预训练的语言模型可能会导致严重的过度拟合。在本文中，我们提出了一种嵌入幻觉（EmbedHalluc）方法，该方法生成辅助嵌入标签对来扩展微调数据集。幻觉器是通过与判别器玩对抗性游戏来训练的，这样幻觉嵌入与微调数据集中的真实嵌入是不区分的。通过使用扩展数据集进行训练，语言学习者可以有效地从各种幻觉嵌入中学习，以克服过度拟合问题。实验表明，我们提出的方法在广泛的语言任务中是有效的，优于当前的微调方法。此外，我们还表明 EmbedHalluc 优于解决此过度拟合问题的其他方法，例如常见的数据增强、半监督伪标记和正则化。代码将在以下位置提供：https://github.com/yiren-jian/EmbedHalluc。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为EmbedHalluc的方法，通过生成辅助嵌入-标签对来解决少样本语言微调中的过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 少样本学习中微调预训练语言模型容易因数据量不足导致严重过拟合，传统方法如数据增强和正则化效果有限。
AI.method: 设计对抗生成网络，通过生成器（hallucinator）与判别器的对抗训练生成难以区分的虚假嵌入，扩展微调数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种语言任务中优于现有方法，包括数据增强、伪标签和正则化技术。
AI.conclusion: EmbedHalluc通过对抗生成的嵌入增强数据多样性，有效缓解过拟合问题，为少样本学习提供新思路。

authors_text: Donghyeon Kim,Gwantae Kim,Bokyeung Lee,Jeong-gi Kwak,David K. Han,Hanseok Ko
title: Efficient dynamic filter for robust and low computational feature extraction
title_zh: 高效的动态滤波器，用于稳健且低计算量的特征提取
abstract: Unseen noise signal which is not considered in a model training process is difficult to anticipate and would lead to performance degradation. Various methods have been investigated to mitigate unseen noise. In our previous work, an Instance-level Dynamic Filter (IDF) and a Pixel Dynamic Filter (PDF) were proposed to extract noise-robust features. However, the performance of the dynamic filter might be degraded since simple feature pooling is used to reduce the computational resource in the IDF part. In this paper, we propose an efficient dynamic filter to enhance the performance of the dynamic filter. Instead of utilizing the simple feature mean, we separate Time-Frequency (T-F) features as non-overlapping chunks, and separable convolutions are carried out for each feature direction (inter chunks and intra chunks). Additionally, we propose Dynamic Attention Pooling that maps high dimensional features as low dimensional feature embeddings. These methods are applied to the IDF for keyword spotting and speaker verification tasks. We confirm that our proposed method performs better in unseen environments (unseen noise and unseen speakers) than state-of-the-art models.
summary: Unseen noise signal which is not considered in a model training process is difficult to anticipate and would lead to performance degradation. Various methods have been investigated to mitigate unseen noise. In our previous work, an Instance-level Dynamic Filter (IDF) and a Pixel Dynamic Filter (PDF) were proposed to extract noise-robust features. However, the performance of the dynamic filter might be degraded since simple feature pooling is used to reduce the computational resource in the IDF part. In this paper, we propose an efficient dynamic filter to enhance the performance of the dynamic filter. Instead of utilizing the simple feature mean, we separate Time-Frequency (T-F) features as non-overlapping chunks, and separable convolutions are carried out for each feature direction (inter chunks and intra chunks). Additionally, we propose Dynamic Attention Pooling that maps high dimensional features as low dimensional feature embeddings. These methods are applied to the IDF for keyword spotting and speaker verification tasks. We confirm that our proposed method performs better in unseen environments (unseen noise and unseen speakers) than state-of-the-art models.
abstract_zh: 在模型训练过程中未考虑的看不见的噪声信号很难预测，并且会导致性能下降。人们已经研究了各种方法来减轻看不见的噪声。在我们之前的工作中，提出了实例级动态滤波器（IDF）和像素动态滤波器（PDF）来提取抗噪声特征。然而，由于使用简单的特征池来减少 IDF 部分的计算资源，动态滤波器的性能可能会下降。在本文中，我们提出了一种高效的动态滤波器来增强动态滤波器的性能。我们没有利用简单的特征均值，而是将时频（T-F）特征分离为不重叠的块，并对每个特征方向（块间和块内）进行可分离的卷积。此外，我们提出动态注意力池，将高维特征映射为低维特征嵌入。这些方法应用于 IDF 中的关键字识别和说话人验证任务。我们确认，我们提出的方法在看不见的环境（看不见的噪声和看不见的扬声器）中比最先进的模型表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的动态滤波器，用于在计算资源有限的情况下提取鲁棒的特征，以提升关键词检测和说话人验证任务在未知噪声环境下的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有动态滤波器（如IDF/PDF）因使用简单特征池化方法导致计算效率与性能下降，难以有效应对未知噪声和说话人场景下的性能退化问题。
AI.method: 将时频特征分割为非重叠块，分别进行块间与块内可分离卷积；提出动态注意力池化模块将高维特征映射为低维嵌入表示，优化IDF结构。
AI.result: 在未知噪声和未知说话人场景下，所提方法优于现有最先进模型，验证了其在鲁棒性与计算效率上的优势。
AI.conclusion: 通过特征分块处理与动态注意力池化，本文方法在保持低计算复杂度的同时显著提升了动态滤波器的噪声鲁棒性，适用于实际部署场景。

authors_text: Xin Lin,Changxing Ding,Jing Zhang,Yibing Zhan,Dacheng Tao
title: RU-Net: Regularized Unrolling Network for Scene Graph Generation
title_zh: RU-Net：用于场景图生成的正则化展开网络
abstract: Scene graph generation (SGG) aims to detect objects and predict the relationships between each pair of objects. Existing SGG methods usually suffer from several issues, including 1) ambiguous object representations, as graph neural network-based message passing (GMP) modules are typically sensitive to spurious inter-node correlations, and 2) low diversity in relationship predictions due to severe class imbalance and a large number of missing annotations. To address both problems, in this paper, we propose a regularized unrolling network (RU-Net). We first study the relation between GMP and graph Laplacian denoising (GLD) from the perspective of the unrolling technique, determining that GMP can be formulated as a solver for GLD. Based on this observation, we propose an unrolled message passing module and introduce an $\ell_p$-based graph regularization to suppress spurious connections between nodes. Second, we propose a group diversity enhancement module that promotes the prediction diversity of relationships via rank maximization. Systematic experiments demonstrate that RU-Net is effective under a variety of settings and metrics. Furthermore, RU-Net achieves new state-of-the-arts on three popular databases: VG, VRD, and OI. Code is available at https://github.com/siml3/RU-Net.
summary: Scene graph generation (SGG) aims to detect objects and predict the relationships between each pair of objects. Existing SGG methods usually suffer from several issues, including 1) ambiguous object representations, as graph neural network-based message passing (GMP) modules are typically sensitive to spurious inter-node correlations, and 2) low diversity in relationship predictions due to severe class imbalance and a large number of missing annotations. To address both problems, in this paper, we propose a regularized unrolling network (RU-Net). We first study the relation between GMP and graph Laplacian denoising (GLD) from the perspective of the unrolling technique, determining that GMP can be formulated as a solver for GLD. Based on this observation, we propose an unrolled message passing module and introduce an $\ell_p$-based graph regularization to suppress spurious connections between nodes. Second, we propose a group diversity enhancement module that promotes the prediction diversity of relationships via rank maximization. Systematic experiments demonstrate that RU-Net is effective under a variety of settings and metrics. Furthermore, RU-Net achieves new state-of-the-arts on three popular databases: VG, VRD, and OI. Code is available at https://github.com/siml3/RU-Net.
abstract_zh: 场景图生成（SGG）旨在检测对象并预测每对对象之间的关系。现有的 SGG 方法通常存在几个问题，包括 1）模糊的对象表示，因为基于图神经网络的消息传递（GMP）模块通常对虚假的节点间相关性敏感，2）由于严重的类不平衡和大量缺失注释，关系预测的多样性较低。为了解决这两个问题，在本文中，我们提出了正则化展开网络（RU-Net）。我们首先从展开技术的角度研究了 GMP 和图拉普拉斯去噪（GLD）之间的关系，确定 GMP 可以作为 GLD 的求解器。基于这一观察，我们提出了一个展开的消息传递模块，并引入了基于 $\ell_p$ 的图正则化来抑制节点之间的虚假连接。其次，我们提出了一个群体多样性增强模块，通过排名最大化来促进关系的预测多样性。系统实验证明 RU-Net 在各种设置和指标下都是有效的。此外，RU-Net 在三个流行数据库上实现了新的最先进技术：VG、VRD 和 OI。代码可在 https://github.com/siml3/RU-Net 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RU-Net，通过正则化展开网络解决场景图生成中物体表示模糊和关系预测多样性低的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有场景图生成方法存在物体表示模糊（图神经网络对虚假关联敏感）和关系预测多样性不足（类别不平衡与标注缺失）两大问题。
AI.method: 提出展开消息传递模块（将GMP视为图拉普拉斯去噪求解器）与ℓ_p图正则化抑制虚假连接，并设计群体多样性增强模块通过排序最大化提升预测多样性。
AI.result: 在VG、VRD、OI三个基准数据集上取得新的SOTA性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: RU-Net通过理论分析与模块设计有效解决了场景图生成中的核心问题，验证了方法的普适性与优越性。

search_text: RU-Net: Regularized Unrolling Network for Scene Graph Generation RU-Net：用于场景图生成的正则化展开网络 Scene graph generation (SGG) aims to detect objects and predict the relationships between each pair of objects. Existing SGG methods usually suffer from several issues, including 1) ambiguous object representations, as graph neural network-based message passing (GMP) modules are typically sensitive to spurious inter-node correlations, and 2) low diversity in relationship predictions due to severe class imbalance and a large number of missing annotations. To address both problems, in this paper, we propose a regularized unrolling network (RU-Net). We first study the relation between GMP and graph Laplacian denoising (GLD) from the perspective of the unrolling technique, determining that GMP can be formulated as a solver for GLD. Based on this observation, we propose an unrolled message passing module and introduce an $\ell_p$-based graph regularization to suppress spurious connections between nodes. Second, we propose a group diversity enhancement module that promotes the prediction diversity of relationships via rank maximization. Systematic experiments demonstrate that RU-Net is effective under a variety of settings and metrics. Furthermore, RU-Net achieves new state-of-the-arts on three popular databases: VG, VRD, and OI. Code is available at https://github.com/siml3/RU-Net. 场景图生成（SGG）旨在检测对象并预测每对对象之间的关系。现有的 SGG 方法通常存在几个问题，包括 1）模糊的对象表示，因为基于图神经网络的消息传递（GMP）模块通常对虚假的节点间相关性敏感，2）由于严重的类不平衡和大量缺失注释，关系预测的多样性较低。为了解决这两个问题，在本文中，我们提出了正则化展开网络（RU-Net）。我们首先从展开技术的角度研究了 GMP 和图拉普拉斯去噪（GLD）之间的关系，确定 GMP 可以作为 GLD 的求解器。基于这一观察，我们提出了一个展开的消息传递模块，并引入了基于 $\ell_p$ 的图正则化来抑制节点之间的虚假连接。其次，我们提出了一个群体多样性增强模块，通过排名最大化来促进关系的预测多样性。系统实验证明 RU-Net 在各种设置和指标下都是有效的。此外，RU-Net 在三个流行数据库上实现了新的最先进技术：VG、VRD 和 OI。代码可在 https://github.com/siml3/RU-Net 获取。 本文提出RU-Net，通过正则化展开网络解决场景图生成中物体表示模糊和关系预测多样性低的问题。 Xin Lin,Changxing Ding,Jing Zhang,Yibing Zhan,Dacheng Tao cs.CV

authors_text: Boris Kovalerchuk,Răzvan Andonie,Nuno Datia,Kawa Nazemi,Ebad Banissi
title: Visual Knowledge Discovery with Artificial Intelligence: Challenges and Future Directions
title_zh: 人工智能视觉知识发现：挑战和未来方向
abstract: This volume is devoted to the emerging field of Integrated Visual Knowledge Discovery that combines advances in Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning (AI/ML) and Visualization/Visual Analytics. Chapters included are extended versions of the selected AI and Visual Analytics papers and related symposia at the recent International Information Visualization Conferences (IV2019 and IV2020). AI/ML face a long-standing challenge of explaining models to humans. Models explanation is fundamentally human activity, not only an algorithmic one. In this chapter we aim to present challenges and future directions within the field of Visual Analytics, Visual Knowledge Discovery and AI/ML, and to discuss the role of visualization in visual AI/ML. In addition, we describe progress in emerging Full 2D ML, natural language processing, and AI/ML in multidimensional data aided by visual means.
summary: This volume is devoted to the emerging field of Integrated Visual Knowledge Discovery that combines advances in Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning (AI/ML) and Visualization/Visual Analytics. Chapters included are extended versions of the selected AI and Visual Analytics papers and related symposia at the recent International Information Visualization Conferences (IV2019 and IV2020). AI/ML face a long-standing challenge of explaining models to humans. Models explanation is fundamentally human activity, not only an algorithmic one. In this chapter we aim to present challenges and future directions within the field of Visual Analytics, Visual Knowledge Discovery and AI/ML, and to discuss the role of visualization in visual AI/ML. In addition, we describe progress in emerging Full 2D ML, natural language processing, and AI/ML in multidimensional data aided by visual means.
abstract_zh: 本书致力于新兴的集成视觉知识发现领域，该领域结合了人工智能/机器学习 (AI/ML) 和可视化/视觉分析的进步。所含章节是所选人工智能和视觉分析论文以及最近国际信息可视化会议（IV2019 和 IV2020）上相关研讨会的扩展版本。人工智能/机器学习面临着向人类解释模型的长期挑战。模型解释从根本上来说是人类活动，而不仅仅是算法活动。在本章中，我们旨在提出视觉分析、视觉知识发现和人工智能/机器学习领域的挑战和未来方向，并讨论可视化在视觉人工智能/机器学习中的作用。此外，我们还描述了新兴的全 2D ML、自然语言处理以及视觉手段辅助的多维数据中的 AI/ML 的进展。

AI.tldr: 探讨人工智能与可视化分析融合中的挑战与未来方向，推动可解释性AI发展
AI.motivation: 解决AI模型可解释性难题，促进跨学科方法融合以提升数据分析效率
AI.method: 通过整合AI/ML技术与可视化分析方法，结合案例研究和跨领域技术融合进行系统性分析
AI.result: 明确了可视化在AI解释中的关键作用，推动了全二维ML和多维数据处理技术的发展
AI.conclusion: 跨学科融合是未来方向，可视化技术将显著提升AI模型的可解释性与应用价值
